      compact/tube-stable residual chart.

      The theorem `sourceOriented_rankDeficient_algebraicParameterBall` in
      the preceding script is not an opaque local-surjectivity assertion.  It
      is the following finite-dimensional normal-coordinate construction.
      The only non-polynomial choice is the head Gram factor near the
      signature head metric, and that is fixed by an ordinary inverse-function
      chart at the identity factor, not by a global square-root branch.

      ```lean
      abbrev BHW.SourceSymmetricMatrixCoord (r : Nat) :=
        {A : Matrix (Fin r) (Fin r) Ōäé // A.transpose = A}

      def BHW.sourceHeadMetricSymmCoord
          (d r : Nat)
          (hrD : r < d + 1) :
          BHW.SourceSymmetricMatrixCoord r

      def BHW.sourceHeadFactorCoordinateWindow
          (r : Nat) (rho : ŌäØ) :
          Set (Matrix (Fin r) (Fin r) Ōäé)

      def BHW.sourceHeadFactorGramSymmCoord
          (d r : Nat)
          (hrD : r < d + 1)
          (H : Matrix (Fin r) (Fin r) Ōäé) :
          BHW.SourceSymmetricMatrixCoord r

      structure BHW.SourceRankDeficientHeadGaugeData
          (d r : Nat)
          (hrD : r < d + 1) where
        factorDomain : Set (Matrix (Fin r) (Fin r) Ōäé)
        factorDomain_open : IsOpen factorDomain
        factorDomain_center_mem :
          (1 : Matrix (Fin r) (Fin r) Ōäé) Ōłł factorDomain
        factorDomain_coordinate :
          Ōłā rho : ŌäØ, 0 < rho Ōł¦
            BHW.sourceHeadFactorCoordinateWindow r rho ŌŖå factorDomain
        U : Set (BHW.SourceSymmetricMatrixCoord r)
        U_open : IsOpen U
        center_mem :
          BHW.sourceHeadMetricSymmCoord d r hrD Ōłł U
        factor : BHW.SourceSymmetricMatrixCoord r ->
          Matrix (Fin r) (Fin r) Ōäé
        factor_continuousOn : ContinuousOn factor U
        factor_center :
          factor (BHW.sourceHeadMetricSymmCoord d r hrD) = 1
        factor_gram :
          ŌłĆ A Ōłł U,
            factor A * BHW.sourceHeadMetric d r hrD *
                (factor A).transpose =
              (A : Matrix (Fin r) (Fin r) Ōäé)
        factorDomain_mem :
          ŌłĆ H Ōłł factorDomain,
            BHW.sourceHeadFactorGramSymmCoord d r hrD H Ōłł U
        factor_left_inverse :
          ŌłĆ H Ōłł factorDomain,
            factor (BHW.sourceHeadFactorGramSymmCoord d r hrD H) = H
        factor_det_unit :
          ŌłĆ A Ōłł U, IsUnit (factor A).det

      theorem BHW.sourceRankDeficientHeadGauge_at_sourceMetric
          (d r : Nat)
          (hrD : r < d + 1) :
          BHW.SourceRankDeficientHeadGaugeData d r hrD := by
        -- Apply the holomorphic inverse-function theorem to
        -- `H Ōå” H * sourceHeadMetric d r hrD * HßĄĆ` from matrices near `1`
        -- to symmetric matrices near `sourceHeadMetric d r hrD`.  Its
        -- derivative at `1` is `X Ōå” X*╬Ę + ╬Ę*XßĄĆ`, where `╬Ę` is the signature
        -- diagonal and `╬ĘŌü╗┬╣ = ╬Ę`.  On the ╬Ę-symmetric slice this is a linear
        -- isomorphism, with inverse obtained by multiplying the perturbation
        -- by `╬Ę` and taking the symmetric half.  Shrink the resulting
        -- neighborhood so `det (factor A)` stays nonzero.
        exact BHW.symmetricGramFactorGauge_at_sourceMetric d r hrD

      def BHW.sourceOrientedSchurHeadBlockSymm
          (d n r : Nat)
          (hrD : r < d + 1)
          (hrn : r <= n)
          {G : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n}
          (hGvar : G Ōłł BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety d n) :
          BHW.SourceSymmetricMatrixCoord r

      structure BHW.SourceOrientedSchurTailSmallFor
          (d n r : Nat)
          (hrD : r < d + 1)
          (hrn : r <= n)
          (╬Ę : ŌäØ)
          (G : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n)
          (headFactor : Matrix (Fin r) (Fin r) Ōäé) where
        gram_bound :
          ŌłĆ u v,
            ŌĆ¢(BHW.sourceOrientedSchurResidualTailData
              d n r hrD hrn G headFactor).gram u vŌĆ¢ < ╬Ę
        det_bound :
          ŌłĆ ╬╣,
            ŌĆ¢(BHW.sourceOrientedSchurResidualTailData
              d n r hrD hrn G headFactor).det ╬╣ŌĆ¢ < ╬Ę

      -- Important Lean-topology correction: `Head.U` is open in the symmetric
      -- matrix subtype, so it is only tested for points already known to be
      -- in `sourceOrientedGramVariety`.  The ambient neighborhood `╬®nf` is
      -- obtained by relative-continuity shrinkage from the variety into this
      -- subtype-open set; it must not be defined as an ambient open set by
      -- the ill-typed condition `headBlock(G) Ōłł Head.U` for arbitrary `G`.
      --
      -- Important normal-parameter correction: the production coordinate
      -- surface is the checked finite-coordinate homeomorphism together with
      -- the pulled-back ball `sourceOrientedNormalParameterBall`.  Do not
      -- introduce a stronger `ŌēāL[Ōäé] (Fin m -> Ōäé)` target for the normal
      -- parameter record.  The topology-only shrink from arbitrary
      -- neighborhoods of the center Schur head/mixed/tail coordinates to a
      -- positive connected normal-parameter ball is now checked as
      -- `exists_sourceOrientedNormalParameterBall_subset_schur_nhds`.
      --
      -- Important head-gauge correction: the local factor chart must carry a
      -- near-identity matrix domain and the left-inverse law on that domain.
      -- Otherwise the forward inclusion for a normal parameter `p` has a gap:
      -- Schur-window tail smallness controls the residual data computed with
      -- `p.head`, while reverse Schur extraction computes residual data with
      -- `Head.factor` of the selected head Gram block.  The canonical image
      -- proof must shrink the head window so `p.head Ōłł Head.factorDomain`;
      -- then
      -- `sourceOrientedSchurResidualTailData_normalParameter_headGauge`
      -- identifies the gauge-selected residual tail with the stored shifted
      -- tail invariant.

      structure BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientNormalLocalImageData
          [NeZero d]
          (d n : Nat)
          {G0 : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n}
          (N :
            BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientAlgebraicNormalFormData d n G0)
          where
        m : Nat
        encode :
          BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientNormalParameter
            d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn ŌēāL[Ōäé] (Fin m -> Ōäé)
        P : Set (Fin m -> Ōäé)
        P_open : IsOpen P
        P_connected : IsConnected P
        c0 : Fin m -> Ōäé
        c0_mem : c0 Ōłł P
        center_encode :
          encode
            (BHW.sourceOrientedNormalCenterParameter
              d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn) = c0
        ╬®nf : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n)
        ╬®nf_open : IsOpen ╬®nf
        ╬®nf_center :
          BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n N.normalBase Ōłł ╬®nf
        normalParam :
          (Fin m -> Ōäé) -> BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n :=
          fun c =>
            BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
              (BHW.sourceOrientedNormalParameterVector
                d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn (encode.symm c))
        normalParam_continuousOn :
          ContinuousOn normalParam P
        normalParam_mem :
          ŌłĆ c Ōłł P, normalParam c Ōłł ╬®nf Ōł®
            BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety d n
        normal_local_image_eq :
          ╬®nf Ōł® BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety d n =
            normalParam '' P

      theorem BHW.sourceOriented_rankDeficient_normalLocalImageData
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat)
          {G0 : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n}
          (N :
            BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientAlgebraicNormalFormData d n G0) :
          BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientNormalLocalImageData d n N := by
        classical
        let Head :=
          BHW.sourceRankDeficientHeadGauge_at_sourceMetric d N.r N.hrD
        -- Pick the checked finite-coordinate homeomorphism only internally;
        -- the public parameter set is a sufficiently small pulled-back ball
        -- `sourceOrientedNormalParameterBall ╬Ą` around the normal center.
        -- Shrink it so:
        -- (1) the head Gram block of every nearby normal invariant lies in
        --     `Head.U`;
        -- (2) the Schur mixed coefficients are bounded by the mixed radius;
        -- (3) the shifted oriented residual tail coordinates satisfy the
        --     smallness hypotheses of
        --     `sourceShiftedTailSmallRealization`;
        -- (4) the polynomial image of the parameter ball is contained in an
        --     ambient open normal neighborhood `╬®nf`.
        rcases
          BHW.sourceOriented_rankDeficient_chooseNormalParameterBall
            (d := d) hd n N Head with
          Ō¤©m, encode, P, c0, hP_open, hP_conn, hc0, hcenter,
            ╬®nf, h╬®nf_open, h╬®nf_center, hparam_mem, hsurjŌ¤®
        refine
          { m := m
            encode := encode
            P := P
            P_open := hP_open
            P_connected := hP_conn
            c0 := c0
            c0_mem := hc0
            center_encode := hcenter
            ╬®nf := ╬®nf
            ╬®nf_open := h╬®nf_open
            ╬®nf_center := h╬®nf_center
            normalParam_continuousOn := by
              exact
                (BHW.continuous_sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n).continuousOn.comp
                  ((BHW.continuous_sourceOrientedNormalParameterVector
                    (d := d) n N.r N.hrD N.hrn).comp_continuousOn
                    encode.symm.continuous.continuousOn)
                  (by intro c hc; trivial)
            normalParam_mem := hparam_mem
            normal_local_image_eq := hsurj }

      def BHW.sourceOrientedSchurMixedCoeffAt
          [NeZero d]
          (d n : Nat)
          {G0 : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n}
          (N :
            BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientAlgebraicNormalFormData d n G0)
          (Head : BHW.SourceRankDeficientHeadGaugeData d N.r N.hrD)
          (G : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n) :
          Matrix (Fin (n - N.r)) (Fin N.r) Ōäé :=
        BHW.sourceSchurMixedCoeff n N.r N.hrn G
          (BHW.sourceOrientedSchurHeadBlock n N.r N.hrn G)

      structure BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientSchurNeighborhoodData
          [NeZero d]
          (d n : Nat)
          {G0 : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n}
          (N :
            BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientAlgebraicNormalFormData d n G0)
          (Head : BHW.SourceRankDeficientHeadGaugeData d N.r N.hrD) where
        m : Nat
        encode :
          BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientNormalParameter
            d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn ŌēāL[Ōäé] (Fin m -> Ōäé)
        P : Set (Fin m -> Ōäé)
        P_open : IsOpen P
        P_connected : IsConnected P
        c0 : Fin m -> Ōäé
        c0_mem : c0 Ōłł P
        center_encode :
          encode
            (BHW.sourceOrientedNormalCenterParameter
              d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn) = c0
        tailCoordRadius : ŌäØ
        tailCoordRadius_pos : 0 < tailCoordRadius
        tailEta : ŌäØ
        tailEta_pos : 0 < tailEta
        tailRealize :
          ŌłĆ T :
            BHW.SourceShiftedTailOrientedData
              d N.r N.hrD (n - N.r),
            T Ōłł
              BHW.sourceShiftedTailOrientedVariety
                d N.r N.hrD (n - N.r) ->
            (ŌłĆ u v, ŌĆ¢T.gram u vŌĆ¢ < tailEta) ->
            (ŌłĆ ╬╣, ŌĆ¢T.det ╬╣ŌĆ¢ < tailEta) ->
            Ōłā q : Fin (n - N.r) -> Fin (d + 1 - N.r) -> Ōäé,
              (ŌłĆ u ╬╝, ŌĆ¢q u ╬╝ŌĆ¢ < tailCoordRadius) Ōł¦
              BHW.sourceShiftedTailOrientedInvariant
                d N.r N.hrD (n - N.r) q = T
        ╬®nf : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n)
        ╬®nf_open : IsOpen ╬®nf
        ╬®nf_center :
          BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n N.normalBase Ōłł ╬®nf
        normalParam :
          (Fin m -> Ōäé) -> BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n :=
          fun c =>
            BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
              (BHW.sourceOrientedNormalParameterVector
                d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn (encode.symm c))
        normalParam_mem :
          ŌłĆ c Ōłł P,
            normalParam c Ōłł ╬®nf Ōł® BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety d n
        head_mem :
          ŌłĆ G (hG : G Ōłł ╬®nf Ōł® BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety d n),
            BHW.sourceOrientedSchurHeadBlockSymm
              d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn hG.2 Ōłł Head.U
        tail_small :
          ŌłĆ G (hG : G Ōłł ╬®nf Ōł® BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety d n),
            BHW.sourceOrientedSchurTailSmallFor
              d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn tailEta G
                (Head.factor
                  (BHW.sourceOrientedSchurHeadBlockSymm
                    d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn hG.2))
        schurParam_mem :
          ŌłĆ {G : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n}
            (hG : G Ōłł ╬®nf Ōł® BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety d n)
            (p :
              BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientNormalParameter
                d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn),
            p.head =
              Head.factor
                (BHW.sourceOrientedSchurHeadBlockSymm
                  d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn hG.2) ->
            p.mixed =
              BHW.sourceOrientedSchurMixedCoeffAt d n N Head G ->
            (ŌłĆ u ╬╝, ŌĆ¢p.tail u ╬╝ŌĆ¢ < tailCoordRadius) ->
            (ŌłĆ u v,
              ŌĆ¢(BHW.sourceShiftedTailOrientedInvariant
                  d N.r N.hrD (n - N.r) p.tail).gram u vŌĆ¢ < tailEta) ->
            (ŌłĆ ╬╣,
              ŌĆ¢(BHW.sourceShiftedTailOrientedInvariant
                  d N.r N.hrD (n - N.r) p.tail).det ╬╣ŌĆ¢ < tailEta) ->
            encode p Ōłł P

      -- Retired draft surface, not a production target:
      -- `sourceOrientedRankDeficientParameterBox` with an `ŌēāL[Ōäé]` encoding.
      -- The checked replacement is:
      --
      -- * `sourceOrientedNormalParameterBall`;
      -- * `sourceOrientedNormalParameterBall_open_connected_center`;
      -- * `exists_sourceOrientedNormalParameterBall_subset_of_mem_nhds_center`;
      -- * `exists_sourceOrientedNormalParameterBall_subset_head_det_isUnit`;
      -- * `exists_sourceOrientedNormalParameterBall_subset_schur_nhds`;
      -- * `exists_sourceOrientedNormalParameterBall_subset_coordinate_nhds`;
      -- * `exists_sourceOrientedNormalParameterBall_subset_coordinate_bounds`.
      --
      -- Thus every finite-coordinate estimate shrink should first define
      -- honest target neighborhoods in the Schur head, mixed, and tail
      -- coordinate spaces, call
      -- `exists_sourceOrientedNormalParameterBall_subset_schur_nhds`, and then
      -- intersect/shrink with the already checked invertible-head and ambient
      -- image shrinks.  Open/connected/center membership comes from
      -- `sourceOrientedNormalParameterBall_open_connected_center`.
      -- If the proof needs the old raw parameter inequalities directly, use
      -- `exists_sourceOrientedNormalParameterBall_subset_coordinate_bounds`;
      -- it is exactly the checked ball-based replacement for the retired
      -- `sourceOrientedRankDeficientParameterBox_open_connected` step.
      -- The one-shot assembly of ambient image, invertible-head,
      -- Schur-neighborhood, and raw-coordinate shrinks is now checked as
      -- `SourceOrientedRankDeficientAlgebraicNormalFormData.exists_normalParameterBall_image_subset_open_head_schur_and_coordinate_bounds`,
      -- using `sourceOrientedNormalParameterBall_mono` to pass to a smaller
      -- common radius.

      theorem BHW.sourceOrientedSchurEstimateNeighborhood_shrink
          [NeZero d]
          (d n : Nat)
          {G0 : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n}
          (N :
            BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientAlgebraicNormalFormData d n G0)
          (Head : BHW.SourceRankDeficientHeadGaugeData d N.r N.hrD)
          {headRadius mixedRadius tailEta : ŌäØ}
          (hheadRadius : 0 < headRadius)
          (hmixedRadius : 0 < mixedRadius)
          (htailEta : 0 < tailEta) :
          Ōłā ╬®nf : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n),
            IsOpen ╬®nf Ōł¦
            BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n N.normalBase Ōłł ╬®nf Ōł¦
            (ŌłĆ G (hG : G Ōłł ╬®nf Ōł® BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety d n),
              BHW.sourceOrientedSchurHeadBlockSymm
                d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn hG.2 Ōłł Head.U) Ōł¦
            (ŌłĆ G (hG : G Ōłł ╬®nf Ōł® BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety d n),
              ŌłĆ a b,
                ŌĆ¢Head.factor
                    (BHW.sourceOrientedSchurHeadBlockSymm
                      d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn hG.2) a b -
                  (1 : Matrix (Fin N.r) (Fin N.r) Ōäé) a bŌĆ¢ <
                    headRadius) Ōł¦
            (ŌłĆ G (hG : G Ōłł ╬®nf Ōł® BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety d n),
              ŌłĆ u a,
                ŌĆ¢BHW.sourceOrientedSchurMixedCoeffAt
                    d n N Head G u aŌĆ¢ < mixedRadius) Ōł¦
            (ŌłĆ G (hG : G Ōłł ╬®nf Ōł® BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety d n),
              BHW.SourceOrientedSchurTailSmallFor
                d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn tailEta G
                  (Head.factor
                    (BHW.sourceOrientedSchurHeadBlockSymm
                      d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn hG.2))) := by
        -- This is the finite-coordinate relative-shrink statement.  The
        -- head-gauge membership is open only in the symmetric subtype, so it
        -- is obtained by continuity of
        -- `sourceOrientedSchurHeadBlockSymm` on
        -- `sourceOrientedGramVariety`, then promoted to an ambient open
        -- `╬®nf` whose intersection with the variety has the desired property.
        -- The mixed and residual-tail inequalities are ordinary
        -- polynomial/rational strict estimates on that same head-invertible
        -- relative neighborhood.  At the normal base, the head block is
        -- `sourceHeadMetric`, the mixed Schur coefficient is `0`, and the
        -- residual tail data are `0`.
        exact
          BHW.sourceOrientedSchurEstimateNeighborhood_shrink_from_rationalMaps
            (d := d) (n := n) N Head
            hheadRadius hmixedRadius htailEta

      theorem BHW.sourceOriented_normalParam_mem_ambientShrink
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat)
          {G0 : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n}
          (N :
            BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientAlgebraicNormalFormData d n G0)
          (Head : BHW.SourceRankDeficientHeadGaugeData d N.r N.hrD)
          (encode :
            BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientNormalParameter
              d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn ŌēāL[Ōäé] (Fin m -> Ōäé))
          {headRadius mixedRadius tailRadius : ŌäØ}
          {╬®nf : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n)}
          (hboxTo╬® :
            ŌłĆ p,
              (ŌłĆ a b,
                ŌĆ¢p.head a b -
                  (1 : Matrix (Fin N.r) (Fin N.r) Ōäé) a bŌĆ¢ <
                    headRadius) ->
              (ŌłĆ u a, ŌĆ¢p.mixed u aŌĆ¢ < mixedRadius) ->
              (ŌłĆ u ╬╝, ŌĆ¢p.tail u ╬╝ŌĆ¢ < tailRadius) ->
              BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
                (BHW.sourceOrientedNormalParameterVector
                  d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn p) Ōłł ╬®nf) :
          ŌłĆ c Ōłł
            BHW.sourceOrientedRankDeficientParameterBox
              d n N encode headRadius mixedRadius tailRadius,
            BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
                (BHW.sourceOrientedNormalParameterVector
                  d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn (encode.symm c)) Ōłł
              ╬®nf Ōł® BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety d n := by
        intro c hc
        let p := encode.symm c
        have hvar :
            BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
                (BHW.sourceOrientedNormalParameterVector
                  d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn p) Ōłł
              BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety d n :=
          Ō¤©BHW.sourceOrientedNormalParameterVector
              d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn p, rflŌ¤®
        exact Ō¤©hboxTo╬® p hc.1 hc.2.1 hc.2.2, hvarŌ¤®

      theorem BHW.sourceOriented_normalParam_head_in_HeadU
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat)
          {G0 : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n}
          (N :
            BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientAlgebraicNormalFormData d n G0)
          (Head : BHW.SourceRankDeficientHeadGaugeData d N.r N.hrD) :
          ŌłĆ p,
            p.head =
              Head.factor
                (BHW.sourceOrientedSchurHeadBlockSymm d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn
                  (by
                    exact Ō¤©BHW.sourceOrientedNormalParameterVector
                      d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn p, rflŌ¤®)) ->
            BHW.sourceOrientedSchurHeadBlockSymm d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn
                (by
                  exact Ō¤©BHW.sourceOrientedNormalParameterVector
                    d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn p, rflŌ¤®) Ōłł Head.U := by
        -- This is the local uniqueness/sheet-selection statement for the
        -- inverse-function head gauge near the identity factor.  In
        -- production Lean it should be proved together with the analytic
        -- gauge producer, not by treating `Head.U` as an ambient matrix open
        -- condition.
        exact
          BHW.sourceOriented_normalParam_head_in_HeadU_from_gaugeSheet
            (d := d) hd n N Head

      theorem BHW.sourceOrientedSchurParameter_mem_parameterBox
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat)
          {G0 : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n}
          (N :
            BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientAlgebraicNormalFormData d n G0)
          (Head : BHW.SourceRankDeficientHeadGaugeData d N.r N.hrD)
          (S :
            BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientSchurNeighborhoodData
              d n N Head)
          {G : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n}
          (hG : G Ōłł S.╬®nf Ōł® BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety d n)
          {p :
            BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientNormalParameter
              d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn}
          (hhead :
            p.head =
              Head.factor
                (BHW.sourceOrientedSchurHeadBlockSymm
                  d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn hG.2))
          (hmixed :
            p.mixed =
              BHW.sourceOrientedSchurMixedCoeffAt d n N Head G)
          (htail_coord : ŌłĆ u ╬╝, ŌĆ¢p.tail u ╬╝ŌĆ¢ < S.tailCoordRadius)
          (htail_gram :
            ŌłĆ u v,
              ŌĆ¢(BHW.sourceShiftedTailOrientedInvariant
                  d N.r N.hrD (n - N.r) p.tail).gram u vŌĆ¢ < S.tailEta)
          (htail_det :
            ŌłĆ ╬╣,
              ŌĆ¢(BHW.sourceShiftedTailOrientedInvariant
                  d N.r N.hrD (n - N.r) p.tail).det ╬╣ŌĆ¢ < S.tailEta) :
          S.encode p Ōłł S.P := by
        exact
          S.schurParam_mem hG p hhead hmixed
            htail_coord htail_gram htail_det

      -- Retired draft surface:
      -- `SourceOrientedRankDeficientTailRadiusChoice` plus
      -- `sourceOriented_rankDeficient_shiftedTailCompatible`.
      --
      -- That same-radius compatible packet is not a valid general target for
      -- the tail invariant map.  If `q : Fin m -> Fin D -> Ōäé` satisfies
      -- `ŌĆ¢q u ╬╝ŌĆ¢ < ╬Ą`, then diagonal Gram coordinates may have size close to
      -- `D * ╬Ą^2`; but reverse realization of a one-vector Gram coordinate
      -- inside the same coordinate polydisc forces a radius controlled at the
      -- `╬Ą^2` scale, and determinant coordinates impose still another
      -- homogeneous scale.  The route therefore must not try to prove a
      -- bidirectional invariant polydisc/coordinate-polydisc equivalence.
      --
      -- Active replacement: choose a coordinate radius for the realizing tail
      -- tuple, get the residual-data radius from the checked one-way theorem,
      -- and put the residual-data inequality itself into the parameter set.
      -- This makes forward containment tautological and keeps reverse
      -- inclusion exactly the checked one-way realization theorem.

      structure BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientTailWindowChoice
          (d n r : Nat)
          (hrD : r < d + 1)
          (hrn : r <= n) where
        tailCoordRadius : ŌäØ
        tailCoordRadius_pos : 0 < tailCoordRadius
        tailEta : ŌäØ
        tailEta_pos : 0 < tailEta
        tailRealize :
          ŌłĆ T : BHW.SourceShiftedTailOrientedData d r hrD (n - r),
            T Ōłł
              BHW.sourceShiftedTailOrientedVariety
                d r hrD (n - r) ->
            (ŌłĆ u v, ŌĆ¢T.gram u vŌĆ¢ < tailEta) ->
            (ŌłĆ ╬╣, ŌĆ¢T.det ╬╣ŌĆ¢ < tailEta) ->
            Ōłā q : Fin (n - r) -> Fin (d + 1 - r) -> Ōäé,
              (ŌłĆ u ╬╝, ŌĆ¢q u ╬╝ŌĆ¢ < tailCoordRadius) Ōł¦
              BHW.sourceShiftedTailOrientedInvariant
                d r hrD (n - r) q = T

      def BHW.sourceOrientedRankDeficientTailWindow
          (d n r : Nat)
          (hrD : r < d + 1)
          (hrn : r <= n)
          (Tail :
            BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientTailWindowChoice
              d n r hrD hrn) :
          Set
            (BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientNormalParameter
              d n r hrD hrn) :=
        {p |
          (ŌłĆ u ╬╝, ŌĆ¢p.tail u ╬╝ŌĆ¢ < Tail.tailCoordRadius) Ōł¦
          (ŌłĆ u v,
            ŌĆ¢(BHW.sourceShiftedTailOrientedInvariant
                d r hrD (n - r) p.tail).gram u vŌĆ¢ < Tail.tailEta) Ōł¦
          (ŌłĆ ╬╣,
            ŌĆ¢(BHW.sourceShiftedTailOrientedInvariant
                d r hrD (n - r) p.tail).det ╬╣ŌĆ¢ < Tail.tailEta)}

      theorem BHW.sourceOriented_rankDeficient_tailWindowChoice
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat)
          {G0 : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n}
          (N :
            BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientAlgebraicNormalFormData d n G0)
          {tailCoordRadius : ŌäØ}
          (htailCoordRadius : 0 < tailCoordRadius) :
          BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientTailWindowChoice
            d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn := by
        classical
        -- Implementation transcript:
        -- 1. call the checked theorem
        --      `sourceShiftedTailSmallRealization
        --        d N.r (n - N.r) N.hrD htailCoordRadius`;
        -- 2. store the returned radius as `tailEta`;
        -- 3. use the returned realization function as `tailRealize`.
        -- No forward smallness theorem is needed here: forward containment is
        -- a field of the parameter-window definition below.
        rcases
          BHW.sourceShiftedTailSmallRealization
            d N.r (n - N.r) N.hrD htailCoordRadius with
          Ō¤©tailEta, htailEta_pos, hrealizeŌ¤®
        exact
          { tailCoordRadius := tailCoordRadius
            tailCoordRadius_pos := htailCoordRadius
            tailEta := tailEta
            tailEta_pos := htailEta_pos
            tailRealize := hrealize }

      def BHW.sourceOrientedRankDeficientSchurParameterWindow
          (d n r : Nat)
          (hrD : r < d + 1)
          (hrn : r <= n)
          (headRadius mixedRadius : ŌäØ)
          (Tail :
            BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientTailWindowChoice
              d n r hrD hrn) :
          Set
            (BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientNormalParameter
              d n r hrD hrn) :=
        {p |
          p.head Ōłł
            BHW.sourceOrientedHeadCoordinateWindow r headRadius Ōł¦
          p.mixed Ōłł
            BHW.sourceOrientedMixedCoordinateWindow n r mixedRadius Ōł¦
          p Ōłł
            BHW.sourceOrientedRankDeficientTailWindow
              d n r hrD hrn Tail}

      theorem BHW.sourceOrientedRankDeficientSchurParameterWindow_open_connected
          (d n r : Nat)
          (hrD : r < d + 1)
          (hrn : r <= n)
          {headRadius mixedRadius : ŌäØ}
          (hheadRadius : 0 < headRadius)
          (hmixedRadius : 0 < mixedRadius)
          (Tail :
            BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientTailWindowChoice
              d n r hrD hrn) :
          IsOpen
            (BHW.sourceOrientedRankDeficientSchurParameterWindow
              d n r hrD hrn headRadius mixedRadius Tail) Ōł¦
          IsConnected
            (BHW.sourceOrientedRankDeficientSchurParameterWindow
              d n r hrD hrn headRadius mixedRadius Tail) Ōł¦
          BHW.sourceOrientedNormalCenterParameter d n r hrD hrn Ōłł
            BHW.sourceOrientedRankDeficientSchurParameterWindow
              d n r hrD hrn headRadius mixedRadius Tail := by
        -- Openness is a finite intersection of strict coordinate inequalities:
        -- head and mixed projections are continuous, and the shifted-tail Gram
        -- and determinant coordinates are polynomial in `p.tail`.
        --
        -- Connectedness is the checked finite product assembly: the head and
        -- mixed coordinate polydiscs are convex, the shifted-tail tuple window
        -- is star-shaped from zero, and the product window is transported
        -- through `sourceOrientedNormalParameterCoordHomeomorph`.
        exact
          BHW.sourceOrientedRankDeficientSchurParameterWindow_open_connected
            d n r hrD hrn hheadRadius hmixedRadius Tail

      structure BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientSchurEstimateChoice
          [NeZero d]
          (d n : Nat)
          {G0 : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n}
          (N :
            BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientAlgebraicNormalFormData d n G0)
          (Head : BHW.SourceRankDeficientHeadGaugeData d N.r N.hrD) where
        m : Nat
        encode :
          BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientNormalParameter
            d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn ŌēāL[Ōäé] (Fin m -> Ōäé)
        headRadius : ŌäØ
        headRadius_pos : 0 < headRadius
        mixedRadius : ŌäØ
        mixedRadius_pos : 0 < mixedRadius
        tail :
          BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientTailWindowChoice
            d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn
        P : Set (Fin m -> Ōäé) :=
          BHW.sourceOrientedRankDeficientSchurParameterWindow
            d n N encode headRadius mixedRadius tail
        c0 : Fin m -> Ōäé :=
          encode
            (BHW.sourceOrientedNormalCenterParameter
              d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn)
        P_open : IsOpen P
        P_connected : IsConnected P
        c0_mem : c0 Ōłł P
        ╬®nf : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n)
        ╬®nf_open : IsOpen ╬®nf
        ╬®nf_center :
          BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n N.normalBase Ōłł ╬®nf
        head_mem :
          ŌłĆ G (hG : G Ōłł ╬®nf Ōł® BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety d n),
            BHW.sourceOrientedSchurHeadBlockSymm
              d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn hG.2 Ōłł Head.U
        tail_small :
          ŌłĆ G (hG : G Ōłł ╬®nf Ōł® BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety d n),
            BHW.SourceOrientedSchurTailSmallFor
              d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn tail.tailEta G
                (Head.factor
                  (BHW.sourceOrientedSchurHeadBlockSymm
                    d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn hG.2))
        normalParam_mem :
          ŌłĆ c Ōłł P,
            BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
                (BHW.sourceOrientedNormalParameterVector
                  d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn (encode.symm c)) Ōłł
              ╬®nf Ōł® BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety d n
        schurParam_mem :
          ŌłĆ {G : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n}
            (hG : G Ōłł ╬®nf Ōł® BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety d n)
            (p :
              BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientNormalParameter
                d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn),
            p.head =
              Head.factor
                (BHW.sourceOrientedSchurHeadBlockSymm
                  d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn hG.2) ->
            p.mixed =
              BHW.sourceOrientedSchurMixedCoeffAt d n N Head G ->
            p Ōłł
              BHW.sourceOrientedRankDeficientTailWindow
                d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn tail ->
            encode p Ōłł P

      theorem BHW.sourceOriented_rankDeficient_schurEstimateChoice
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat)
          {G0 : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n}
          (N :
            BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientAlgebraicNormalFormData d n G0)
          (Head : BHW.SourceRankDeficientHeadGaugeData d N.r N.hrD) :
          BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientSchurEstimateChoice d n N Head := by
        classical
        -- Choose the checked single finite-function coordinate homeomorphism
        -- `sourceOrientedNormalParameterFiniteCoordHomeomorph`, and take a
        -- small metric ball supplied by
        -- `sourceOrientedNormalParameterBall_open_connected_center`; the
        -- radius can be shrunk inside the invertible-head locus by
        -- `exists_sourceOrientedNormalParameterBall_subset_head_det_isUnit`.
        -- The older draft used an unimplemented continuous-linear equivalence
        -- `sourceOrientedRankDeficientNormalParameterCoordEquiv`; production
        -- Lean should not require that stronger surface.  The head radius is
        -- obtained from the open neighborhood `Head.U` and the continuity of
        -- the local factor at `1`; shrink it so the factor of any head block
        -- in the resulting Schur neighborhood is inside the same coordinate
        -- box.  The mixed radius is an ordinary positive coordinate bound.
        -- The head-invertible shrink is now Lean-level support:
        -- `isOpen_sourceOrientedNormalParameter_head_det_isUnit` and
        -- `sourceOrientedNormalParameter_head_det_isUnit_mem_nhds_center`
        -- give the determinant-unit neighborhood needed before applying the
        -- checked max-rank-to-tail-rank bridge.
        -- The common-radius topological assembly can now be discharged by
        -- `exists_normalParameterBall_image_subset_open_headGauge_schurParameterWindow`.
        -- This theorem includes the subtype-to-full-matrix bridge
        -- `sourceRankDeficientHeadGauge_exists_matrix_nhds_factor_coordinate_bound`,
        -- so the proof no longer has to manually reconcile `Head.U` in
        -- `SourceSymmetricMatrixCoord` with ordinary matrix neighborhoods of
        -- the normal Schur head, and it also shrinks the chosen ball inside
        -- the full target-shaped Schur parameter window.  It still consumes
        -- an already supplied `SourceRankDeficientHeadGaugeData`; it does not
        -- replace the still-separate head-gauge existence theorem.  The
        -- remaining genuine blocker is the reverse Schur-extraction
        -- realization/image theorem, not parameter-window connectedness.
        let encode :=
          BHW.sourceOrientedNormalParameterFiniteCoordHomeomorph
            (d := d) (n := n) (r := N.r)
            (hrD := N.hrD) (hrn := N.hrn)
        rcases
          BHW.sourceRankDeficientHeadGauge_coordinateRadius
            (d := d) hd n N Head with
          Ō¤©headRadius, hheadRadius_pos, hheadRadius_boxŌ¤®
        rcases
          BHW.sourceRankDeficientMixed_coordinateRadius
            (d := d) hd n N Head with
          Ō¤©mixedRadius, hmixedRadius_posŌ¤®
        let tailCoordRadius : ŌäØ := 1
        have htailCoordRadius : 0 < tailCoordRadius := by positivity
        let Tail :=
          BHW.sourceOriented_rankDeficient_tailWindowChoice
            (d := d) hd n N htailCoordRadius
        let P :=
          BHW.sourceOrientedRankDeficientSchurParameterWindow
            d n N encode headRadius mixedRadius Tail
        obtain Ō¤©hP_open, hP_conn, hc0_memŌ¤® :=
          BHW.sourceOrientedRankDeficientSchurParameterWindow_open_connected
            d n N encode hheadRadius_pos hmixedRadius_pos
            Tail
        rcases
          BHW.sourceOrientedSchurEstimateNeighborhood_shrink
            (d := d) (n := n) N Head
            hheadRadius_pos hmixedRadius_pos Tail.tailEta_pos with
          Ō¤©╬®nf, h╬®nf_open, h╬®nf_center,
            h╬®_head, h╬®_head_close, h╬®_mixed, h╬®_tailŌ¤®
        have hboxTo╬® :
            ŌłĆ p,
              (ŌłĆ a b,
                ŌĆ¢p.head a b -
                  (1 : Matrix (Fin N.r) (Fin N.r) Ōäé) a bŌĆ¢ <
                    headRadius) ->
              (ŌłĆ u a, ŌĆ¢p.mixed u aŌĆ¢ < mixedRadius) ->
              p Ōłł
                BHW.sourceOrientedRankDeficientTailWindow
                  d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn Tail ->
              BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
                  (BHW.sourceOrientedNormalParameterVector
                    d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn p) Ōłł ╬®nf := by
          intro p hp_head hp_mixed hp_tail_window
          -- The ambient shrink only needs raw coordinate bounds.  The tail
          -- window field contains the raw tail-coordinate bound as its first
          -- component.
          exact
            BHW.sourceOriented_normalParam_mem_╬®nf_from_shrink
              (d := d) hd n N Head ╬®nf h╬®_head_close h╬®_mixed h╬®_tail
              p hp_head hp_mixed hp_tail_window.1
        refine
          { m := _
            encode := encode
            headRadius := headRadius
            headRadius_pos := hheadRadius_pos
            mixedRadius := mixedRadius
            mixedRadius_pos := hmixedRadius_pos
            tail := Tail
            P_open := hP_open
            P_connected := hP_conn
            c0_mem := hc0_mem
            ╬®nf := ╬®nf
            ╬®nf_open := h╬®nf_open
            ╬®nf_center := h╬®nf_center
            head_mem := h╬®_head
            tail_small := h╬®_tail
            normalParam_mem := ?_
            schurParam_mem := ?_ }
        ┬Ę exact
            BHW.sourceOriented_normalParam_mem_ambientShrink
              (d := d) hd n N Head encode hboxTo╬®
        ┬Ę intro G hG p hp_head hp_mixed hp_tail
          -- Unfolding `P`, membership is exactly: head-factor closeness from
          -- `╬®nf`, mixed-coordinate smallness from `╬®nf`, and the explicit
          -- tail window.  This is the corrected replacement for the retired
          -- coordinate-only parameter box.
          exact
            BHW.sourceOrientedSchurParameter_mem_window_from_estimateNeighborhood
              (d := d) hd n N Head encode
              hheadRadius_box hmixedRadius_pos Tail G hG p
              hp_head hp_mixed hp_tail

      theorem BHW.sourceOriented_rankDeficient_schurNeighborhoodData_from_estimates
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat)
          {G0 : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n}
          (N :
            BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientAlgebraicNormalFormData d n G0)
          (Head : BHW.SourceRankDeficientHeadGaugeData d N.r N.hrD) :
          BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientSchurNeighborhoodData
            d n N Head := by
        classical
        let C :=
          BHW.sourceOriented_rankDeficient_schurEstimateChoice
            (d := d) hd n N Head
        refine
          { m := C.m
            encode := C.encode
            P := C.P
            P_open := C.P_open
            P_connected := C.P_connected
            c0 := C.c0
            c0_mem := C.c0_mem
            center_encode := rfl
            tailCoordRadius := C.tail.tailCoordRadius
            tailCoordRadius_pos := C.tail.tailCoordRadius_pos
            tailEta := C.tail.tailEta
            tailEta_pos := C.tail.tailEta_pos
            tailRealize := C.tail.tailRealize
            ╬®nf := C.╬®nf
            ╬®nf_open := C.╬®nf_open
            ╬®nf_center := C.╬®nf_center
            normalParam_mem := C.normalParam_mem
            head_mem := ?_
            tail_small := ?_
            schurParam_mem := ?_ }
        ┬Ę intro G hG
          exact C.head_mem G hG
        ┬Ę intro G hG
          exact C.tail_small G hG
        ┬Ę intro G hG p hp_head hp_mixed hp_tail_coord hp_tail_gram hp_tail_det
          exact
            C.schurParam_mem hG p hp_head hp_mixed
              Ō¤©hp_tail_coord, hp_tail_gram, hp_tail_detŌ¤®

      theorem BHW.sourceOriented_rankDeficient_schurNeighborhoodData
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat)
          {G0 : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n}
          (N :
            BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientAlgebraicNormalFormData d n G0)
          (Head : BHW.SourceRankDeficientHeadGaugeData d N.r N.hrD) :
          BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientSchurNeighborhoodData
            d n N Head := by
        classical
        -- Choose the canonical checked single finite-function coordinate
        -- homeomorphism for the product
        -- `(head matrix) ├Ś (mixed coefficients) ├Ś (tail residual vectors)`.
        -- Let `c0` be the encoded center.  Choose a small open ball `P`
        -- around `c0`; open balls in the finite-dimensional complex model are
        -- connected.  Shrink the radius in the following order:
        -- 1. the symmetric head Gram block of every `G` in the normal image
        --    neighborhood lies in `Head.U`;
        -- 2. that head block remains invertible by `Head.factor_det_unit`;
        -- 3. mixed coefficients remain in the prescribed coefficient ball;
        -- 4. the shifted Schur residual tail Gram and determinant coordinates
        --    satisfy the hypotheses of
        --    `sourceShiftedTailSmallRealization`;
        -- 5. the polynomial image of the parameter ball is contained in the
        --    ambient normal image neighborhood `╬®nf`.
        -- The continuity of the normal Schur head/mixed/tail maps is now
        -- checked as `continuous_sourceOrientedNormalParameterSchurHead`,
        -- `continuous_sourceOrientedNormalParameterSchurMixed`, and
        -- `continuous_sourceOrientedNormalParameterSchurTail`.  The common
        -- pullback-to-ball step is checked as
        -- `exists_sourceOrientedNormalParameterBall_subset_schur_nhds`, using
        -- the center identities
        -- `sourceOrientedNormalParameterSchurHead_center`,
        -- `sourceOrientedNormalParameterSchurMixed_center`, and
        -- `sourceOrientedNormalParameterSchurTail_center`.
        -- All five shrinkings are finite-coordinate continuity estimates at
        -- the canonical normal point: the head block is the signature
        -- diagonal `sourceHeadMetric d N.r N.hrD`, the mixed block is `0`,
        -- and the residual tail data are `0`.
        exact
          BHW.sourceOriented_rankDeficient_schurNeighborhoodData_from_estimates
            (d := d) hd n N Head

      theorem BHW.sourceOriented_rankDeficient_parameter_of_schurPoint
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat)
          {G0 : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n}
          (N :
            BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientAlgebraicNormalFormData d n G0)
          (Head : BHW.SourceRankDeficientHeadGaugeData d N.r N.hrD)
          (S :
            BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientSchurNeighborhoodData
              d n N Head)
          {G : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n}
          (hG : G Ōłł S.╬®nf Ōł® BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety d n) :
          Ōłā c Ōłł S.P, S.normalParam c = G := by
        classical
        let Acoord :=
          BHW.sourceOrientedSchurHeadBlockSymm
            d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn hG.2
        have hHead : Acoord Ōłł Head.U :=
          S.head_mem G hG
        let Mhead : Matrix (Fin N.r) (Fin N.r) Ōäé :=
          Head.factor Acoord
        have hMhead_gram :
            Mhead * BHW.sourceHeadMetric d N.r N.hrD *
                Mhead.transpose =
              (BHW.sourceOrientedSchurHeadBlock n N.r N.hrn G :
                Matrix (Fin N.r) (Fin N.r) Ōäé) :=
          Head.factor_gram Acoord hHead
        have hMhead_unit : IsUnit Mhead.det :=
          Head.factor_det_unit Acoord hHead
        have htail_mem :
            BHW.sourceOrientedSchurResidualTailData
                d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn G Mhead Ōłł
              BHW.sourceShiftedTailOrientedVariety
                d N.r N.hrD (n - N.r) := by
          simpa [Acoord, Mhead] using
            BHW.sourceOrientedSchurResidualTailData_mem_variety
              (d := d) hd (n := n) (r := N.r)
              N.hrD N.hrn Head hG.2 hHead
        let R :=
          BHW.sourceOriented_schurResidualData_of_tail_mem
            d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn hG.2 Head hHead htail_mem
        have htailSmall := S.tail_small G hG
        rcases
          S.tailRealize R.tail R.tail_mem
            htailSmall.gram_bound htailSmall.det_bound with
          Ō¤©q, hq_small, hq_tailŌ¤®
        let p :
            BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientNormalParameter
              d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn :=
          { head := Mhead
            mixed := R.L
            tail := q }
        have hp_mem : S.encode p Ōłł S.P :=
          have hq_tail_gram :
              ŌłĆ u v,
                ŌĆ¢(BHW.sourceShiftedTailOrientedInvariant
                    d N.r N.hrD (n - N.r) p.tail).gram u vŌĆ¢ <
                  S.tailEta := by
            intro u v
            simpa [p, hq_tail] using htailSmall.gram_bound u v
          have hq_tail_det :
              ŌłĆ ╬╣,
                ŌĆ¢(BHW.sourceShiftedTailOrientedInvariant
                    d N.r N.hrD (n - N.r) p.tail).det ╬╣ŌĆ¢ <
                  S.tailEta := by
            intro ╬╣
            simpa [p, hq_tail] using htailSmall.det_bound ╬╣
          BHW.sourceOrientedSchurParameter_mem_parameterBox
            (d := d) hd n N Head S hG
            (p := p)
            (by rfl)
            (by
              simpa [p, BHW.sourceOrientedSchurMixedCoeffAt, R.A_eq]
                using R.L_eq)
            hq_small hq_tail_gram hq_tail_det
        refine Ō¤©S.encode p, hp_mem, ?_Ō¤®
        have hp_realizes :
            BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
              (BHW.sourceOrientedNormalParameterVector
                d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn p) = G :=
          BHW.sourceOrientedNormalParameterVector_realizes_schur
            (d := d) hd n N.r N.hrD N.hrn R
            (by simp [p, R, Mhead]) rfl hq_tail
        simpa [S.normalParam, p] using hp_realizes

      theorem BHW.sourceOriented_rankDeficient_chooseNormalParameterBall
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat)
          {G0 : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n}
          (N :
            BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientAlgebraicNormalFormData d n G0)
          (Head : BHW.SourceRankDeficientHeadGaugeData d N.r N.hrD) :
          Ōłā (m : Nat)
            (encode :
              BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientNormalParameter
                d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn ŌēāL[Ōäé] (Fin m -> Ōäé))
            (P : Set (Fin m -> Ōäé))
            (c0 : Fin m -> Ōäé)
            (hP_open : IsOpen P)
            (hP_conn : IsConnected P),
            c0 Ōłł P Ōł¦
            encode
              (BHW.sourceOrientedNormalCenterParameter
                d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn) = c0 Ōł¦
            Ōłā ╬®nf : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n),
              IsOpen ╬®nf Ōł¦
              BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n N.normalBase Ōłł ╬®nf Ōł¦
              (ŌłĆ c Ōłł P,
                BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
                  (BHW.sourceOrientedNormalParameterVector
                    d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn (encode.symm c)) Ōłł
                    ╬®nf Ōł® BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety d n) Ōł¦
              ╬®nf Ōł® BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety d n =
                (fun c =>
                  BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
                    (BHW.sourceOrientedNormalParameterVector
                      d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn (encode.symm c))) '' P := by
        classical
        let S :=
          BHW.sourceOriented_rankDeficient_schurNeighborhoodData
            (d := d) hd n N Head
        refine
          Ō¤©S.m, S.encode, S.P, S.c0, S.P_open, S.P_connected,
            S.c0_mem, S.center_encode, S.╬®nf, S.╬®nf_open,
            S.╬®nf_center, S.normalParam_mem, ?_Ō¤®
        ext G
        constructor
        ┬Ę intro hG
          rcases
            BHW.sourceOriented_rankDeficient_parameter_of_schurPoint
              (d := d) hd n N Head S hG with
            Ō¤©c, hcP, hcGŌ¤®
          exact Ō¤©c, hcP, hcG.symmŌ¤®
        ┬Ę rintro Ō¤©c, hcP, rflŌ¤®
          exact S.normalParam_mem c hcP

      -- The finite-coordinate estimate theorem
      -- `sourceOriented_rankDeficient_schurNeighborhoodData_from_estimates`
      -- has no Hall-Wightman analytic content.  Its proof is a compact list
      -- of continuity shrinkings for polynomial/rational coordinate maps at
      -- the normal point.  The head block map is polynomial and equals `1` at
      -- the center, so the preimage of `Head.U` is open.  The mixed block map
      -- is polynomial after restricting to the head-invertible neighborhood
      -- because `AŌü╗┬╣` is given by `A.adjugate / A.det`.  The residual tail
      -- Gram and determinant maps are polynomial/rational on the same
      -- head-invertible neighborhood and vanish at the normal point.
      --
      -- The tail window choice is load-bearing and must be proved before the
      -- Schur neighborhood theorem.  `tailRealize` gives the reverse
      -- inclusion for points of `╬®nf Ōł® sourceOrientedGramVariety`.  Forward
      -- containment no longer comes from a false same-radius compatible
      -- packet: it is built into the parameter set, which explicitly requires
      -- the shifted-tail invariant coordinates to lie below `tailEta`.  The
      -- `schurParam_mem` field records that a point extracted from
      -- `╬®nf Ōł® variety` by head-gauge factorization, mixed Schur
      -- coefficients, and one-way tail realization lands back in that same
      -- connected window, because the realized tail has the coordinate bound
      -- and realizes residual data already known to satisfy the `tailEta`
      -- inequalities.  The reverse image inclusion is direct because every
      -- parameter is an actual source tuple.  The forward inclusion is exactly
      -- `sourceOriented_rankDeficient_parameter_of_schurPoint`, whose proof
      -- above performs Schur extraction, head gauge factorization, tail
      -- realization, parameter-window membership, and reconstruction.

      -- Production Lean order: prove
      -- `sourceOriented_rankDeficient_chooseNormalParameterBall` before
      -- `sourceOriented_rankDeficient_normalLocalImageData`; the latter is
      -- only the bundled data form of the former.

      theorem BHW.sourceOriented_rankDeficient_algebraicParameterBall
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat)
          {G0 : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n}
          (N :
            BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientAlgebraicNormalFormData d n G0)
          {N0 : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n)}
          (hN0_open : IsOpen N0)
          (hG0N0 : G0 Ōłł N0) :
          Ōłā (m : Nat)
            (encode :
              BHW.SourceOrientedRankDeficientNormalParameter
                d n N.r N.hrD N.hrn ŌēāL[Ōäé] (Fin m -> Ōäé))
            (P : Set (Fin m -> Ōäé))
            (c0 : Fin m -> Ōäé)
            (╬®nf : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedVariety d n)),
            IsOpen P Ōł¦ IsConnected P Ōł¦ c0 Ōłł P Ōł¦
            IsOpen ╬®nf Ōł¦
            BHW.sourceOrientedVarietyUnderlyingSet d n
              (N.varietyTransport.invFun '' ╬®nf) ŌŖå
                N0 Ōł® BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety d n Ōł¦
            N.varietyTransport.invFun '' ╬®nf =
              (fun c =>
                N.originalNormalVarietyPoint (encode.symm c)) '' P Ōł¦
            ContinuousOn
              (fun c =>
                N.originalNormalVarietyPoint (encode.symm c)) P Ōł¦
            (N.originalNormalVarietyPoint (encode.symm c0)).1 = G0 Ōł¦
            (ŌłĆ c Ōłł P,
              N.originalNormalVarietyPoint (encode.symm c) Ōłł
                N.varietyTransport.invFun '' ╬®nf) := by
        classical
        let A :=
          BHW.sourceOriented_rankDeficient_normalLocalImageData
            (d := d) hd n N
        -- Use continuity of `N.varietyTransport.invFun` and the ambient-open
        -- target `N0` containing
        -- `(N.originalNormalVarietyPoint center).1 = G0` to shrink the normal
        -- subtype image neighborhood from `A` inside `N0`.  Reuse the same
        -- connected parameter ball after shrink; the equality of local images
        -- is transported by `SourceOrientedVarietyTransportEquiv.left_inv`,
        -- `right_inv`, and the checked subtype image API.
        exact
          BHW.sourceOriented_rankDeficient_transportNormalLocalImage_inside
            (d := d) hd n N A hN0_open hG0N0
      ```

      The compact-path tube theorem needed by any oriented corridor proof is
      then an assembly lemma, not new analytic content:

      ```lean
      theorem BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety_connectedRelOpenTube_around_compactPath
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat)
          {D : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n)}
          (hD_rel :
            BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety d n D)
          {╬│ : unitInterval -> BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n}
          (h╬│_cont : Continuous ╬│)
          (h╬│D : ŌłĆ t, ╬│ t Ōłł D)
          {W0 : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n)}
          (hW0_rel :
            BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety d n W0)
          (hW0_conn : IsConnected W0)
          (hW0_nonempty : W0.Nonempty)
          (hW0D : W0 ŌŖå D)
          (hstart : ╬│ (0 : unitInterval) Ōłł W0) :
          Ōłā Wtube : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n),
            BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety d n Wtube Ōł¦
            IsConnected Wtube Ōł¦
            W0 ŌŖå Wtube Ōł¦
            Wtube ŌŖå D Ōł¦
            ŌłĆ t, ╬│ t Ōłł Wtube := by
        classical
        let Gstart : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n := ╬│ (0 : unitInterval)
        let Wtube : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n) :=
          connectedComponentIn D Gstart
        have hGstartD : Gstart Ōłł D := h╬│D 0
        refine Ō¤©Wtube, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_Ō¤®
        ┬Ę exact
            BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety_connectedComponentIn_relOpen
              (d := d) hd n hD_rel hGstartD
        ┬Ę simpa [Wtube, Gstart] using
            (isConnected_connectedComponentIn_iff.mpr hGstartD)
        ┬Ę simpa [Wtube, Gstart] using
            hW0_conn.isPreconnected.subset_connectedComponentIn
              hstart hW0D
        ┬Ę intro G hG
          simpa [Wtube, Gstart] using connectedComponentIn_subset D Gstart hG
        ┬Ę intro t
          have h╬│_pre : IsPreconnected (Set.range ╬│) :=
            isPreconnected_range h╬│_cont
          have h╬│_base : Gstart Ōłł Set.range ╬│ := Ō¤©0, rflŌ¤®
          have h╬│_range_D : Set.range ╬│ ŌŖå D := by
            intro G hG
            rcases hG with Ō¤©s, rflŌ¤®
            exact h╬│D s
          have h╬│_sub : Set.range ╬│ ŌŖå connectedComponentIn D Gstart :=
            h╬│_pre.subset_connectedComponentIn h╬│_base h╬│_range_D
          simpa [Wtube, Gstart] using h╬│_sub Ō¤©t, rflŌ¤®
      ```

      The max-rank connectedness theorem used later by the oriented identity
      principle is not automatic from density.  It is a standard complex
      analytic fact applied to the oriented source variety: the exceptional
      lower-rank locus is an analytic subset of complex codimension at least
      one, hence real codimension at least two, and cannot separate a connected
      locally path-connected complex analytic space.  In this blueprint it is
      kept as a source-geometry theorem with explicit inputs:

      ```lean
      theorem BHW.sourceOrientedExceptionalRank_isAnalyticSubvariety
          (d n : Nat) :
          BHW.IsAnalyticSubvarietyIn
            (BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety d n)
            {G | BHW.SourceOrientedExceptionalRank d n G}

      theorem BHW.sourceOrientedExceptionalRank_complexCodim_ge_one
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat) :
          BHW.AnalyticCodimensionAtLeast
            (BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety d n)
            {G | BHW.SourceOrientedExceptionalRank d n G}
            1

      theorem BHW.connected_relOpen_complement_of_analytic_codim_ge_one
          {E : Type*} [TopologicalSpace E]
          {X U A : Set E}
          (hX_locPath :
            BHW.LocallyPathConnectedAnalyticSpace X)
          (hU_relOpen : BHW.IsRelOpenIn X U)
          (hU_conn : IsConnected U)
          (hA_an : BHW.IsAnalyticSubvarietyIn X A)
          (hA_codim : BHW.AnalyticCodimensionAtLeast X A 1) :
          IsConnected (U \ A)

      theorem BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety_locallyPathConnected
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat) :
          BHW.LocallyPathConnectedAnalyticSpace
            (BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety d n)

      theorem BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety_maxRank_inter_relOpen_isConnected
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat)
          (hn : d + 1 <= n)
          {U : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n)}
          (hU_rel :
            BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety d n U)
          (hU_conn : IsConnected U) :
          IsConnected
            (U Ōł® {G | BHW.SourceOrientedMaxRankAt d n G}) := by
        have hExc_eq :
            {G | BHW.SourceOrientedExceptionalRank d n G} =
              BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety d n \
                {G | BHW.SourceOrientedMaxRankAt d n G} :=
          BHW.sourceOrientedExceptionalRank_eq_not_maxRank
            (d := d) hd n hn
        have hconn_compl :
            IsConnected
              (U \ {G | BHW.SourceOrientedExceptionalRank d n G}) :=
          BHW.connected_relOpen_complement_of_analytic_codim_ge_one
            (X := BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety d n)
            (U := U)
            (A := {G | BHW.SourceOrientedExceptionalRank d n G})
            (BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety_locallyPathConnected
              (d := d) hd n)
            (BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety.to_isRelOpenIn hU_rel)
            hU_conn
            (BHW.sourceOrientedExceptionalRank_isAnalyticSubvariety
              d n)
            (BHW.sourceOrientedExceptionalRank_complexCodim_ge_one
              (d := d) hd n)
        have h_eq :
            U Ōł® {G | BHW.SourceOrientedMaxRankAt d n G} =
              U \ {G | BHW.SourceOrientedExceptionalRank d n G} :=
          BHW.sourceOrientedRelOpen_inter_maxRank_eq_diff_exceptional
            (d := d) hd n hn hU_rel
        simpa [h_eq]
          using hconn_compl
      ```

      The codimension theorem is proved from the determinant/minor equations
      defining the lower-rank locus: at a max-rank point at least one oriented
      full-frame determinant or maximal Gram minor is nonzero, so the
      exceptional set is cut out locally by the vanishing of that nonzero
      coordinate/minor.  The local path-connected analytic-space theorem is
      exactly what `sourceOrientedGramVariety_local_connectedRelOpen_basis`
      supplies; in Lean it may be a wrapper around that basis theorem, but it
      must expose the genuine local connected chart content and not simply
      assert path-connectedness globally.  The abstract complement theorem is
      ordinary finite-dimensional SCV/topology and can live in an `SCV` support
      file; it has no OS, EOW, PET, or Wightman content.

      ```lean
      theorem BHW.SourceOrientedVarietyGermHolomorphicOn.precomp_sourcePermuteOrientedGram
          {╬” : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n -> Ōäé}
          {U : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n)}
          (h╬” :
            BHW.SourceOrientedVarietyGermHolomorphicOn d n ╬” U)
          (Žā : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) :
          BHW.SourceOrientedVarietyGermHolomorphicOn d n
            (fun G => ╬” (BHW.sourcePermuteOrientedGram d n Žā G))
            {G | BHW.sourcePermuteOrientedGram d n Žā G Ōłł U} := by
        intro G hG
        rcases h╬” (BHW.sourcePermuteOrientedGram d n Žā G) hG with
          Ō¤©U0, ╬©, hU0_open, hGU0, hDiffU0, hEq, hU0_subŌ¤®
        refine
          Ō¤©{H | BHW.sourcePermuteOrientedGram d n Žā H Ōłł U0},
            fun H => ╬© (BHW.sourcePermuteOrientedGram d n Žā H),
            hU0_open.preimage
              (BHW.continuous_sourcePermuteOrientedGram
                (d := d) (n := n) Žā),
            hGU0, ?_, ?_, ?_Ō¤®
        ┬Ę exact hDiffU0.fun_comp
            ((BHW.differentiable_sourcePermuteOrientedGram
              (d := d) (n := n) Žā).differentiableOn)
            (by intro H hH; exact hH)
        ┬Ę intro H hH
          exact hEq Ō¤©hH.1,
            (BHW.sourcePermuteOrientedGram_mem_variety_iff
              (d := d) (n := n) Žā H).2 hH.2Ō¤®
        ┬Ę intro H hH
          exact hU0_sub Ō¤©hH.1,
            (BHW.sourcePermuteOrientedGram_mem_variety_iff
              (d := d) (n := n) Žā H).2 hH.2Ō¤®

      theorem BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety_identity_principle
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat)
          {U W : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n)}
          {H : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n -> Ōäé}
          (hU_relOpen :
            BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety d n U)
          (hU_conn : IsConnected U)
          (hW_relOpen :
            BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety d n W)
          (hW_ne : W.Nonempty)
          (hW_sub : W ŌŖå U)
          (hH :
            BHW.SourceOrientedVarietyGermHolomorphicOn d n H U)
          (hW_zero : Set.EqOn H 0 W) :
          Set.EqOn H 0 U
      ```

      This is the oriented analog of the checked pure-Gram theorem
      `BHW.sourceComplexGramVariety_identity_principle`.  Its proof is not
      allowed to project to `sourceMinkowskiGram`; it must use the regular
      stratum of the oriented variety and the same normal/removable
      analytic-space support as the oriented scalar representative.

      Implementation-level proof split for the oriented identity principle:

      ```lean
      theorem BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety_identity_principle_smallArity
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat)
          (hn : n < d + 1)
          {U W : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n)}
          {H : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n -> Ōäé}
          (hU_relOpen :
            BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety d n U)
          (hU_conn : IsConnected U)
          (hW_relOpen :
            BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety d n W)
          (hW_ne : W.Nonempty)
          (hW_sub : W ŌŖå U)
          (hH :
            BHW.SourceOrientedVarietyGermHolomorphicOn d n H U)
          (hW_zero : Set.EqOn H 0 W) :
          Set.EqOn H 0 U

      theorem BHW.SourceOrientedVarietyGermHolomorphicOn.to_maxRank_chart
          {M : Type*}
          [NormedAddCommGroup M] [NormedSpace Ōäé M]
          {G0 : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n}
          {╬” : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n -> Ōäé}
          {U ╬® : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n)}
          (h╬” :
            BHW.SourceOrientedVarietyGermHolomorphicOn d n ╬” U)
          (C : BHW.SourceOrientedMaxRankChartData d n (M := M) G0)
          (h╬®_rel :
            BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety d n ╬®)
          (h╬®_sub : ╬® ŌŖå U)
          (h╬®_sub_chart : ╬® ŌŖå C.╬®) :
          Ōłā Žåc : M -> Ōäé,
            DifferentiableOn Ōäé Žåc (C.chart '' ╬®) Ōł¦
            ŌłĆ G Ōłł ╬®, Žåc (C.chart G) = ╬” G := by
        let Žåc : M -> Ōäé :=
          fun y => ╬” (C.chart_biholomorphic.inv y)
        refine Ō¤©Žåc, ?_, ?_Ō¤®
        ┬Ę exact
            BHW.LocalBiholomorphOnSourceOrientedVariety.germ_to_chart
              (d := d) (n := n)
              (╬® := ╬®) (╬®0 := C.╬®) (U := U)
              (chart := C.chart) (╬” := ╬”)
              C.chart_biholomorphic h╬” h╬®_rel h╬®_sub h╬®_sub_chart
        ┬Ę intro G hG╬®
          simp [Žåc, C.chart_biholomorphic.left_inv_on G
            (h╬®_sub_chart hG╬®)]

      theorem BHW.SourceOrientedMaxRankChartData.shrink_to_relOpen
          {M : Type*}
          [NormedAddCommGroup M] [NormedSpace Ōäé M]
          {U : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n)}
          {G0 : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n}
          (C : BHW.SourceOrientedMaxRankChartData d n (M := M) G0)
          (hU_rel :
            BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety d n U)
          (hG0U : G0 Ōłł U) :
          Ōłā ╬® : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n),
            G0 Ōłł ╬® Ōł¦
            BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety d n ╬® Ōł¦
            ╬® ŌŖå U Ōł® {G | BHW.SourceOrientedMaxRankAt d n G} Ōł¦
            ╬® ŌŖå C.╬® Ōł¦
            IsOpen (C.chart '' ╬®) Ōł¦
            IsConnected (C.chart '' ╬®)

      theorem BHW.LocalBiholomorphOnSourceOrientedVariety.image_relOpenIn_chart
          (d n : Nat)
          {M : Type*}
          [NormedAddCommGroup M] [NormedSpace Ōäé M]
          {╬® ╬®0 S : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n)}
          {chart : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n -> M}
          (hchart :
            BHW.LocalBiholomorphOnSourceOrientedVariety d n ╬®0 chart)
          (h╬®_sub : ╬® ŌŖå ╬®0)
          (hS_rel :
            Ōłā O, IsOpen O Ōł¦ S = O Ōł® ╬®) :
          Ōłā Ochart : Set M,
            IsOpen Ochart Ōł¦ chart '' S = Ochart Ōł® chart '' ╬®

      theorem SCV.identity_theorem_connected_open_zero
          {m : Nat}
          {╬® R : Set (Fin m -> Ōäé)}
          {Žå : (Fin m -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé}
          (h╬®_open : IsOpen ╬®)
          (h╬®_conn : IsConnected ╬®)
          (hŽå : DifferentiableOn Ōäé Žå ╬®)
          (hR_relOpen : Ōłā O, IsOpen O Ōł¦ R = O Ōł® ╬®)
          (hR_ne : R.Nonempty)
          (hzero : Set.EqOn Žå 0 R) :
          Set.EqOn Žå 0 ╬®

      theorem BHW.SourceOrientedMaxRankChartData.local_identity_near_point
          {m : Nat}
          {G0 : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n}
          (C :
            BHW.SourceOrientedMaxRankChartData d n
              (M := Fin m -> Ōäé) G0)
          {U A : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n)}
          {H : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n -> Ōäé}
          (hU_relOpen :
            BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety d n U)
          (hH :
            BHW.SourceOrientedVarietyGermHolomorphicOn d n H U)
          (hG0U : G0 Ōłł U)
          (hA_rel :
            Ōłā A0, IsOpen A0 Ōł¦
              A = A0 Ōł®
                (U Ōł® {G | BHW.SourceOrientedMaxRankAt d n G}))
          (hG0cl : G0 Ōłł closure A)
          (hA_zero : Set.EqOn H 0 A) :
          Ōłā V : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n),
            G0 Ōłł V Ōł¦
            BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety d n V Ōł¦
            V ŌŖå U Ōł® {G | BHW.SourceOrientedMaxRankAt d n G} Ōł¦
            Set.EqOn H 0 V := by
        obtain Ō¤©╬®, hG0╬®, h╬®_rel, h╬®_sub_Umax, h╬®_sub_C,
          h╬®_chart_open, h╬®_chart_connŌ¤® :=
          C.shrink_to_relOpen hU_relOpen hG0U
        obtain Ō¤©Žåc, hŽåc_holo, hŽåc_eqŌ¤® :=
          BHW.SourceOrientedVarietyGermHolomorphicOn.to_maxRank_chart
            (d := d) (n := n) hH C h╬®_rel
            (by intro G hG╬®; exact (h╬®_sub_Umax hG╬®).1)
            h╬®_sub_C
        rcases hA_rel with Ō¤©A0, hA0_open, hA_eqŌ¤®
        rcases h╬®_rel with Ō¤©╬®0, h╬®0_open, h╬®_eqŌ¤®
        have hG0╬®0 : G0 Ōłł ╬®0 := by
          rw [h╬®_eq] at hG0╬®
          exact hG0╬®.1
        have hA_meets_╬® : (A Ōł® ╬®).Nonempty := by
          rw [mem_closure_iff] at hG0cl
          rcases hG0cl ╬®0 h╬®0_open hG0╬®0 with Ō¤©G, hG╬®0, hGAŌ¤®
          have hGvar : G Ōłł BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety d n := by
            rw [hA_eq] at hGA
            exact
              BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety.subset
                hU_relOpen hGA.2.1
          have hG╬® : G Ōłł ╬® := by
            rw [h╬®_eq]
            exact Ō¤©hG╬®0, hGvarŌ¤®
          exact Ō¤©G, hGA, hG╬®Ō¤®
        let Rchart : Set (Fin m -> Ōäé) := C.chart '' (A Ōł® ╬®)
        have hRchart_ne : Rchart.Nonempty := by
          rcases hA_meets_╬® with Ō¤©G, hGA, hG╬®Ō¤®
          exact Ō¤©C.chart G, G, Ō¤©hGA, hG╬®Ō¤®, rflŌ¤®
        have hA╬®_rel_in_╬® :
            Ōłā O, IsOpen O Ōł¦ A Ōł® ╬® = O Ōł® ╬® := by
          refine Ō¤©A0 Ōł® ╬®0, hA0_open.inter h╬®0_open, ?_Ō¤®
          ext G
          constructor
          ┬Ę intro hG
            have hGA0 : G Ōłł A0 := by
              rw [hA_eq] at hG
              exact hG.1.1
            have hG╬®0 : G Ōłł ╬®0 := by
              rw [h╬®_eq] at hG
              exact hG.2.1
            exact Ō¤©Ō¤©hGA0, hG╬®0Ō¤®, hG.2Ō¤®
          ┬Ę intro hG
            have hGA : G Ōłł A := by
              rw [hA_eq]
              exact Ō¤©hG.1.1, h╬®_sub_Umax hG.2Ō¤®
            exact Ō¤©hGA, hG.2Ō¤®
        have hRchart_rel :
            Ōłā Ochart, IsOpen Ochart Ōł¦
              Rchart = Ochart Ōł® C.chart '' ╬® := by
          simpa [Rchart] using
            BHW.LocalBiholomorphOnSourceOrientedVariety.image_relOpenIn_chart
              (d := d) (n := n)
              C.chart_biholomorphic h╬®_sub_C hA╬®_rel_in_╬®
        have hŽåc_zero_R :
            Set.EqOn Žåc 0 Rchart := by
          rintro y Ō¤©G, hGA╬®, rflŌ¤®
          calc
            Žåc (C.chart G) = H G := hŽåc_eq G hGA╬®.2
            _ = 0 := hA_zero hGA╬®.1
        have hŽåc_zero_chart :
            Set.EqOn Žåc 0 (C.chart '' ╬®) :=
          SCV.identity_theorem_connected_open_zero
            h╬®_chart_open h╬®_chart_conn hŽåc_holo
            hRchart_rel hRchart_ne hŽåc_zero_R
        refine Ō¤©╬®, hG0╬®, h╬®_rel, h╬®_sub_Umax, ?_Ō¤®
        intro G hG╬®
        have hchart_zero := hŽåc_zero_chart Ō¤©G, hG╬®, rflŌ¤®
        exact (hŽåc_eq G hG╬®).symm.trans hchart_zero

      theorem BHW.sourceOrientedRelOpen_inter_maxRank_nonempty
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat)
          (hn : d + 1 <= n)
          {W : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n)}
          (hW_rel :
            BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety d n W)
          (hW_ne : W.Nonempty) :
          (W Ōł® {G | BHW.SourceOrientedMaxRankAt d n G}).Nonempty := by
        rcases hW_ne with Ō¤©G0, hG0WŌ¤®
        have hG0cl :
            G0 Ōłł closure
              (W Ōł® {G | BHW.SourceOrientedMaxRankAt d n G}) :=
          BHW.sourceOrientedMaxRank_dense_in_relOpen_inter
            (d := d) hd n hn hW_rel hG0W
        by_contra hEmpty
        have hSet_empty :
            W Ōł® {G | BHW.SourceOrientedMaxRankAt d n G} = Ōłģ :=
          Set.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp hEmpty
        simpa [hSet_empty] using hG0cl

      theorem BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety_maxRank_identity_principle_of_connected_fullFrame
          {d n : Nat}
          (hn : d + 1 <= n)
          {U W : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n)}
          {H : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n -> Ōäé}
          (hU_relOpen :
            BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety d n U)
          (hUmax_conn :
            IsConnected
              (U Ōł® {G | BHW.SourceOrientedMaxRankAt d n G}))
          (hW_relOpen :
            BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety d n W)
          (hW_ne : W.Nonempty)
          (hW_sub : W ŌŖå U)
          (hW_sub_max :
            W ŌŖå {G | BHW.SourceOrientedMaxRankAt d n G})
          (hH :
            BHW.SourceOrientedVarietyGermHolomorphicOn d n H U)
          (hW_zero : Set.EqOn H 0 W) :
          Set.EqOn H 0
            (U Ōł® {G | BHW.SourceOrientedMaxRankAt d n G}) := by
        let R : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n) :=
          {G | BHW.SourceOrientedMaxRankAt d n G}
        let Ureg : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n) := U Ōł® R
        let A0 : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n) :=
          {G | Ōłā O : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n),
            IsOpen O Ōł¦ G Ōłł O Ōł¦ Set.EqOn H 0 (O Ōł® Ureg)}
        let A : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n) := A0 Ōł® Ureg
        have hA0_open : IsOpen A0 := by
          rw [isOpen_iff_forall_mem_open]
          intro G hGA0
          rcases hGA0 with Ō¤©O, hO_open, hGO, hO_zeroŌ¤®
          refine Ō¤©O, ?_, hO_open, hGOŌ¤®
          intro Y hYO
          exact Ō¤©O, hO_open, hYO, hO_zeroŌ¤®
        have hA_rel :
            Ōłā A0', IsOpen A0' Ōł¦ A = A0' Ōł® Ureg := by
          exact Ō¤©A0, hA0_open, rflŌ¤®
        have hA_zero : Set.EqOn H 0 A := by
          intro G hGA
          rcases hGA.1 with Ō¤©O, _hO_open, hGO, hO_zeroŌ¤®
          exact hO_zero Ō¤©hGO, hGA.2Ō¤®
        have hA_nonempty : A.Nonempty := by
          rcases hW_ne with Ō¤©G, hGWŌ¤®
          have hGU : G Ōłł U := hW_sub hGW
          have hGmax : BHW.SourceOrientedMaxRankAt d n G :=
            hW_sub_max hGW
          refine Ō¤©G, ?_Ō¤®
          refine Ō¤©?_, Ō¤©hGU, by simpa [R] using hGmaxŌ¤®Ō¤®
          rcases hW_relOpen with Ō¤©W0, hW0_open, hW_eqŌ¤®
          have hGW0 : G Ōłł W0 := by
            rw [hW_eq] at hGW
            exact hGW.1
          refine Ō¤©W0, hW0_open, hGW0, ?_Ō¤®
          intro Y hY
          have hYvar :
              Y Ōłł BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety d n :=
            BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety.subset
              hU_relOpen hY.2.1
          have hYW : Y Ōłł W := by
            rw [hW_eq]
            exact Ō¤©hY.1, hYvarŌ¤®
          exact hW_zero hYW
        let Asub : Set Ureg := {x | (x :
          BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n) Ōłł A}
        have hAsub_open : IsOpen Asub := by
          have hpre : Asub = Subtype.val Ōü╗┬╣' A0 := by
            ext x
            simp [Asub, A]
          rw [hpre]
          exact hA0_open.preimage continuous_subtype_val
        have hAsub_nonempty : Asub.Nonempty := by
          rcases hA_nonempty with Ō¤©G, hGAŌ¤®
          exact Ō¤©Ō¤©G, hGA.2Ō¤®, hGAŌ¤®
        have hAsub_compl_open : IsOpen (AsubßČ£) := by
          rw [isOpen_iff_forall_mem_open]
          intro x hx_not
          have hx_not_A : (x :
              BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n) Ōłē A := by
            simpa [Asub] using hx_not
          have hx_not_closure : (x :
              BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n) Ōłē closure A := by
            intro hx_closure
            rcases
              BHW.sourceOrientedMaxRankChartData_of_maxRankAt_fullFrame
                (d := d) (n := n) hn
                (BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety.subset
                  hU_relOpen x.property.1)
                (by simpa [Ureg, R] using x.property.2) with
              Ō¤©m, CŌ¤®
            rcases
              C.local_identity_near_point
                hU_relOpen hH x.property.1 hA_rel hx_closure hA_zero with
              Ō¤©V, hxV, hV_rel, hV_sub, hV_zeroŌ¤®
            rcases hV_rel with Ō¤©V0, hV0_open, hV_eqŌ¤®
            have hxV0 : (x :
                BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n) Ōłł V0 := by
              rw [hV_eq] at hxV
              exact hxV.1
            have hxA0 : (x :
                BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n) Ōłł A0 := by
              refine Ō¤©V0, hV0_open, hxV0, ?_Ō¤®
              intro Y hY
              exact hV_zero (by simpa [hV_eq, Ureg, R] using hY)
            exact hx_not_A Ō¤©hxA0, x.propertyŌ¤®
          let Nsub : Set Ureg := Subtype.val Ōü╗┬╣' ((closure A)ßČ£)
          refine Ō¤©Nsub, ?_, ?_, ?_Ō¤®
          ┬Ę intro y hyN hyA
            have hyA_ambient : (y :
                BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n) Ōłł A := by
              simpa [Asub] using hyA
            exact hyN (subset_closure hyA_ambient)
          ┬Ę exact isClosed_closure.isOpen_compl.preimage
              continuous_subtype_val
          ┬Ę exact hx_not_closure
        have hAsub_clopen : IsClopen Asub :=
          Ō¤©Ō¤©hAsub_compl_openŌ¤®, hAsub_openŌ¤®
        haveI : ConnectedSpace Ureg :=
          isConnected_iff_connectedSpace.mp hUmax_conn
        have hAsub_univ : Asub = Set.univ :=
          IsClopen.eq_univ hAsub_clopen hAsub_nonempty
        intro G hGUreg
        have hGA : G Ōłł A := by
          have hx : (Ō¤©G, by simpa [Ureg, R] using hGUregŌ¤® :
              Ureg) Ōłł Asub := by
            rw [hAsub_univ]
            trivial
          simpa [Asub] using hx
        exact hA_zero hGA

      theorem BHW.continuousOn_eqOn_zero_of_subset_closure
          {E : Type*} [TopologicalSpace E]
          {f : E -> Ōäé}
          {U S : Set E}
          (hf : ContinuousOn f U)
          (hS_sub : S ŌŖå U)
          (hdense : U ŌŖå closure S)
          (hzero : Set.EqOn f 0 S) :
          Set.EqOn f 0 U := by
        intro x hxU
        by_contra hx_ne
        have hx_cl : x Ōłł closure S := hdense hxU
        rcases (continuousOn_iff.mp hf) x hxU
            {w : Ōäé | w ŌēĀ 0} isOpen_ne hx_ne with
          Ō¤©O, hO_open, hxO, hO_subŌ¤®
        rw [mem_closure_iff] at hx_cl
        rcases hx_cl O hO_open hxO with Ō¤©y, hyO, hySŌ¤®
        have hyU : y Ōłł U := hS_sub hyS
        have hf_ne_y : f y ŌēĀ 0 := hO_sub Ō¤©hyO, hyUŌ¤®
        exact hf_ne_y (hzero hyS)

      theorem BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety_relOpen_eqOn_zero_of_eqOn_maxRank
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat)
          (hn : d + 1 <= n)
          {U : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n)}
          {H : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n -> Ōäé}
          (hU_relOpen :
            BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety d n U)
          (hH_cont : ContinuousOn H U)
          (hzero :
            Set.EqOn H 0
              (U Ōł® {G | BHW.SourceOrientedMaxRankAt d n G})) :
          Set.EqOn H 0 U := by
        exact
          BHW.continuousOn_eqOn_zero_of_subset_closure
            (f := H)
            (U := U)
            (S := U Ōł® {G | BHW.SourceOrientedMaxRankAt d n G})
            hH_cont
            (by intro G hG; exact hG.1)
            (BHW.sourceOrientedMaxRank_dense_in_relOpen_inter
              (d := d) hd n hn hU_relOpen)
            hzero

      theorem BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety_identity_principle_of_connected_maxRank
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat)
          (hn : d + 1 <= n)
          {U W : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n)}
          {H : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n -> Ōäé}
          (hU_relOpen :
            BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety d n U)
          (hUmax_conn :
            IsConnected
              (U Ōł® {G | BHW.SourceOrientedMaxRankAt d n G}))
          (hW_relOpen :
            BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety d n W)
          (hW_ne : W.Nonempty)
          (hW_sub : W ŌŖå U)
          (hH :
            BHW.SourceOrientedVarietyGermHolomorphicOn d n H U)
          (hW_zero : Set.EqOn H 0 W) :
          Set.EqOn H 0 U := by
        have hzero_max :
            Set.EqOn H 0
              (U Ōł® {G | BHW.SourceOrientedMaxRankAt d n G}) :=
          by
            let Wmax : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n) :=
              W Ōł® {G | BHW.SourceOrientedMaxRankAt d n G}
            have hWmax_rel :
                BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety d n Wmax :=
              BHW.sourceOrientedRelOpen_inter_maxRank_relOpen
                (d := d) (n := n) hW_relOpen
            have hWmax_ne : Wmax.Nonempty :=
              BHW.sourceOrientedRelOpen_inter_maxRank_nonempty
                (d := d) hd n hn hW_relOpen hW_ne
            exact
              BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety_maxRank_identity_principle_of_connected_fullFrame
                (d := d) (n := n) hn hU_relOpen hUmax_conn
                hWmax_rel hWmax_ne
                (by intro G hG; exact hW_sub hG.1)
                (by intro G hG; exact hG.2)
                hH
                (by intro G hG; exact hW_zero hG.1)
        exact
          BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety_relOpen_eqOn_zero_of_eqOn_maxRank
            (d := d) hd n hn hU_relOpen
            (BHW.SourceOrientedVarietyGermHolomorphicOn.continuousOn
              (d := d) (n := n) hH
              (BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety.subset hU_relOpen))
            hzero_max

      theorem BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety_identity_principle ... := by
        by_cases hn : n < d + 1
        ┬Ę exact
            BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety_identity_principle_smallArity
              (d := d) hd n hn hU_relOpen hU_conn hW_relOpen
              hW_ne hW_sub hH hW_zero
        ┬Ę have hmax_conn :
              IsConnected
                (U Ōł® {G | BHW.SourceOrientedMaxRankAt d n G}) :=
            BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety_maxRank_inter_relOpen_isConnected
              (d := d) hd n (Nat.le_of_not_lt hn) hU_relOpen hU_conn
          exact
            BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety_identity_principle_of_connected_maxRank
              (d := d) hd n (Nat.le_of_not_lt hn)
              hU_relOpen hmax_conn
              hW_relOpen hW_ne hW_sub hH hW_zero
      ```

      In the small-arity branch `n < d + 1`, there are no embeddings
      `Fin (d + 1) Ōå¬ Fin n`, so the determinant coordinate family is empty.
