      The oriented coordinate type is equivalent to the ordinary source Gram
      coordinate type, the oriented variety is transported from
      `sourceComplexGramVariety`, and the proof is the checked
      `BHW.sourceComplexGramVariety_identity_principle` under that equivalence.
      This is a real theorem, not a definitional `rfl`, because the Lean type
      is a product whose second coordinate is a Pi over an empty index type.

      In the `d + 1 <= n` branch, the proof must first propagate zero on the
      maximal oriented-rank stratum.  The checked theorem
      `sourceOrientedGramVariety_maxRank_identity_principle_of_connected`
      follows the pure-Gram clopen pattern, and the hard-range specialization
      `sourceOrientedGramVariety_maxRank_identity_principle_of_connected_fullFrame`
      supplies the finite-coordinate charts from the full-frame max-rank
      producer.  It defines `Ureg := U Ōł® MaxRank` and lets `A0` be the union of
      ambient open sets on which `H` vanishes over `Ureg`.  In the checked
      BHW/Jost seed form, nonemptiness of `A := A0 Ōł® Ureg` comes from the
      explicit hypothesis `W ŌŖå MaxRank` (for closed loops this is exactly
      `S.seed_sub`'s second projection), rather than from a separate density
      theorem.  Relative closedness is the only analytic step: the checked
      local theorem `SourceOrientedMaxRankChartData.local_identity_near_point`
      uses a finite-coordinate complex max-rank chart, converts
      `SourceOrientedVarietyGermHolomorphicOn` to an ordinary holomorphic
      coordinate representative by `to_maxRank_chart`, applies the ordinary
      finite-dimensional identity theorem in that chart, and pushes the
      resulting zero neighborhood back to the oriented variety.  The checked
      equality form
      `sourceOrientedGramVariety_maxRank_eqOn_of_connected_fullFrame` is the
      surface used by closed-loop branch propagation.  Since `A` is nonempty,
      open, and closed in the connected subtype `Ureg`, it is all of `Ureg`.

      The final extension from max rank to all of `U` is purely topological:
      use the density theorem
      `sourceOrientedMaxRank_dense_in_relOpen_inter` to get
      `G Ōłł closure (U Ōł® {G | SourceOrientedMaxRankAt d n G})` for every
      `G Ōłł U`; use
      `SourceOrientedVarietyGermHolomorphicOn.continuousOn` to make
      `{G | H G ŌēĀ 0}` relatively open in `U`; if `H G ŌēĀ 0`, this open
      neighborhood meets the dense max-rank set at a point where `H = 0`, a
      contradiction.  This is the same closure argument as the checked
      pure-Gram theorem
      `sourceComplexGramVariety_relOpen_eqOn_zero_of_eqOn_rankExact`, but with
      `SourceOrientedMaxRankAt` and the oriented dense-stratum theorem.

      Thus the oriented identity principle is no longer an unspecified
      analytic black box.  Its remaining unimplemented lower producers are
      `sourceOrientedGramVariety_maxRank_inter_relOpen_isConnected`,
      `sourceOrientedMaxRankChart_at` plus
      `SourceOrientedMaxRankChartData.local_identity_near_point`, and
      `sourceOrientedMaxRank_dense_in_relOpen_inter`, all of which are
      source-geometry/SCV obligations already tied to the oriented
      local-realization and normality ledger below.

      The three local helpers used inside
      `SourceOrientedMaxRankChartData.local_identity_near_point` have standard
      implementation routes.  `SourceOrientedMaxRankChartData.shrink_to_relOpen`
      takes the relative-open witnesses for `U` and for the chart domain
      `C.╬®`, chooses a small connected complex ball in `C.chart '' C.╬®` around
      `C.chart G0` whose inverse image stays inside `U`, and defines `╬®` as
      the inverse-image slice; `C.╬®_maxRank` supplies `╬® ŌŖå MaxRank`.
      `LocalBiholomorphOnSourceOrientedVariety.image_relOpenIn_chart` is the
      homeomorphism-on-domain calculation using `left_inv_on`, `right_inv_on`,
      `inv_continuousOn`, and the restricted inverse membership theorem.
      `SCV.identity_theorem_connected_open_zero` is ordinary SCV: a
      holomorphic function on a connected open set that vanishes on a nonempty
      relatively open subset vanishes everywhere, proved by applying the usual
      connected identity theorem to the clopen union of local zero
      neighborhoods.

      The helper `differentiableOn_of_local_agreement` is only a calculus
      localization lemma.  Its Lean proof should unfold `DifferentiableOn` to
      `DifferentiableWithinAt`; at `y Ōłł V`, choose the open neighborhood
      `O` and local function `Žå`, use `hO.mem_nhds hyO` to identify the
      within-filter of `V` at `y` with the within-filter of `O Ōł® V`, apply
      the supplied differentiability of `Žå` on `O Ōł® V`, and transfer the
      derivative back to `f` by the eventual equality from
      `Set.EqOn f Žå (O Ōł® V)`.  It contains no source geometry and should live
      in SCV/topology support, not in the theorem-2 file.

      The real uniqueness input also changes.  The old
      `SourceDistributionalAdjacentTubeAnchor.gramEnvironment` is a set of
      real Gram matrices and has forgotten all full-frame determinant signs.
      It is therefore unusable as an oriented uniqueness anchor.  The oriented
      route needs two separate real-patch objects: a raw compact anchor that
      remembers the real patches and compact distributional equality, and a
      later shrunken seed patch whose uniqueness predicate is stated after
      composing the real patch with `sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant`:

      ```lean
      def BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant
          (d n : Nat)
          (x : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ) :
          BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n :=
        BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n (BHW.realEmbed x)

      def BHW.sourceOrientedDistributionalUniquenessPatch
          (d n : Nat)
          (E : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ)) : Prop :=
        E.Nonempty Ōł¦
          ŌłĆ (U : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n))
            (╬” ╬© : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n -> Ōäé),
            BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety d n U ->
            IsConnected U ->
            (ŌłĆ x Ōłł E,
              BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n x Ōłł U) ->
            BHW.SourceOrientedVarietyGermHolomorphicOn d n ╬” U ->
            BHW.SourceOrientedVarietyGermHolomorphicOn d n ╬© U ->
            (ŌłĆ x Ōłł E,
              ╬” (BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n x) =
                ╬© (BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n x)) ->
            Set.EqOn ╬” ╬© U

      structure BHW.SourceOrientedLocalRealChartData
          (d n : Nat)
          (x0 : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ) where
        m : Nat
        C :
          BHW.SourceOrientedMaxRankChartData d n
            (M := Fin m -> Ōäé)
            (BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n x0)
        E0 : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ)
        E0_open : IsOpen E0
        center_mem : x0 Ōłł E0
        invariant_mem_chart :
          ŌłĆ x Ōłł E0,
            BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n x Ōłł C.╬®
        realCoord :
          (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ) -> (Fin m -> ŌäØ)
        realCoord_continuousOn : ContinuousOn realCoord E0
        realCoord_image_open :
          ŌłĆ {S : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ)},
            IsOpen S -> S ŌŖå E0 -> IsOpen (realCoord '' S)
        chart_real_eq :
          ŌłĆ x Ōłł E0,
            C.chart (BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n x) =
              SCV.realToComplex (realCoord x)

      structure BHW.IsHWOrientedRealEnvironment
          (d n : Nat)
          (E : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ)) : Prop where
        nonempty : E.Nonempty
        open_real : IsOpen E
        realized_by_jost : E ŌŖå BHW.JostSet d n
        local_real_chart :
          ŌłĆ x Ōłł E,
            Nonempty (BHW.SourceOrientedLocalRealChartData d n x)

      /-- Canonical Figure-2-4 source patch used by the adjacent `S'_n`
      packet.  The definition is a union over proofs of the active dimension
      hypothesis, so it has no arbitrary fallback outside the theorem-2
      dimension range.  Under a supplied `hd : 2 <= d`, proof irrelevance
      identifies it with the deterministic source patch exported by
      `os45_adjacent_identity_canonicalSourcePatch`. -/
      noncomputable def BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch
          [NeZero d]
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n) :
          Set (NPointDomain d n) :=
        Ōŗā hd : 2 <= d,
          (BHW.os45_adjacent_identity_canonicalSourcePatch
            (d := d) hd i hi).V

      theorem BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch_eq_canonical
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n) :
          BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch (d := d) n i hi =
            (BHW.os45_adjacent_identity_canonicalSourcePatch
              (d := d) hd i hi).V := by
        classical
        ext x
        constructor
        ┬Ę intro hx
          rcases Set.mem_iUnion.mp hx with Ō¤©hd', hx'Ō¤®
          simpa [Subsingleton.elim hd' hd] using hx'
        ┬Ę intro hx
          exact Set.mem_iUnion.mpr Ō¤©hd, hxŌ¤®

      theorem BHW.isOpen_os45Figure24SourcePatch
          [NeZero d]
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n) :
          IsOpen (BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch (d := d) n i hi) := by
        classical
        rw [BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch]
        exact isOpen_iUnion fun hd =>
          (BHW.os45_adjacent_identity_canonicalSourcePatch
            (d := d) hd i hi).V_open

      theorem BHW.nonempty_os45Figure24SourcePatch
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n) :
          (BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch (d := d) n i hi).Nonempty := by
        classical
        rw [BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch_eq_canonical
          (d := d) hd n i hi]
        exact
          (BHW.os45_adjacent_identity_canonicalSourcePatch
            (d := d) hd i hi).V_nonempty

      theorem BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch_jost
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n) :
          BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch (d := d) n i hi ŌŖå
            BHW.JostSet d n := by
        classical
        rw [BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch_eq_canonical
          (d := d) hd n i hi]
        exact
          (BHW.os45_adjacent_identity_canonicalSourcePatch
            (d := d) hd i hi).V_jost

      theorem BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch_realEmbed_mem_extendedTube
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n) :
          ŌłĆ x Ōłł BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch (d := d) n i hi,
            BHW.realEmbed x Ōłł BHW.ExtendedTube d n := by
        classical
        rw [BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch_eq_canonical
          (d := d) hd n i hi]
        exact
          (BHW.os45_adjacent_identity_canonicalSourcePatch
            (d := d) hd i hi).V_ET

      theorem BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch_swapRealEmbed_mem_extendedTube
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n) :
          ŌłĆ x Ōłł BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch (d := d) n i hi,
            BHW.realEmbed
              (fun k => x (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤® k)) Ōłł
            BHW.ExtendedTube d n := by
        classical
        rw [BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch_eq_canonical
          (d := d) hd n i hi]
        exact
          (BHW.os45_adjacent_identity_canonicalSourcePatch
            (d := d) hd i hi).V_swapET

      theorem BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch_ordered
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n) :
          ŌłĆ x Ōłł BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch (d := d) n i hi,
            x Ōłł EuclideanOrderedPositiveTimeSector
              (d := d) (n := n) (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) := by
        classical
        rw [BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch_eq_canonical
          (d := d) hd n i hi]
        exact
          (BHW.os45_adjacent_identity_canonicalSourcePatch
            (d := d) hd i hi).V_ordered

      theorem BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch_swap_ordered
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n) :
          ŌłĆ x Ōłł BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch (d := d) n i hi,
            (fun k => x (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤® k)) Ōłł
            EuclideanOrderedPositiveTimeSector
              (d := d) (n := n) (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®) := by
        classical
        rw [BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch_eq_canonical
          (d := d) hd n i hi]
        simpa using
          (BHW.os45_adjacent_identity_canonicalSourcePatch
            (d := d) hd i hi).V_swap_ordered

      theorem BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch_wick_mem_extendedTube
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n) :
          ŌłĆ x Ōłł BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch (d := d) n i hi,
            (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x k)) Ōłł BHW.ExtendedTube d n

      theorem BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch_permAct_realEmbed_mem_extendedTube
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n) :
          ŌłĆ x Ōłł BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch (d := d) n i hi,
            BHW.permAct (d := d) (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®)
              (BHW.realEmbed x) Ōłł BHW.ExtendedTube d n

      -- No corresponding
      -- `os45Figure24SourcePatch_permAct_wick_mem_extendedTube` is claimed:
      -- the swapped ordered-sector field is not that statement.

      theorem BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch_adjLift_mem_extendedTube
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n) :
          let Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n) := Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®
          ŌłĆ x Ōłł BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch (d := d) n i hi,
            ŌłĆ t,
              BHW.os45Figure24AdjacentLift
                (d := d) (n := n) hd Žä x t Ōłł
              BHW.ExtendedTube d n := by
        classical
        dsimp
        rw [BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch_eq_canonical
          (d := d) hd n i hi]
        exact
          (BHW.os45_adjacent_identity_canonicalSourcePatch
            (d := d) hd i hi).adjLift_mem_extendedTube

      theorem BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch_closure_orientedPath
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n) :
          ŌłĆ x Ōłł closure
              (BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch (d := d) n i hi),
            BHW.OS45Figure24OrientedPathField (d := d) n i hi x := by
        classical
        let Poriented :=
          BHW.os45_adjacent_identity_canonicalSourcePatch_with_orientedPath
            (d := d) (n := n) hd i hi
        have hsource :
            BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch (d := d) n i hi =
              Poriented.toCanonical.V := by
          exact BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch_eq_canonical
            (d := d) hd n i hi
        intro x hx
        exact Poriented.orientedPath_closure x (by simpa [hsource] using hx)

      theorem BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch_sourceEnvironment
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n) :
          Ōłā Ufig : Set (NPointDomain d n),
            IsOpen Ufig Ōł¦
            closure (BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch (d := d) n i hi) ŌŖå
              Ufig Ōł¦
            (let Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n) :=
              Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®
             (ŌłĆ x Ōłł Ufig, x Ōłł BHW.JostSet d n) Ōł¦
             (ŌłĆ x Ōłł Ufig, BHW.realEmbed x Ōłł BHW.ExtendedTube d n) Ōł¦
             (ŌłĆ x Ōłł Ufig,
               BHW.realEmbed (fun k => x (Žä k)) Ōłł
                 BHW.ExtendedTube d n) Ōł¦
             (ŌłĆ x Ōłł Ufig,
               BHW.realEmbed
                 (BHW.os45CommonEdgeRealPoint (d := d) (n := n)
                   (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) x) Ōłł
                 BHW.os45PulledRealBranchDomain (d := d) (n := n)
                   (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))) Ōł¦
             (ŌłĆ x Ōłł Ufig,
               BHW.realEmbed
                 (BHW.os45CommonEdgeRealPoint (d := d) (n := n)
                   (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) x) Ōłł
                 BHW.os45PulledRealBranchDomain (d := d) (n := n) Žä)) := by
        classical
        let P :=
          BHW.os45_adjacent_identity_canonicalSourcePatch
            (d := d) hd i hi
        refine Ō¤©P.Ufig, P.Ufig_open, ?_, ?_Ō¤®
        ┬Ę rw [BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch_eq_canonical
            (d := d) hd n i hi]
          exact P.closureV_sub_Ufig
        ┬Ę exact
            Ō¤©P.Ufig_jost, P.Ufig_ET, P.Ufig_swapET,
              P.Ufig_pulled_id, P.Ufig_pulled_tauŌ¤®

      structure BHW.SourceOrientedDistributionalAdjacentTubeAnchor
          [NeZero d]
          (n : Nat)
          (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (F : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé) where
        realPatch :
          Equiv.Perm (Fin n) ->
          Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ)
        realPatch_open :
          ŌłĆ ŽĆ, IsOpen (realPatch ŽĆ)
        realPatch_nonempty :
          ŌłĆ ŽĆ, (realPatch ŽĆ).Nonempty
        realPatch_jost :
          ŌłĆ ŽĆ, realPatch ŽĆ ŌŖå BHW.JostSet d n
        realPatch_left_sector :
          ŌłĆ ŽĆ x, x Ōłł realPatch ŽĆ ->
            BHW.realEmbed x Ōłł BHW.permutedExtendedTubeSector d n ŽĆ
        realPatch_right_sector :
          ŌłĆ ŽĆ x, x Ōłł realPatch ŽĆ ->
            BHW.realEmbed x Ōłł
              BHW.permutedExtendedTubeSector d n
                (ŽĆ * Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®)
        realPatch_commonEdge_contact :
          ŌłĆ ŽĆ, Ōłā x0 Ōłł realPatch ŽĆ,
            Ōłā u Ōłł BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch
                (d := d) (n := n) i hi,
              (fun k => x0 (ŽĆ k)) =
                BHW.os45CommonEdgeRealPoint
                  (d := d) (n := n)
                  (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) u
        oriented_left_mem :
          ŌłĆ ŽĆ x, x Ōłł realPatch ŽĆ ->
            BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
              (fun k => x (ŽĆ k)) Ōłł
              BHW.sourceOrientedDoublePermutationDomain d n
                (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®)
        oriented_right_eq_perm_left :
          ŌłĆ ŽĆ x, x Ōłł realPatch ŽĆ ->
            BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
              (fun k => x ((ŽĆ * Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®) k)) =
            BHW.sourcePermuteOrientedGram d n
              (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®)
              (BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
                (fun k => x (ŽĆ k)))
        compact_branch_eq :
          ŌłĆ ŽĆ (Žå : SchwartzMap
              (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ) Ōäé),
            HasCompactSupport
              (Žå : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ) -> Ōäé) ->
            tsupport
              (Žå : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ) -> Ōäé) ŌŖå
              realPatch ŽĆ ->
            Ōł½ x : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ,
                BHW.extendF F (fun k => BHW.realEmbed x (ŽĆ k)) *
                  Žå x
              =
            Ōł½ x : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ,
                BHW.extendF F
                  (fun k => BHW.realEmbed x
                    ((ŽĆ * Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®) k)) *
                  Žå x
      ```

      Current checked real-oriented core, 2026-05-09:
      `SourceOrientedReal.lean` now contains the finite-coordinate real layer
      from the beginning of this block:
      `BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant`,
      `BHW.continuous_realEmbed_sourceNPoint`,
      `BHW.continuous_sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant`,
      `BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant_mem_variety`,
      `BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant_perm`,
      `BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant_perm_mul`,
      `BHW.sourceOrientedDistributionalUniquenessPatch`, and
      `BHW.sourceOrientedDistributionalUniquenessPatch_mono`.  The same file
      also checks the real-source permutation topology helpers
      `BHW.realSourcePermuteHomeomorph`, `BHW.isOpen_realSourcePermuteImage`,
      `BHW.nonempty_realSourcePermuteImage`; the real full-frame determinant
      layer `BHW.sourceRealFullFrameMatrix`,
      `BHW.sourceRealFullFrameDet`,
      `BHW.continuous_sourceRealFullFrameMatrix`,
      `BHW.continuous_sourceRealFullFrameDet`,
      `BHW.sourceFullFrameMatrix_realEmbed`,
      `BHW.sourceFullFrameDet_realEmbed`,
      `BHW.sourceRealFullFrameDet_nonzero_isOpen`,
      `BHW.sourceRealFullFrameUnitTemplate`,
      `BHW.sourceRealFullFrameUnitTemplate_selected`,
      `BHW.sourceRealFullFrameMatrix_add_unitTemplate`,
      `BHW.sourceRealFullFrameDetLinePolynomial`,
      `BHW.sourceRealFullFrameDetLinePolynomial_leadingCoeff`,
      `BHW.sourceRealFullFrameDetLinePolynomial_ne_zero`,
      `BHW.sourceRealFullFrameDetLinePolynomial_eval`,
      `BHW.sourceRealFullFrameDet_nonzero_dense`, and
      `BHW.nonempty_open_inter_sourceRealFullFrameDet_nonzero`; and the
      canonical head full-frame embedding
      `BHW.sourceRealHeadFullFrameEmbedding`.  The next checked finite layer is
      `BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant_gram`,
      `BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant_det`,
      `BHW.realSourcePermute_symm_image_permImage_eq`,
      `BHW.os45Figure24_checkedRealPatch_gramEnvironmentSubpatch`, and
      `BHW.sourceFullFrameOrientedCoordOfSource_sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant`,
      `BHW.sourceRealSelectedMixedRows`,
      `BHW.continuous_sourceRealSelectedMixedRows`,
      `BHW.sourceSelectedMixedRows_sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant`, and
      `BHW.sourceOrientedMaxRankAt_sourceReal_fullFrameDet_ne_zero` in
      `SourceOrientedRealMaxRank.lean`.  The generic SCV uniqueness consumer is
      now checked in `SourceOrientedRealUniqueness.lean`:
      `BHW.SourceOrientedLocalRealChartData`,
      `BHW.IsHWOrientedRealEnvironment`,
      `BHW.SourceOrientedLocalRealChartData.shrink_to_domain_and_realPatch`,
      `BHW.sourceOrientedLocalTotallyReal_zero_seed`, and
      `BHW.sourceOrientedDistributionalUniquenessPatch_of_HWRealEnvironment`.
      The full-frame real-compatible packaging layer is checked in
      `SourceOrientedRealFullFrameChart.lean`:
      `BHW.SourceFullFrameRealGaugeSliceData`,
      `BHW.SourceFullFrameRealCompatibleImplicitChartData`,
      `BHW.SourceFullFrameRealCompatibleImplicitChartData.chart_real_eq`,
      `BHW.SourceFullFrameRealCompatibleImplicitChartData.to_localRealChartData`,
      and
      `BHW.sourceOrientedLocalRealChartData_of_fullFrameRealCompatibleImplicitChartData`.
      No theorem yet asserts that a Figure-2-4 real patch supplies an
      `IsHWOrientedRealEnvironment`; the next honest real-uniqueness frontier
      is the tangent/IFT producer of that local real chart data and the
      small-arity/full-frame environment subpatch producers.

      The theorem
      `sourceOrientedDistributionalUniquenessPatch_of_HWRealEnvironment` is
      the real analytic content behind the uniqueness predicate.  Its proof
      must not be replaced by an assumption field.  The local proof is the
      oriented analog of the checked scalar-Gram uniqueness stack: use the
      local finite-coordinate packet
      `SourceOrientedLocalRealChartData` at a real point of the environment,
      restrict a germ-holomorphic representative to the associated max-rank
      chart, apply the checked `SCV.identity_theorem_totally_real` to the
      open real coordinate image, and then propagate from the local max-rank
      seed through the connected relatively open oriented source domain by the
      checked max-rank connectedness and identity principles.

      The local-to-global proof must expose the local seed produced by the
      totally-real identity theorem.  It is not enough to say "identity
      theorem on a real patch": the patch must become a nonempty relatively
      open oriented source subset inside the connected domain `U`, so that
      `sourceOrientedGramVariety_eqOn_of_connected_maxRank_fullFrame` can
      propagate the equality after
      `sourceOrientedGramVariety_maxRank_inter_relOpen_isConnected_of_headSliceIFT`
      supplies connectedness of `U Ōł® MaxRank`.

      ```lean
      theorem SCV.identity_theorem_totally_real
          {m : Nat}
          {D : Set (Fin m -> Ōäé)}
          (hD_open : IsOpen D)
          (hD_conn : IsConnected D)
          {f : (Fin m -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé}
          (hf : DifferentiableOn Ōäé f D)
          {V : Set (Fin m -> ŌäØ)}
          (hV_open : IsOpen V)
          (hV_ne : V.Nonempty)
          (hV_sub : ŌłĆ q Ōłł V, SCV.realToComplex q Ōłł D)
          (hf_zero : ŌłĆ q Ōłł V, f (SCV.realToComplex q) = 0) :
          ŌłĆ z Ōłł D, f z = 0

      theorem BHW.SourceOrientedLocalRealChartData
          .shrink_to_domain_and_realPatch
          (d n : Nat)
          {x0 : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ}
          (R : BHW.SourceOrientedLocalRealChartData d n x0)
          {E : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ)}
          {U : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n)}
          (hE_open : IsOpen E)
          (hx0E : x0 Ōłł E)
          (hU_rel :
            BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety d n U)
          (hx0U :
            BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n x0 Ōłł U) :
          Ōłā (╬® : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n))
            (Eseed : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ)),
            BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n x0 Ōłł ╬® Ōł¦
            BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety d n ╬® Ōł¦
            ╬® ŌŖå U Ōł® {G | BHW.SourceOrientedMaxRankAt d n G} Ōł¦
            ╬® ŌŖå R.C.╬® Ōł¦
            IsOpen (R.C.chart '' ╬®) Ōł¦
            IsConnected (R.C.chart '' ╬®) Ōł¦
            IsOpen Eseed Ōł¦
            x0 Ōłł Eseed Ōł¦
            Eseed ŌŖå E Ōł¦
            Eseed ŌŖå R.E0 Ōł¦
            (ŌłĆ x Ōłł Eseed,
              BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n x Ōłł ╬®)

      theorem BHW.sourceOrientedLocalTotallyReal_zero_seed
          (d n : Nat)
          {E : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ)}
          (hE : BHW.IsHWOrientedRealEnvironment d n E)
          {U : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n)}
          {H : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n -> Ōäé}
          (hU_rel :
            BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety d n U)
          (hE_U :
            ŌłĆ x Ōłł E,
              BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n x Ōłł U)
          (hH :
            BHW.SourceOrientedVarietyGermHolomorphicOn d n H U)
          (h_zero :
            ŌłĆ x Ōłł E,
              H (BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n x) = 0) :
          Ōłā W : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n),
            BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety d n W Ōł¦
            W.Nonempty Ōł¦
            W ŌŖå U Ōł® {G | BHW.SourceOrientedMaxRankAt d n G} Ōł¦
            Set.EqOn H 0 W

      theorem BHW.sourceOrientedDistributionalUniquenessPatch_of_HWRealEnvironment
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (hn : d + 1 <= n)
          {E : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ)}
          (hE : BHW.IsHWOrientedRealEnvironment d n E) :
          BHW.sourceOrientedDistributionalUniquenessPatch d n E
      ```

      The helper
      `SourceOrientedLocalRealChartData.shrink_to_domain_and_realPatch` is
      ordinary finite-dimensional topology: use the checked max-rank chart
      shrinker `SourceOrientedMaxRankChartData.shrink_to_relOpen`, then cut the
      real patch by the preimage of the open coordinate domain
      `R.C.chart '' ╬®` under `SCV.realToComplex Ōłś R.realCoord`.  The
      `chart_real_eq` field converts real agreement on `Eseed` into vanishing
      on the standard totally-real slice in `Fin R.m -> Ōäé`, so the checked
      theorem is the existing finite-coordinate
      `SCV.identity_theorem_totally_real`; no abstract
      `IsMaximalTotallyRealSubmanifold` predicate is introduced.

      The final propagation step is also concrete: first obtain a nonempty
      relatively open max-rank seed `W` from
      `sourceOrientedLocalTotallyReal_zero_seed`, then use
      `sourceOrientedGramVariety_maxRank_inter_relOpen_isConnected_of_headSliceIFT`
      to get connectedness of `U Ōł® MaxRank` from `IsConnected U`, and finally
      call `sourceOrientedGramVariety_eqOn_of_connected_maxRank_fullFrame`.
      Thus `sourceOrientedDistributionalUniquenessPatch_of_HWRealEnvironment`
      is a hard-range theorem with explicit `[NeZero d]`, `2 <= d`, and
      `d + 1 <= n` inputs.  The small-arity route is handled separately by the
      pure-Gram environment branch.

      The oriented tangent package must therefore be decomposed before Lean:

      ```lean
      def BHW.sourceFullFrameDetDifferential
          (d n : Nat)
          (╬╣ : Fin (d + 1) Ōå¬ Fin n)
          (z v : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) : Ōäé :=
        Ōłæ a : Fin (d + 1),
          Ōłæ ╬╝ : Fin (d + 1),
            BHW.sourceFullFrameCofactor d n ╬╣ z a ╬╝ *
              v (╬╣ a) ╬╝

      def BHW.sourceFullFrameDetDifferentialLinear
          (d n : Nat)
          (╬╣ : Fin (d + 1) Ōå¬ Fin n)
          (z : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) :
          (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) ->ŌéŚ[Ōäé] Ōäé :=
        { toFun := BHW.sourceFullFrameDetDifferential d n ╬╣ z
          map_add' := by
            intro v w
            simp [BHW.sourceFullFrameDetDifferential, add_comm,
              add_left_comm, add_assoc, Finset.sum_add_distrib,
              mul_add]
          map_smul' := by
            intro c v
            simp [BHW.sourceFullFrameDetDifferential, smul_eq_mul,
              Finset.mul_sum, mul_comm, mul_left_comm, mul_assoc] }

      noncomputable def BHW.sourceFullFrameDetContinuousLinearMap
          (d n : Nat)
          (╬╣ : Fin (d + 1) Ōå¬ Fin n)
          (z : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) :
          (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) ŌåÆL[Ōäé] Ōäé :=
        LinearMap.toContinuousLinearMap
          (BHW.sourceFullFrameDetDifferentialLinear d n ╬╣ z)

      def BHW.sourceOrientedDifferential
          (d n : Nat)
          (z : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé)
          (v : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) :
          BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n :=
        (BHW.sourceComplexGramDifferential d n z v,
          fun ╬╣ => BHW.sourceFullFrameDetDifferential d n ╬╣ z v)

      def BHW.sourceOrientedDifferentialLinear
          (d n : Nat)
          (z : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) :
          (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) ->ŌéŚ[Ōäé]
            BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n :=
        { toFun := BHW.sourceOrientedDifferential d n z
          map_add' := by
            intro v w
            apply BHW.SourceOrientedGramData.ext
            ┬Ę exact map_add (BHW.sourceComplexGramDifferential d n z) v w
            ┬Ę funext ╬╣
              exact
                map_add
                  (BHW.sourceFullFrameDetDifferentialLinear d n ╬╣ z) v w
          map_smul' := by
            intro c v
            apply BHW.SourceOrientedGramData.ext
            ┬Ę exact map_smul (BHW.sourceComplexGramDifferential d n z) c v
            ┬Ę funext ╬╣
              exact
                map_smul
                  (BHW.sourceFullFrameDetDifferentialLinear d n ╬╣ z) c v }

      noncomputable def BHW.sourceOrientedDifferentialCLM
          (d n : Nat)
          (z : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) :
          (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) ŌåÆL[Ōäé]
            BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n :=
        LinearMap.toContinuousLinearMap
          (BHW.sourceOrientedDifferentialLinear d n z)

      theorem BHW.sourceFullFrameDet_hasFDerivAt
          (d n : Nat)
          (╬╣ : Fin (d + 1) Ōå¬ Fin n)
          (z : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) :
          HasFDerivAt
            (fun y => BHW.sourceFullFrameDet d n ╬╣ y)
            (BHW.sourceFullFrameDetContinuousLinearMap d n ╬╣ z) z

      theorem BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant_hasFDerivAt
          (d n : Nat)
          (z : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) :
          HasFDerivAt
            (BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n)
            (BHW.sourceOrientedDifferentialCLM d n z) z

      theorem BHW.sourceOrientedDifferential_real_complexification
          (d n : Nat)
          (x v : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ) :
          BHW.sourceOrientedDifferential d n
              (BHW.realEmbed x) (BHW.realEmbed v) =
            BHW.realEmbedSourceOrientedDifferential d n x v

      theorem BHW.sourceOrientedRegularAt_of_pureGram_regular_plus_detRank
          (d n : Nat)
          {x : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ}
          (hGramReg : BHW.SourceComplexGramRegularAt d n x)
          (hDetRank :
            BHW.SourceFullFrameDetRealDifferentialHasExpectedRank d n x) :
          BHW.SourceOrientedRegularAt d n x

      theorem BHW.sourceOrientedComplexifiedRealTangentEqualsComplexTangent_of_detJacobian
          (d n : Nat)
          {x : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ}
          (hGramTR :
            BHW.SourceComplexifiedRealTangentEqualsComplexTangent d n x)
          (hDetTR :
            BHW.SourceFullFrameDetRealTangentComplexifies d n x) :
          BHW.SourceOrientedComplexifiedRealTangentEqualsComplexTangent
            d n x
      ```

      Here `sourceFullFrameCofactor` is the standard determinant cofactor of
      the selected frame matrix.  The derivative statement is the usual
      finite determinant derivative, restricted to the selected source rows;
      it should be proved from `Matrix.det_apply'` or the local determinant
      differentiability API, not postulated.  The two final theorems are the
      exact bridges that explain why the oriented real patch is still a
      maximal totally real uniqueness set after determinant coordinates are
      added.  They are finite-dimensional source-geometry theorems; they
      contain no OS, EOW, PET, locality, or `bvt_W` content.

      The chart producer used by the uniqueness theorem is itself a standard
      finite-dimensional implicit-function theorem packet.  It must be
      proved from the explicit oriented equations, not assumed because the
      pure-Gram chart exists:

      ```lean
      def BHW.sourceOrientedDefiningEquationSpace
          (d n : Nat) : Type* :=
        BHW.SourceOrientedEquationIndex d n -> Ōäé

      def BHW.sourceOrientedDefiningEquations
          (d n : Nat) :
          BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n ->
            BHW.sourceOrientedDefiningEquationSpace d n

      theorem BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety_eq_zeroLocus_definingEquations
          (d n : Nat) :
          BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety d n =
            {G | BHW.sourceOrientedDefiningEquations d n G = 0}

      theorem BHW.sourceOrientedDefiningEquations_hasFDerivAt
          (d n : Nat)
          (G : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n) :
          HasFDerivAt
            (BHW.sourceOrientedDefiningEquations d n)
            (BHW.sourceOrientedDefiningEquationsDifferentialCLM d n G)
            G

      theorem BHW.sourceOrientedRegularAt_submersion_equations
          (d n : Nat)
          {x : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ}
          (hreg : BHW.SourceOrientedRegularAt d n x) :
          BHW.SubmersionAt
            (BHW.sourceOrientedDefiningEquations d n)
            (BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n x)

      theorem BHW.sourceOrientedLocalRealChartData_of_submersion
          (d n : Nat)
          {x0 : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ}
          (hreg : BHW.SourceOrientedRegularAt d n x0)
          (htr :
            BHW.SourceOrientedComplexifiedRealTangentEqualsComplexTangent
              d n x0) :
          BHW.SourceOrientedLocalRealChartData d n x0 := by
        let C := BHW.sourceOrientedMaxRankChartData_of_realRegular
          (d := d) (n := n) x0 hreg
        have hrealCoeff :
            BHW.sourceOrientedDefiningEquations_haveRealCoefficients
              (d := d) (n := n) := by
          exact
            BHW.sourceOrientedDefiningEquations_realCoeff
              (d := d) (n := n)
        exact
          BHW.sourceOrientedLocalRealChartData_of_realCoeff_submersion
            (d := d) (n := n) C hrealCoeff hreg htr
      ```

      The defining equations are exactly the symmetry, rank/minor,
      alternation, and Cauchy-Binet equations listed in the oriented algebraic
      model; their coefficients are real on the real source slice.  The
      submersion statement is just the Jacobian expected-rank condition
      rewritten for those equations.  The local real chart data theorem uses
      the equality of the complex tangent with the complexification of the real
      tangent to put the real source slice into the standard
      `SCV.realToComplex` coordinate form consumed by the totally-real identity
      theorem.  None of these theorems can cite Wick rotation, compact OS-I
      equality, EOW, or final locality.

      The producer of an oriented real environment must also say where the
      determinant-rank hypotheses come from.  The generic real-patch shrink is:

      ```lean
      theorem BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant_gram
          (d n : Nat)
          (x : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ) :
          (BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n x).gram =
            BHW.sourceRealGramComplexify n
              (BHW.sourceRealMinkowskiGram d n x)

          (d n : Nat)
          (╬╣ : Fin (d + 1) Ōå¬ Fin n)

          (BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n x).det ╬╣ =
            (BHW.sourceRealFullFrameDet d n ╬╣ x : Ōäé)

      theorem BHW.sourceOrientedMaxRankAt_sourceReal_fullFrameDet_ne_zero
          (d n : Nat)
          (╬╣ : Fin (d + 1) Ōå¬ Fin n)
          {x : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ}
          (hdet : BHW.sourceRealFullFrameDet d n ╬╣ x ŌēĀ 0) :
          BHW.SourceOrientedMaxRankAt d n
            (BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n x)

      theorem BHW.sourceFullFrameOrientedCoordOfSource_sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant
          (d n : Nat)
          (╬╣ : Fin (d + 1) Ōå¬ Fin n)
          (x : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ) :
          BHW.sourceFullFrameOrientedCoordOfSource d n ╬╣
              (BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n x) =
            BHW.sourceFullFrameOrientedGramCoord d
              ((BHW.sourceRealFullFrameMatrix d n ╬╣ x).map Complex.ofReal)

      def BHW.sourceRealSelectedMixedRows
          (d n : Nat)

          (x : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ) :
          BHW.sourceComplementIndex ╬╣ -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ :=

      theorem BHW.sourceRealSelectedMixedRows_tail_eq_mixedRowLinearEquiv

      structure BHW.IsOS45Figure24CheckedRealPatch
          {d : Nat} [NeZero d]
          (n : Nat)
          (ŽĆ : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
          (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (E0 : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ)) : Prop where
        isOpen : IsOpen E0
        nonempty : E0.Nonempty
        permuted_jost :
          {y | Ōłā x Ōłł E0, y = fun k => x (ŽĆ k)} ŌŖå
            BHW.JostSet d n

      theorem BHW.sourceRealFullFrameDet_nonzero_isOpen
          (d n : Nat)
          (╬╣ : Fin (d + 1) Ōå¬ Fin n) :
          IsOpen
            {x : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ |
              BHW.sourceRealFullFrameDet d n ╬╣ x ŌēĀ 0}

      noncomputable def BHW.realSourcePermuteHomeomorph
          (d n : Nat)
          (ŽĆ : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) :
          (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ) ŌēāŌé£
            (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ) where
        toEquiv :=
          { toFun := fun x k => x (ŽĆ k)
            invFun := fun y k => y (ŽĆ.symm k)
            left_inv := by
              intro x
              ext k ╬╝
              simp
            right_inv := by
              intro y
              ext k ╬╝
              simp }
        continuous_toFun := by
          fun_prop
        continuous_invFun := by
          fun_prop

      theorem BHW.isOpen_realSourcePermuteImage
          (d n : Nat)
          (ŽĆ : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
          {E : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ)}
          (hE_open : IsOpen E) :
          IsOpen {y | Ōłā x Ōłł E, y = fun k => x (ŽĆ k)} := by
        have hImage :
            {y | Ōłā x Ōłł E, y = fun k => x (ŽĆ k)} =
              (BHW.realSourcePermuteHomeomorph d n ŽĆ) '' E := by
          ext y
          constructor
          ┬Ę rintro Ō¤©x, hxE, rflŌ¤®
            exact Ō¤©x, hxE, rflŌ¤®
          ┬Ę rintro Ō¤©x, hxE, rflŌ¤®
            exact Ō¤©x, hxE, rflŌ¤®
        rw [hImage]
        exact (BHW.realSourcePermuteHomeomorph d n ŽĆ).isOpenMap E hE_open

      theorem BHW.nonempty_realSourcePermuteImage
          (d n : Nat)
          (ŽĆ : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
          {E : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ)}
          (hE_ne : E.Nonempty) :
          {y | Ōłā x Ōłł E, y = fun k => x (ŽĆ k)}.Nonempty := by
        rcases hE_ne with Ō¤©x, hxEŌ¤®
        exact Ō¤©fun k => x (ŽĆ k), x, hxE, rflŌ¤®

      def BHW.sourceRealHeadFullFrameEmbedding
          (d n : Nat)
          (hn : d + 1 <= n) :
          Fin (d + 1) Ōå¬ Fin n :=
        { toFun := fun a => Ō¤©a.val, lt_of_lt_of_le a.isLt hnŌ¤®
          inj' := by
            intro a b hab
            exact Fin.ext (Fin.ext_iff.mp hab) }

      theorem BHW.sourceRealFullFrameDet_nonzero_dense
          (d n : Nat)
          (╬╣ : Fin (d + 1) Ōå¬ Fin n) :
          Dense
            {x : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ |
              BHW.sourceRealFullFrameDet d n ╬╣ x ŌēĀ 0} := by
        -- `sourceRealFullFrameDet d n ╬╣` is a nonzero real polynomial in the
        -- finitely many source coordinates: at the tuple whose selected
        -- rows are the standard basis and whose remaining rows are zero, the
        -- determinant is `1`.  The zero set of a nonzero real polynomial has
        -- empty interior in a finite-dimensional real vector space; hence
        -- its complement is dense.
        exact
          BHW.dense_nonvanishing_locus_sourceRealFullFrameDet
            (d := d) (n := n) ╬╣

      theorem BHW.nonempty_open_inter_sourceRealFullFrameDet_nonzero
          (d n : Nat)
          (╬╣ : Fin (d + 1) Ōå¬ Fin n)
          {E : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ)}
          (hE_open : IsOpen E)
          (hE_ne : E.Nonempty) :
          (E Ōł®
            {x : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ |
              BHW.sourceRealFullFrameDet d n ╬╣ x ŌēĀ 0}).Nonempty := by
        rcases hE_ne with Ō¤©x, hxEŌ¤®
        have hdense :=
          BHW.sourceRealFullFrameDet_nonzero_dense d n ╬╣
        exact
          hdense.exists_mem_open hE_open hxE

      theorem BHW.os45Figure24_checkedRealPatch_gramEnvironmentSubpatch
          [NeZero d]
          (n : Nat)
          (ŽĆ : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
          (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (E0 : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ))
          (hE0_is_checked_patch :
            BHW.IsOS45Figure24CheckedRealPatch (d := d) n ŽĆ i hi E0) :
          Ōłā (E : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ))
            (O : Set (Fin n -> Fin n -> ŌäØ)),
            E ŌŖå E0 Ōł¦ IsOpen E Ōł¦ E.Nonempty Ōł¦
            IsOpen {y | Ōłā x Ōłł E, y = fun k => x (ŽĆ k)} Ōł¦
            {y | Ōłā x Ōłł E, y = fun k => x (ŽĆ k)}.Nonempty Ōł¦
            {y | Ōłā x Ōłł E, y = fun k => x (ŽĆ k)} ŌŖå
              BHW.JostSet d n Ōł¦
            O ŌŖå
              BHW.sourceRealMinkowskiGram d n ''
                {y | Ōłā x Ōłł E, y = fun k => x (ŽĆ k)} Ōł¦
            BHW.IsHWRealEnvironment d n O

      theorem BHW.os45Figure24_checkedRealPatch_fullFrameGramEnvironmentSubpatch
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat)
          (hn : d + 1 <= n)
          (ŽĆ : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
          (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (E0 : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ))
          (hE0_is_checked_patch :
            BHW.IsOS45Figure24CheckedRealPatch (d := d) n ŽĆ i hi E0) :
          Ōłā (╬╣ : Fin (d + 1) Ōå¬ Fin n)
            (E : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ))
            (O : Set (Fin n -> Fin n -> ŌäØ)),
            E ŌŖå E0 Ōł¦ IsOpen E Ōł¦ E.Nonempty Ōł¦
            IsOpen {y | Ōłā x Ōłł E, y = fun k => x (ŽĆ k)} Ōł¦
            {y | Ōłā x Ōłł E, y = fun k => x (ŽĆ k)}.Nonempty Ōł¦
            (ŌłĆ y Ōłł {y | Ōłā x Ōłł E, y = fun k => x (ŽĆ k)},
              BHW.sourceRealFullFrameDet d n ╬╣ y ŌēĀ 0) Ōł¦
            {y | Ōłā x Ōłł E, y = fun k => x (ŽĆ k)} ŌŖå
              BHW.JostSet d n Ōł¦
            O ŌŖå
              BHW.sourceRealMinkowskiGram d n ''
                {y | Ōłā x Ōłł E, y = fun k => x (ŽĆ k)} Ōł¦
            BHW.IsHWRealEnvironment d n O := by
        let ╬╣ := BHW.sourceRealHeadFullFrameEmbedding d n hn
        let H := BHW.realSourcePermuteHomeomorph d n ŽĆ
        let Eperm0 : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ) :=
          {y | Ōłā x Ōłł E0, y = fun k => x (ŽĆ k)}
        have hEperm0_open : IsOpen Eperm0 :=
          BHW.isOpen_realSourcePermuteImage d n ŽĆ
            hE0_is_checked_patch.isOpen
        have hEperm0_ne : Eperm0.Nonempty :=
          BHW.nonempty_realSourcePermuteImage d n ŽĆ
            hE0_is_checked_patch.nonempty
        let Eperm : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ) :=
          Eperm0 Ōł®
            {y | BHW.sourceRealFullFrameDet d n ╬╣ y ŌēĀ 0}
        have hEperm_open : IsOpen Eperm :=
          hEperm0_open.inter
            (BHW.sourceRealFullFrameDet_nonzero_isOpen d n ╬╣)
        have hEperm_ne : Eperm.Nonempty :=
          BHW.nonempty_open_inter_sourceRealFullFrameDet_nonzero
            d n ╬╣ hEperm0_open hEperm0_ne
        let E : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ) := H.symm '' Eperm
        have hE_open : IsOpen E := H.symm.isOpenMap Eperm hEperm_open
        have hE_ne : E.Nonempty := by
          rcases hEperm_ne with Ō¤©y, hyŌ¤®
          exact Ō¤©H.symm y, y, hy, rflŌ¤®
        have hperm_image :
            {y | Ōłā x Ōłł E, y = fun k => x (ŽĆ k)} = Eperm := by
          have h_as_image :
              {y | Ōłā x Ōłł E, y = fun k => x (ŽĆ k)} = H '' E := by
            ext y
            constructor
            ┬Ę rintro Ō¤©x, hxE, rflŌ¤®
              exact Ō¤©x, hxE, rflŌ¤®
            ┬Ę rintro Ō¤©x, hxE, rflŌ¤®
              exact Ō¤©x, hxE, rflŌ¤®
          have h_image : H '' E = Eperm := by
            ext y
            constructor
            ┬Ę rintro Ō¤©x, hxE, rflŌ¤®
              rcases hxE with Ō¤©y0, hy0, rflŌ¤®
              simpa using hy0
            ┬Ę intro hy
              exact Ō¤©H.symm y, Ō¤©y, hy, rflŌ¤®, by simpŌ¤®
          exact h_as_image.trans h_image
        have hE_sub : E ŌŖå E0 := by
          intro x hxE
          rcases hxE with Ō¤©y, hyEperm, rflŌ¤®
          have hyEperm0 : y Ōłł Eperm0 := hyEperm.1
          rcases hyEperm0 with Ō¤©x0, hx0E0, rflŌ¤®
          simpa [H, BHW.realSourcePermuteHomeomorph] using hx0E0
        have hEperm_jost :
            Eperm ŌŖå BHW.JostSet d n := by
          intro y hy
          exact hE0_is_checked_patch.permuted_jost hy.1
        rcases (BHW.dense_sourceGramRegularAt d n).exists_mem_open
            hEperm_open hEperm_ne with
          Ō¤©y0, hy0reg, hy0EpermŌ¤®
        have hy0_jost : y0 Ōłł BHW.JostSet d n :=
          hEperm_jost hy0Eperm
        rcases BHW.sourceRealGramMap_realEnvironmentAt_of_regular
            (d := d) n hy0reg hy0_jost Eperm hEperm_open hy0Eperm with
          Ō¤©O, hO_sub, hO_envŌ¤®
        refine
          Ō¤©╬╣, E, O, hE_sub, hE_open, hE_ne, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_Ō¤®
        ┬Ę simpa [hperm_image] using hEperm_open
        ┬Ę simpa [hperm_image] using hEperm_ne
        ┬Ę intro y hy
          have hyEperm : y Ōłł Eperm := by
            simpa [hperm_image] using hy
          exact hyEperm.2
        ┬Ę simpa [hperm_image] using hEperm_jost
        ┬Ę simpa [hperm_image] using hO_sub
        ┬Ę exact hO_env

      theorem BHW.os45Figure24_realPatch_orientedRegularSubpatch
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat)
          (ŽĆ : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
          (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (E0 : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ))
          (hE0_is_checked_patch :
            BHW.IsOS45Figure24CheckedRealPatch (d := d) n ŽĆ i hi E0) :
          Ōłā E : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ),
            E ŌŖå E0 Ōł¦ IsOpen E Ōł¦ E.Nonempty Ōł¦
            BHW.IsHWOrientedRealEnvironment d n
              {y | Ōłā x Ōłł E, y = fun k => x (ŽĆ k)}
      ```

      The theorem `sourceOrientedLocalRealChartData_of_fullFrameDet_ne_zero`
      is the first hard real-IFT target in this block.  It must not be proved
      by directly reusing
      `sourceOrientedFullFrameMaxRankChartData_of_selectedDetNonzero`: that
      checked chart chooses an arbitrary complex gauge-slice complement and an
      arbitrary complex finite-coordinate basis, so it does not provide the
      literal real-slice equation
      `C.chart (sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n x) =
      SCV.realToComplex (realCoord x)`.  The proof must instead build a
      real-compatible full-frame local chart: start from the real full-frame
      matrix at `x0`, choose a real gauge-slice complement and complexify it,
      run the real/complex implicit-function theorem with real-coefficient
      Gram and determinant equations, prove the local real source-to-oriented
      invariant map is open/submersive on a small real neighborhood, and then
      install the resulting real coordinates into
      `SourceOrientedLocalRealChartData`.

      Lean-ready split for that hard theorem:

      ```lean
      structure BHW.SourceFullFrameRealGaugeSliceData
          (d : Nat)
          (M0R : Matrix (Fin (d + 1)) (Fin (d + 1)) ŌäØ)
          (hM0R : M0R.det ŌēĀ 0) where
        M0 : Matrix (Fin (d + 1)) (Fin (d + 1)) Ōäé :=
          M0R.map Complex.ofReal
        M0_det_unit : IsUnit M0.det
        complexSlice : BHW.SourceFullFrameGaugeSliceData d M0
        realModelDim : Nat
        realModelToComplexSlice :
          (Fin realModelDim -> Ōäé) ŌēāL[Ōäé] complexSlice.slice
        realKernelCoord :
          Matrix (Fin (d + 1)) (Fin (d + 1)) ŌäØ ->
            Fin realModelDim -> ŌäØ
        complexKernelCoord :
          Matrix (Fin (d + 1)) (Fin (d + 1)) Ōäé ->
            complexSlice.slice
        complexKernelCoord_real_eq :
          ŌłĆ M : Matrix (Fin (d + 1)) (Fin (d + 1)) ŌäØ,
            complexKernelCoord (M.map Complex.ofReal) =
              realModelToComplexSlice
                (SCV.realToComplex (realKernelCoord M))
        frameDomain : Set (Matrix (Fin (d + 1)) (Fin (d + 1)) ŌäØ)
        frameDomain_open : IsOpen frameDomain
        center_mem_frameDomain : M0R Ōłł frameDomain
        frameDomain_det_nonzero : frameDomain ŌŖå {M | M.det ŌēĀ 0}
        realKernelCoord_continuousOn :
          ContinuousOn realKernelCoord frameDomain

      structure BHW.SourceFullFrameRealCompatibleImplicitChartData
          (d n : Nat)
          (╬╣ : Fin (d + 1) Ōå¬ Fin n)
          (x0 : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ)
          (hdet : BHW.sourceRealFullFrameDet d n ╬╣ x0 ŌēĀ 0) where
        slice :
          BHW.SourceFullFrameRealGaugeSliceData d
            (BHW.sourceRealFullFrameMatrix d n ╬╣ x0) hdet
        m : Nat
        C :
          BHW.SourceOrientedMaxRankChartData d n
            (M := Fin m -> Ōäé)
            (BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n x0)
        coordEquivR :
          (Fin m -> ŌäØ) ŌēāŌéŚ[ŌäØ]
            ((Fin slice.realModelDim -> ŌäØ) ├Ś
              (BHW.sourceComplementIndex ╬╣ -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ))
        coordEquivC :
          (Fin m -> Ōäé) ŌēāŌéŚ[Ōäé]
            ((Fin slice.realModelDim -> Ōäé) ├Ś
              (BHW.sourceComplementIndex ╬╣ -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé))
        coordEquiv_realToComplex :
          ŌłĆ u : Fin m -> ŌäØ,
            coordEquivC (SCV.realToComplex u) =
              (SCV.realToComplex (coordEquivR u).1,
                fun k a => ((coordEquivR u).2 k a : Ōäé))
        E0 : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ)
        E0_open : IsOpen E0
        center_mem : x0 Ōłł E0
        invariant_mem_chart :
          ŌłĆ x Ōłł E0,
            BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n x Ōłł C.╬®
        frame_mem_domain :
          ŌłĆ x Ōłł E0,
            BHW.sourceRealFullFrameMatrix d n ╬╣ x Ōłł
              slice.frameDomain
        realCoord : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ) -> Fin m -> ŌäØ
        realCoord_eq_kernel_mixed :
          ŌłĆ x Ōłł E0,
            coordEquivR (realCoord x) =
              (slice.realKernelCoord
                (BHW.sourceRealFullFrameMatrix d n ╬╣ x),
                BHW.sourceRealSelectedMixedRows d n ╬╣ x)
        chart_eq_kernel_mixed :
          ŌłĆ x Ōłł E0,
            coordEquivC
              (C.chart
                (BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n x)) =
              (slice.realModelToComplexSlice.symm
                (slice.complexKernelCoord
                  ((BHW.sourceRealFullFrameMatrix d n ╬╣ x).map
                    Complex.ofReal)),
                BHW.sourceSelectedMixedRows d n ╬╣
                  (BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n x))
        realCoord_continuousOn : ContinuousOn realCoord E0
        realCoord_image_open :
          ŌłĆ {S : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ)},
            IsOpen S -> S ŌŖå E0 -> IsOpen (realCoord '' S)

      theorem BHW.SourceFullFrameRealCompatibleImplicitChartData.chart_real_eq
          {d n : Nat}
          {╬╣ : Fin (d + 1) Ōå¬ Fin n}
          {x0 : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ}
          {hdet : BHW.sourceRealFullFrameDet d n ╬╣ x0 ŌēĀ 0}
          (R :
            BHW.SourceFullFrameRealCompatibleImplicitChartData
              d n ╬╣ x0 hdet)
          (x : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ)
          (hx : x Ōłł R.E0) :
          R.C.chart
              (BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n x) =
      ```

      ```lean
      -- Remaining hard local-open theorem, to be proved for the specific
      -- determinant-nonzero split neighborhood `W` chosen in the
      -- implicit-chart constructor:
      --   (1) pass `V` through the checked triangular homeomorphism
      --       `sourceFullFrameRealSplitMixedRowsHomeomorph`;
      --   (2) prove local product openness for
      --       `(M,Y) Ōå” (S.realKernelCoord M, Y)` using the selected-frame
      --       local product/submersion chart around `M0R`; and
      --   (3) apply the checked bridge
      --       `sourceFullFrameRealSplitKernelMixedCoord_open_on_W_of_product_homeomorph_open`.
      -- Do not replace this with a global selected-frame open-map assertion.
      theorem
          BHW.sourceFullFrameRealSplitProductKernelCoord_open_after_homeomorph_on_W
          {d n : Nat}
          {╬╣ : Fin (d + 1) Ōå¬ Fin n}
          {x0 : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ}
          {hdet : BHW.sourceRealFullFrameDet d n ╬╣ x0 ŌēĀ 0}
          (S : BHW.SourceFullFrameRealGaugeSliceData d
            (BHW.sourceRealFullFrameMatrix d n ╬╣ x0) hdet)
          (W : Set
            (Matrix (Fin (d + 1)) (Fin (d + 1)) ŌäØ ├Ś
              (BHW.sourceComplementIndex ╬╣ -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ)))
          (hW_det : W ŌŖå {p | p.1.det ŌēĀ 0}) :
          (ŌłĆ {V : Set
            (Matrix (Fin (d + 1)) (Fin (d + 1)) ŌäØ ├Ś
              (BHW.sourceComplementIndex ╬╣ -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ))},
            IsOpen V ->
            V ŌŖå W ->
            IsOpen
              (BHW.sourceFullFrameRealSplitProductKernelCoord S ''
                ((Subtype.val :
                  BHW.sourceFullFrameRealSplitDetNonzero d n ╬╣ ->
                    Matrix (Fin (d + 1)) (Fin (d + 1)) ŌäØ ├Ś
                      (BHW.sourceComplementIndex ╬╣ -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ)) ''
                  ((BHW.sourceFullFrameRealSplitMixedRowsHomeomorph
                    d n ╬╣) ''
                {p : BHW.sourceFullFrameRealSplitDetNonzero d n ╬╣ |
                  p.1 Ōłł V}))))

      -- Lean-facing form of the preceding theorem.  The hard analytic
      -- construction produces this packet for the particular shrunken split
      -- neighborhood used by the final implicit chart.  The checked
      -- determinant-nonzero mixed-row and source-split bridges consume the
      -- fields mechanically.
      structure BHW.SourceFullFrameRealSelectedFrameProductOpenData
          {d n : Nat}
          {╬╣ : Fin (d + 1) Ōå¬ Fin n}
          {x0 : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ}
          {hdet : BHW.sourceRealFullFrameDet d n ╬╣ x0 ŌēĀ 0}
          (S : BHW.SourceFullFrameRealGaugeSliceData d
            (BHW.sourceRealFullFrameMatrix d n ╬╣ x0) hdet) where
        W : Set
          (Matrix (Fin (d + 1)) (Fin (d + 1)) ŌäØ ├Ś
            (BHW.sourceComplementIndex ╬╣ -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ))
        W_open : IsOpen W
        center_mem :
          BHW.sourceRealFullFrameSplitHomeomorph d n ╬╣ x0 Ōłł W
        W_det : W ŌŖå {p | p.1.det ŌēĀ 0}
        frame_mem_domain :
          ŌłĆ p Ōłł W, p.1 Ōłł S.frameDomain
        product_open_after_homeomorph :
          ŌłĆ {V : Set
            (Matrix (Fin (d + 1)) (Fin (d + 1)) ŌäØ ├Ś
              (BHW.sourceComplementIndex ╬╣ -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ))},
            IsOpen V ->
            V ŌŖå W ->
            IsOpen
              (BHW.sourceFullFrameRealSplitProductKernelCoord S ''
                ((Subtype.val :
                  BHW.sourceFullFrameRealSplitDetNonzero d n ╬╣ ->
                    Matrix (Fin (d + 1)) (Fin (d + 1)) ŌäØ ├Ś
                      (BHW.sourceComplementIndex ╬╣ -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ)) ''
                  ((BHW.sourceFullFrameRealSplitMixedRowsHomeomorph
                    d n ╬╣) ''
                    {p : BHW.sourceFullFrameRealSplitDetNonzero d n ╬╣ |
                      p.1 Ōłł V})))

      theorem
          BHW.SourceFullFrameRealSelectedFrameProductOpenData
            .split_kernel_mixed_open_on_W
          {d n : Nat}
          {╬╣ : Fin (d + 1) Ōå¬ Fin n}
          {x0 : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ}

            BHW.SourceFullFrameRealSelectedFrameProductOpenData S) :

      theorem BHW.sourceFullFrameRealCompatibleImplicitChartData
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat)
          (╬╣ : Fin (d + 1) Ōå¬ Fin n)
          {x0 : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ}
          (hdet : BHW.sourceRealFullFrameDet d n ╬╣ x0 ŌēĀ 0) :
          Nonempty
            (BHW.SourceFullFrameRealCompatibleImplicitChartData
              d n ╬╣ x0 hdet) := by
        -- 1. Put `M0R := sourceRealFullFrameMatrix d n ╬╣ x0`.
        --    Use `sourceRealFullFrameMatrix_map_ofReal_det_isUnit hdet`
        --    for the complex determinant-unit field.
        -- 2. Build `S := sourceFullFrameRealGaugeSliceData d M0R hdet`.
        --    This is the explicit real gauge slice from the constructive
        --    full-frame differential right inverse:
        --    `B := (1/2) ŌĆó (M0Ōü╗┬╣ * G * (M0ßĄĆ)Ōü╗┬╣ * ╬Ę)` plus the determinant
        --    correction already checked in
        --    `sourceFullFrameOrientedDifferential_constructedGram` and
        --    `sourceFullFrameOrientedDifferential_constructedDet`.
        --    The complex side is now a named explicit slice:
        --    `sourceFullFrameExplicitGaugeSliceData d hM0`, whose slice is
        --    the range of
        --    `sourceFullFrameOrientedDifferentialRightInverseLinear`.
        --    The complement proof is the direct decomposition
        --    `X = R(L X) + (X - R(L X))`, and
        --    `X - R(L X)` is in the orbit tangent by the checked kernel
        --    theorem.  The real producer uses
        --    `sourceFullFrameRealDifferentialRightInverseRange` for the real
        --    slice and the checked theorem
        --    `sourceFullFrameRealSliceFiniteCoordData`, whose complex
        --    coordinate equivalence is built from a real basis of that range.
        -- 3. Run the real inverse/implicit-function theorem for the real
        --    kernel map.  Its complexification is the existing complex
        --    `sourceFullFrameGaugeSliceImplicitKernelMap`; uniqueness of the
        --    local inverse gives `complexKernelCoord_real_eq`.
        -- 4. Define the chart `C` from the full-frame max-rank chart
        --    constructor using this same complex slice, not
        --    `sourceFullFrameGaugeSlice_exists`.
        -- 5. Shrink `E0` so real source invariants lie in `C.╬®` and selected
        --    real frames lie in `S.frameDomain`.
        -- 6. Let `realCoord` be the inverse of `coordEquivR` applied to
        --    `(S.realKernelCoord (sourceRealFullFrameMatrix ... x),
        --      sourceRealSelectedMixedRows ... x)`.
        -- 7. Prove continuity using the checked
        --    `continuousOn_sourceFullFrameRealKernelMixedCoord`, the
        --    selected-frame domain membership, and the linear
        --    finite-coordinate equivalence defining `realCoord`.
        -- 8. Prove `realCoord_image_open` by producing
        --    `SourceFullFrameRealSelectedFrameProductOpenData S`.
        --    Choose `E0` as the inverse split image of its `W`; then
        --    `D.split_kernel_mixed_open_on_W` and
        --    `isOpen_sourceFullFrameRealKernelMixedCoord_image_of_split_local_open`
        --    give openness of the raw real coordinate image.  The selected
        --    frame part of `D.product_open_after_homeomorph` is exactly the
        --    local product/submersion chart whose first coordinate is
        --    `S.realKernelCoord`; the mixed-row part has already been
        --    isolated by the checked determinant-nonzero homeomorphism
        --    `sourceFullFrameRealSplitMixedRowsHomeomorph`;
        --    finally apply
        --    `isOpen_sourceFullFrameRealCoord_image_of_kernelMixedCoord_image_open`
        --    for the finite coordinate equivalence.
        -- 9. Prove `chart_eq_kernel_mixed` from the checked complex
        --    full-frame chart formula plus
        --    `sourceFullFrameOrientedCoordOfSource_sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant`
        --    and
        --    `sourceSelectedMixedRows_sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant`.
        -- 10. Assemble `SourceFullFrameRealCompatibleImplicitChartData`;
        --     the downstream conversion to `SourceOrientedLocalRealChartData`
        --     is already checked.
      ```

      The two checked finite-coordinate equalities feeding
      `chart_real_eq` are now
      `sourceFullFrameOrientedCoordOfSource_sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant`
      for the selected full-frame block and
      `sourceSelectedMixedRows_sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant` for the
      mixed rows.  The real-compatible gauge-slice and real IFT layers are now
      checked; the remaining unimplemented producer content is the shrunken
      source patch and the local finite-product open-image theorem, not any
      determinant or mixed-row coordinate bookkeeping.  Lean checkpoint,

      derivative at the origin.  Lean-facing implementation has
      now checked the algebraic real-form chain
      `sourceFullFrameSymmetricEquationDerivCLM_realComplexify_im`,
      `sourceFullFrameRealCompatibleKernelProjection_im_zero`,
      `sourceFullFrameGaugeSliceMapSymmetric_realComplexify_sub_base_im`, and
      `sourceFullFrameRealCompatibleExplicitKernelMap_real_im`.  These four
      facts isolate all real-coefficient algebra before the real IFT: the
      first shows the restricted equation derivative is real on complexified
      real symmetric coordinates, the second shows the explicit
      determinant-direction projection preserves the real form, the third
      shows the nonlinear gauge-slice coordinate minus the real base remains
      real on complexified real slice inputs, and the fourth composes them for
      the explicit kernel map.  The final normalized real-form theorem is now
      checked as `sourceFullFrameRealCompatibleNormalizedKernelMap_real_im`:
      it decomposes finite complex coordinates into real and imaginary parts,
      uses `F.complexCoordEquiv_real_eq` on each part, and applies injectivity
      of `sourceFullFrameRealSliceKernelCoordEquiv` to make the imaginary
      coordinate vector vanish.  The real restriction and real IFT layer are
      also checked: `sourceFullFrameRealCompatibleNormalizedKernelMapReal`
      takes the coordinatewise real part of the explicit normalized complex
      map on complexified real coordinates,
      `sourceFullFrameRealCompatibleNormalizedKernelMapReal_complexify`
      recovers the complex map after complexification,
      `sourceFullFrameRealCompatibleNormalizedKernelMapReal_hasStrictFDerivAt`
      proves identity strict derivative over `ŌäØ` by restricting the complex
      derivative and composing coordinatewise `ofReal`/`re`, and
      `sourceFullFrameRealCompatibleNormalizedKernelOpenPartialHomeomorph`
      packages the real inverse-function chart with checked origin
      source/target membership.  The remaining full-frame chart producer is
      now a packaging/shrink step: use this real local homeomorphism to define
      `realKernelCoord` on the local target-preimage frame domain, use the
      explicit complex kernel map for `complexKernelCoord`, prove
      `complexKernelCoord_real_eq` by the checked complexification identity
      plus local inverse uniqueness, and combine it with the selected-frame
      domain and open-image theorem.  Lean-facing correction, 2026-05-09:
      because this real inverse-function chart is an `OpenPartialHomeomorph`,
      its inverse coordinate is continuous on the chart target rather than as
      a global total function.  The checked API now records
      `ContinuousOn realKernelCoord frameDomain` in
      `SourceFullFrameRealGaugeSliceData` and
      `ContinuousOn realCoord E0` in the local real chart data; the
      totally-real seed proof only uses continuity on those local open
      domains.  The frame-domain half of that packaging is now checked:
      `sourceFullFrameRealCompatibleFrameTargetCoordR` is the real
      finite-coordinate target map, `sourceFullFrameRealCompatibleFrameDomain`
      is the preimage of the real IFT target intersected with
      determinant-nonzero frames, and
      `sourceFullFrameRealCompatibleFrameKernelCoordR` is the local inverse
      coordinate on that domain.
      `sourceFullFrameRealGaugeSliceData_of_frameKernelCoord` is also
      checked: once a compatible complex selected-frame coordinate is
      supplied, it assembles the full `SourceFullFrameRealGaugeSliceData`
      packet mechanically.  The common compatible complex coordinate is now
      checked as `sourceFullFrameRealCompatibleComplexKernelCoordFromReal`,
      a total zero extension away from the real locus whose real-locus
      equation is
      `sourceFullFrameRealCompatibleComplexKernelCoordFromReal_real_eq`; hence
      `sourceFullFrameRealGaugeSliceData_of_frameKernelCoord_realExtension`
      supplies the real gauge-slice packet from the checked frame-domain data,
      and `sourceFullFrameRealGaugeSliceData` now packages it at any real
      determinant-nonzero full-frame base.
      The hard producer still remaining is
      `sourceFullFrameRealCompatibleImplicitChartData`, which must construct
      the shrunken source patch from a real full-frame determinant-nonzero
      point.  The next unproved theorem is not a global selected-frame
      open-map statement; it is the local selected-frame/product open-image
      theorem
      `sourceFullFrameRealSplitProductKernelCoord_open_after_homeomorph_on_W`
      on the chosen determinant-nonzero split neighborhood `W`.  The checked
      bridge
      `sourceFullFrameRealSplitKernelMixedCoord_open_on_W_of_product_homeomorph_open`
      then converts it to the split-kernel/mixed open-image theorem consumed
      downstream.  Its proof must combine the checked source split
      homeomorphism, the checked determinant-nonzero triangular tail/mixed-row
      homeomorphism `sourceFullFrameRealSplitMixedRowsHomeomorph`, and a
      selected-frame local product/submersion chart whose first coordinate is
      the real IFT-selected frame coordinate.  This is the
      exact open-map input used to fill the
      `SourceFullFrameRealCompatibleImplicitChartData.realCoord_image_open`
      field.  The split-image bridge is now checked:
      `sourceFullFrameRealKernelMixedCoord_image_eq_split` rewrites the source
      coordinate image as the image of
      `sourceFullFrameRealSplitKernelMixedCoord` over
      `sourceRealFullFrameSplitHomeomorph '' U`, so the remaining open-map
      theorem is precisely local openness of this finite-product map on the
      chosen split neighborhood.

      In the small-arity theorem the determinant-coordinate family is empty,
      so oriented regularity is the checked pure-Gram regularity after
      extensional rewriting of `SourceOrientedGramData.det`.  In the
      full-frame theorem the nonzero determinant condition gives the
      real-compatible full-frame chart above; the determinant cofactor rows add
      exactly the missing oriented equations, and the real Jacobian rank equals
      the complex tangent rank because all Gram and determinant coordinate
      polynomials have real coefficients.  The checked intermediate bridge is
      `sourceOrientedRealEnvironment_of_fullFrameDetNonzero_localCharts`: once
      the pointwise local chart theorem is available, a source-open Jost patch
      with a fixed nonzero determinant sheet is immediately an
      `IsHWOrientedRealEnvironment`.  The final OS45 subpatch theorem is the
      producer that the adjacent compact-Wick seed must use: first use
      `os45Figure24_checkedRealPatch_gramEnvironmentSubpatch` to obtain a
      smaller pure-Gram real environment `O` inside the ŽĆ-permuted Gram image,
      then shrink over `O` in the small-arity branch; in the hard range use a
      selected determinant-nonzero subpatch as well.  The theorem
      `os45Figure24_checkedRealPatch_fullFrameGramEnvironmentSubpatch` is the
      checked producer for the hard branch: nonvanishing of
      `sourceRealFullFrameDet` is open and dense, so the checked OS45 real
      patch contains a full-frame point after the ŽĆ-permutation; intersecting
      with that determinant-open set and then applying
      `sourceRealGramMap_realEnvironmentAt_of_regular` gives a smaller
      pure-Gram real environment `O` inside the determinant-regular subpatch's
      Gram image.  It is not valid to assert that an arbitrary source-open
      restriction of a pure-Gram environment is again an `IsHWRealEnvironment`
      on the full restricted Gram image: relative openness is a Gram-variety
      condition and must be rebuilt from a regular point.  The next oriented
      producer therefore shrinks over this `O`; it may not reuse a whole
      `gramEnvironment` field after determinant signs have been forgotten.

      This raw distributional anchor deliberately does **not** carry an
      oriented uniqueness field.  The full Figure-2-4 real patch may have to
      be shrunk to a determinant-regular oriented subpatch before the
      totally-real uniqueness theorem applies.  The later
      `OS45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedRealSeed` stores that shrunken
      ŽĆ-permuted patch and its
      `sourceOrientedDistributionalUniquenessPatch` proof.  The
      `oriented_right_eq_perm_left` field here is only finite algebra from
      `sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant_permAct`; it is not a new analytic
      assumption.  The `realPatch_commonEdge_contact` field records the
      real Figure-2-4 common-edge provenance.  The scalarization chart has a
      separate `commonEdge_mem` field for the real common-edge source
      invariant and a separate `quarterTurn_mem` field for the later
      quarter-turn path endpoint.  These two fields must not be identified:
      doing so would assert that the quarter-turned complex point is a real
      embedding.  The contact field is supplied by the corrected canonical
      source patch: the real-patch point is the `ŽĆ`-permutation of
      `xcontact = os45CommonEdgeRealPoint 1 xseed`, while the source witness
      in `hChart.commonEdge_mem` is `xseed`.  It is not supplied by an
      equal-time property of `xseed`.  Thus the compact OS-I anchor supplies
      distributional equality, real sector membership, and real common-edge
      contact, while the seed producer supplies the oriented uniqueness patch
      after the necessary shrink.

      Compact-to-oriented-seed transcript.  This is the oriented analog of
      the checked pure-Gram pair
      `sourceAnchor_compactBranchEq_pointwise_on_realPatch` and
      `sourceScalarRepresentative_adjacent_seed_eq_on_environment`.  It is
      where the OS-I compact branch equality is converted into equality of
      the oriented scalar representative on the ŽĆ-permuted real patch:

      ```lean
      theorem BHW.extendF_continuousOn_realPatch_left
          [NeZero d]
          (n : Nat)
          (F : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé)
          (hF_holo : DifferentiableOn Ōäé F (BHW.ForwardTube d n))
          (hF_cinv :
            ŌłĆ (╬ø : ComplexLorentzGroup d)
              (z : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé),
              z Ōłł BHW.ForwardTube d n ->
              BHW.complexLorentzAction ╬ø z Ōłł BHW.ForwardTube d n ->
              F (BHW.complexLorentzAction ╬ø z) = F z)
          (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (hAnchor :
            BHW.SourceOrientedDistributionalAdjacentTubeAnchor
              (d := d) n i hi F)
          (ŽĆ : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) :
          ContinuousOn
            (fun x => BHW.extendF F (fun k => BHW.realEmbed x (ŽĆ k)))
            (hAnchor.realPatch ŽĆ) := by
        have hExtend_cont :
            ContinuousOn (BHW.extendF F) (BHW.ExtendedTube d n) :=
          (BHW.extendF_holomorphicOn n F hF_holo hF_cinv).continuousOn
        have hbranch_cont :
            Continuous
              (fun x : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ =>
                fun k => BHW.realEmbed x (ŽĆ k)) :=
          BHW.continuous_realEmbedNPoint.comp
            (BHW.continuous_permNPoint (d := d) (n := n) ŽĆ)
        exact hExtend_cont.comp hbranch_cont.continuousOn
          (by
            intro x hx
            simpa [BHW.permutedExtendedTubeSector, BHW.realEmbed] using
              hAnchor.realPatch_left_sector ŽĆ x hx)

      theorem BHW.extendF_continuousOn_realPatch_right
          [NeZero d]
          (n : Nat)
          (F : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé)
          (hF_holo : DifferentiableOn Ōäé F (BHW.ForwardTube d n))
          (hF_cinv :
            ŌłĆ (╬ø : ComplexLorentzGroup d)
              (z : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé),
              z Ōłł BHW.ForwardTube d n ->
              BHW.complexLorentzAction ╬ø z Ōłł BHW.ForwardTube d n ->
              F (BHW.complexLorentzAction ╬ø z) = F z)
          (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (hAnchor :
            BHW.SourceOrientedDistributionalAdjacentTubeAnchor
              (d := d) n i hi F)
          (ŽĆ : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) :
          ContinuousOn
            (fun x =>
              BHW.extendF F
                (fun k => BHW.realEmbed x
                  ((ŽĆ * Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®) k)))
            (hAnchor.realPatch ŽĆ) := by
        let Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n) := Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®
        have hExtend_cont :
            ContinuousOn (BHW.extendF F) (BHW.ExtendedTube d n) :=
          (BHW.extendF_holomorphicOn n F hF_holo hF_cinv).continuousOn
        have hbranch_cont :
            Continuous
              (fun x : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ =>
                fun k => BHW.realEmbed x ((ŽĆ * Žä) k)) :=
          BHW.continuous_realEmbedNPoint.comp
            (BHW.continuous_permNPoint
              (d := d) (n := n) (ŽĆ * Žä))
        exact hExtend_cont.comp hbranch_cont.continuousOn
          (by
            intro x hx
            simpa [BHW.permutedExtendedTubeSector, BHW.realEmbed, Žä] using
              hAnchor.realPatch_right_sector ŽĆ x hx)

      theorem BHW.sourceOrientedAnchor_compactBranchEq_pointwise_on_realPatch
          [NeZero d]
          (n : Nat)
          (F : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé)
          (hF_holo : DifferentiableOn Ōäé F (BHW.ForwardTube d n))
          (hF_cinv :
            ŌłĆ (╬ø : ComplexLorentzGroup d)
              (z : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé),
              z Ōłł BHW.ForwardTube d n ->
              BHW.complexLorentzAction ╬ø z Ōłł BHW.ForwardTube d n ->
              F (BHW.complexLorentzAction ╬ø z) = F z)
          (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (hAnchor :
            BHW.SourceOrientedDistributionalAdjacentTubeAnchor
              (d := d) n i hi F)
          (ŽĆ : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) :
          ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł hAnchor.realPatch ŽĆ ->
            BHW.extendF F (fun k => BHW.realEmbed x (ŽĆ k)) =
              BHW.extendF F
                (fun k => BHW.realEmbed x
                  ((ŽĆ * Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®) k)) := by
        let Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n) := Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®
        let L : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ) -> Ōäé :=
          fun x => BHW.extendF F (fun k => BHW.realEmbed x (ŽĆ k))
        let R : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ) -> Ōäé :=
          fun x =>
            BHW.extendF F
              (fun k => BHW.realEmbed x ((ŽĆ * Žä) k))
        have hL_cont :
            ContinuousOn L (hAnchor.realPatch ŽĆ) := by
          exact
            BHW.extendF_continuousOn_realPatch_left
              (d := d) (n := n) F hF_holo hF_cinv
              i hi hAnchor ŽĆ
        have hR_cont :
            ContinuousOn R (hAnchor.realPatch ŽĆ) := by
          exact
            BHW.extendF_continuousOn_realPatch_right
              (d := d) (n := n) F hF_holo hF_cinv
              i hi hAnchor ŽĆ
        have hEqOn : Set.EqOn L R (hAnchor.realPatch ŽĆ) := by
          exact
            SCV.eqOn_open_of_compactSupport_schwartz_integral_eq_of_continuousOn
              (hAnchor.realPatch_open ŽĆ)
              hL_cont
              hR_cont
              (by
                intro Žå hŽå_compact hŽå_tsupport
                simpa [L, R, Žä] using
                  hAnchor.compact_branch_eq
                    ŽĆ Žå hŽå_compact hŽå_tsupport)
        intro x hx
        exact hEqOn hx

      theorem BHW.sourceOrientedScalarRepresentative_adjacent_seed_eq_on_patch
          [NeZero d]
          (n : Nat)
          (F : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé)
          (hF_holo : DifferentiableOn Ōäé F (BHW.ForwardTube d n))
          (hF_cinv :
            ŌłĆ (╬ø : ComplexLorentzGroup d)
              (z : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé),
              z Ōłł BHW.ForwardTube d n ->
              BHW.complexLorentzAction ╬ø z Ōłł BHW.ForwardTube d n ->
              F (BHW.complexLorentzAction ╬ø z) = F z)
          (hRep :
            BHW.SourceOrientedScalarRepresentativeData (d := d) n F)
          (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (hAnchor :
            BHW.SourceOrientedDistributionalAdjacentTubeAnchor
              (d := d) n i hi F)
          (ŽĆ : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) :
          let Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n) := Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®
          ŌłĆ y,
            y Ōłł {y | Ōłā x Ōłł hAnchor.realPatch ŽĆ,
              y = fun k => x (ŽĆ k)} ->
            hRep.Phi
                (BHW.sourcePermuteOrientedGram d n Žä
                  (BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n y)) =
              hRep.Phi (BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n y) := by
        dsimp
        intro y hy
        rcases hy with Ō¤©x, hxPatch, rflŌ¤®
        let Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n) := Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®
        have hpoint :
            BHW.extendF F (fun k => BHW.realEmbed x (ŽĆ k)) =
              BHW.extendF F (fun k => BHW.realEmbed x ((ŽĆ * Žä) k)) := by
          simpa [Žä] using
            BHW.sourceOrientedAnchor_compactBranchEq_pointwise_on_realPatch
              (d := d) n F hF_holo hF_cinv i hi hAnchor ŽĆ x hxPatch
        have hleft_ET :
            BHW.realEmbed (fun k => x (ŽĆ k)) Ōłł BHW.ExtendedTube d n := by
          simpa [BHW.permutedExtendedTubeSector, BHW.realEmbed] using
            hAnchor.realPatch_left_sector ŽĆ x hxPatch
        have hright_ET :
            BHW.realEmbed (fun k => x ((ŽĆ * Žä) k)) Ōłł
              BHW.ExtendedTube d n := by
      ```
