      ```lean
          simpa [BHW.permutedExtendedTubeSector, BHW.realEmbed, Žä] using
            hAnchor.realPatch_right_sector ŽĆ x hxPatch
        have hleft :
            hRep.Phi
                (BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
                  (fun k => x (ŽĆ k))) =
              BHW.extendF F (fun k => BHW.realEmbed x (ŽĆ k)) := by
          exact hRep.branch_eq
            (BHW.realEmbed (fun k => x (ŽĆ k))) hleft_ET
        have hright :
            hRep.Phi
                (BHW.sourcePermuteOrientedGram d n Žä
                  (BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
                    (fun k => x (ŽĆ k)))) =
              BHW.extendF F (fun k => BHW.realEmbed x ((ŽĆ * Žä) k)) := by
          rw [ŌåÉ hAnchor.oriented_right_eq_perm_left ŽĆ x hxPatch]
          exact hRep.branch_eq
            (BHW.realEmbed (fun k => x ((ŽĆ * Žä) k))) hright_ET
        exact hright.trans (hpoint.symm.trans hleft.symm)
      ```

      The `realPatch_left_sector` and `realPatch_right_sector` fields are
      required here for actual `ExtendedTube` membership of the two real
      configurations.  Membership of the oriented invariant in
      `sourceOrientedExtendedTubeDomain` is not enough by itself, because it
      only gives some extended-tube realization of the same oriented scalar
      datum, not membership of the specific real point needed by
      `hRep.branch_eq`.  The continuity helpers above deliberately take the
      complex-Lorentz invariance hypothesis `hF_cinv`, not merely restricted
      real Lorentz invariance: their proof is
      `(BHW.extendF_holomorphicOn n F hF_holo hF_cinv).continuousOn`
      composed with the real-patch embeddings.  In the specialization to
      `bvt_F OS lgc n`, this hypothesis is supplied by
      `bvt_F_complexLorentzInvariant_forwardTube` transported across
      `BHW_forwardTube_eq`; the restricted theorem
      `bvt_F_restrictedLorentzInvariant_forwardTube` is not enough for this
      `extendF` continuity step.

      The equality direction in
      `sourceOrientedScalarRepresentative_adjacent_seed_eq_on_patch` is also
      fixed intentionally.  Downstream uniqueness propagates the germ
      `G Ōå” hRep.Phi (sourcePermuteOrientedGram d n Žä G)` against
      `hRep.Phi`, so the real-patch seed must be written as
      `permuted = identity`.  Writing the pointwise equality in the opposite
      direction would force an extra symmetry rewrite at the uniqueness call
      and is not the implementation-facing API.

      With this anchor, the generic oriented corridor propagation mirrors the
      checked pure-Gram theorem
      `BHW.os45AdjacentScalarEq_on_quarterTurnCorridor`:

      ```lean
      theorem BHW.os45AdjacentOrientedScalarEq_on_quarterTurnCorridor
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          {F : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé}
          (hRep :
            BHW.SourceOrientedScalarRepresentativeData (d := d) n F)
          (Wseed Wscal :
            Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n))
          (hWscal_relOpen :
            BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety d n Wscal)
          (hWscal_connected : IsConnected Wscal)
          (hWseed_relOpen :
            BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety d n Wseed)
          (hWseed_nonempty : Wseed.Nonempty)
          (hWseed_subset : Wseed ŌŖå Wscal)
          (hWscal_double :
            Wscal ŌŖå
              BHW.sourceOrientedDoublePermutationDomain d n
                (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®))
          (hSeed :
            let Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n) :=
              Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®
            Set.EqOn
              (fun G =>
                hRep.Phi (BHW.sourcePermuteOrientedGram d n Žä G))
              hRep.Phi
              Wseed) :
          let Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n) :=
            Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®
          Set.EqOn
            (fun G =>
              hRep.Phi (BHW.sourcePermuteOrientedGram d n Žä G))
            hRep.Phi
            Wscal := by
        classical
        dsimp
        let Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n) := Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®
        let ╬” : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n -> Ōäé :=
          fun G => hRep.Phi (BHW.sourcePermuteOrientedGram d n Žä G)
        let ╬© : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n -> Ōäé := hRep.Phi
        have hWscal_subset_U : Wscal ŌŖå hRep.U := by
          intro G hG
          have hdouble :
              G Ōłł BHW.sourceOrientedDoublePermutationDomain d n Žä := by
            simpa [Žä] using hWscal_double hG
          simpa [hRep.U_eq] using hdouble.1
        have hWscal_subset_permU :
            Wscal ŌŖå
              {G | BHW.sourcePermuteOrientedGram d n Žä G Ōłł hRep.U} := by
          intro G hG
          have hdouble :
              G Ōłł BHW.sourceOrientedDoublePermutationDomain d n Žä := by
            simpa [Žä] using hWscal_double hG
          simpa [hRep.U_eq] using hdouble.2
        have h╬©_holo :
            BHW.SourceOrientedVarietyGermHolomorphicOn d n ╬© Wscal := by
          exact
            BHW.SourceOrientedVarietyGermHolomorphicOn.of_subset_relOpen
              (d := d) (n := n) hRep.Phi_holomorphic
              hWscal_relOpen hWscal_subset_U
        have h╬”_holo :
            BHW.SourceOrientedVarietyGermHolomorphicOn d n ╬” Wscal := by
          have hpre :
              BHW.SourceOrientedVarietyGermHolomorphicOn d n ╬”
                {G | BHW.sourcePermuteOrientedGram d n Žä G Ōłł hRep.U} := by
            simpa [╬”] using
              BHW.SourceOrientedVarietyGermHolomorphicOn.precomp_sourcePermuteOrientedGram
                (d := d) (n := n) hRep.Phi_holomorphic Žä
          exact
            BHW.SourceOrientedVarietyGermHolomorphicOn.of_subset_relOpen
              (d := d) (n := n) hpre hWscal_relOpen
              hWscal_subset_permU
        let H : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n -> Ōäé :=
          fun G => ╬” G - ╬© G
        have hH_holo :
            BHW.SourceOrientedVarietyGermHolomorphicOn d n H Wscal := by
          simpa [H] using
            BHW.SourceOrientedVarietyGermHolomorphicOn.sub
              (d := d) (n := n) h╬”_holo h╬©_holo
        have hW_zero : Set.EqOn H 0 Wseed := by
          intro G hGW
          have hEq := hSeed hGW
          exact sub_eq_zero.mpr hEq
        have hH_zero : Set.EqOn H 0 Wscal :=
          BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety_identity_principle
            (d := d) (n := n) hd hWscal_relOpen hWscal_connected
            hWseed_relOpen hWseed_nonempty hWseed_subset hH_holo
            hW_zero
        intro G hGW
        have hzero := hH_zero hGW
        simpa [H, ╬”, ╬©, Žä] using sub_eq_zero.mp hzero
      ```

      The oriented adjacent `S'_n` theorem surfaces are therefore:

      ```lean
      structure BHW.OS45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarizationChart
          [NeZero d]
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          {F : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé}
          (hRep : BHW.SourceOrientedScalarRepresentativeData
            (d := d) n F) where
        Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)
        Žä_eq : Žä = Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®
        Wscal : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n)
        Wscal_relOpen :
          BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety d n Wscal
        Wscal_connected : IsConnected Wscal
        Wscal_double :
          Wscal ŌŖå BHW.sourceOrientedDoublePermutationDomain d n Žä
        Wscal_component :
          Ōłā Gbase Ōłł Wscal,
            Wscal =
              connectedComponentIn
                (BHW.sourceOrientedDoublePermutationDomain d n Žä) Gbase
        commonEdge_mem :
          ŌłĆ x Ōłł BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch (d := d) (n := n) i hi,
            BHW.sourceRealOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
              (BHW.os45CommonEdgeRealPoint
                (d := d) (n := n)
                (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) x) Ōłł Wscal
        quarterTurn_mem :
          ŌłĆ x Ōłł BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch (d := d) (n := n) i hi,
            BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
              ((BHW.os45QuarterTurnCLE (d := d) (n := n)).symm
                (BHW.realEmbed
                  (BHW.os45CommonEdgeRealPoint
                    (d := d) (n := n)
                    (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) x))) Ōłł Wscal

      def BHW.OS45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedSourceEq
          [NeZero d]
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          {F : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé}
          (hRep : BHW.SourceOrientedScalarRepresentativeData
            (d := d) n F)
          (hChart :
            BHW.OS45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarizationChart
              (d := d) n i hi hRep) : Prop :=
        Set.EqOn
          (fun G =>
            hRep.Phi
              (BHW.sourcePermuteOrientedGram d n hChart.Žä G))
          hRep.Phi
          hChart.Wscal

      structure BHW.OS45CompactFigure24WickPairingEq
          [NeZero d]
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
          (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS) : Prop where
        realPatch :
          Equiv.Perm (Fin n) ->
          Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ)
        realPatch_open :
          ŌłĆ ŽĆ, IsOpen (realPatch ŽĆ)
        realPatch_nonempty :
          ŌłĆ ŽĆ, (realPatch ŽĆ).Nonempty
        realPatch_jost :
          ŌłĆ ŽĆ, realPatch ŽĆ ŌŖå BHW.JostSet d n
        realPatch_left_sector :
          ŌłĆ ŽĆ x, x Ōłł realPatch ŽĆ ->
            BHW.realEmbed x Ōłł BHW.permutedExtendedTubeSector d n ŽĆ
        realPatch_right_sector :
          ŌłĆ ŽĆ x, x Ōłł realPatch ŽĆ ->
            BHW.realEmbed x Ōłł
              BHW.permutedExtendedTubeSector d n
                (ŽĆ * Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®)
        realPatch_commonEdge_contact :
          ŌłĆ ŽĆ, Ōłā x0 Ōłł realPatch ŽĆ,
            Ōłā u Ōłł BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch
                (d := d) (n := n) i hi,
              (fun k => x0 (ŽĆ k)) =
                BHW.os45CommonEdgeRealPoint
                  (d := d) (n := n)
                  (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) u
        compact_branch_eq :
          ŌłĆ ŽĆ (Žå : SchwartzMap
              (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ) Ōäé),
            HasCompactSupport
              (Žå : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ) -> Ōäé) ->
            tsupport
              (Žå : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ) -> Ōäé) ŌŖå
              realPatch ŽĆ ->
            Ōł½ x : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ,
                BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                  (fun k => BHW.realEmbed x (ŽĆ k)) * Žå x
              =
            Ōł½ x : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ,
                BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                  (fun k => BHW.realEmbed x
                    ((ŽĆ * Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®) k)) *
                  Žå x

      /-- Permutation homeomorphism from the canonical Figure-2-4 source
      patch to the `ŽĆ`-labelled real patch.  This is deliberately **not** the
      half-time common-edge map: the compact Wick-pairing packet lives on the
      real PET-overlap patch where both adjacent `extendF` branches are
      ordinary extended-tube values.  The OS45 common edge enters later only
      through the boundary/Jost comparison at selected contact points. -/
      noncomputable def BHW.os45SourcePermutationHomeomorph
          (d n : Nat)
          (ŽĆ : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) :
          (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ) ŌēāŌé£
            (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ) where
        toEquiv :=
          { toFun := fun u k ╬╝ => u (ŽĆ.symm k) ╬╝
            invFun := fun x k ╬╝ => x (ŽĆ k) ╬╝
            left_inv := by
              intro u
              ext k ╬╝
              simp
            right_inv := by
              intro x
              ext k ╬╝
              simp }
        continuous_toFun := by
          fun_prop
        continuous_invFun := by
          fun_prop

      def BHW.os45Figure24CompactRealPatch
          [NeZero d]
          (n : Nat)
          (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (ŽĆ : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) :
          Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ) :=
        BHW.os45SourcePermutationHomeomorph d n ŽĆ ''
          BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch (d := d) (n := n) i hi

      theorem BHW.os45Figure24CompactRealPatch_open
          [NeZero d]
          (n : Nat)
          (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (ŽĆ : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) :
          IsOpen
            (BHW.os45Figure24CompactRealPatch (d := d) n i hi ŽĆ) := by
        rw [BHW.os45Figure24CompactRealPatch]
        exact
          (BHW.os45SourcePermutationHomeomorph d n ŽĆ).isOpenMap _
            (BHW.isOpen_os45Figure24SourcePatch
              (d := d) (n := n) i hi)

      theorem BHW.os45Figure24CompactRealPatch_nonempty
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat)
          (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (ŽĆ : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) :
          (BHW.os45Figure24CompactRealPatch (d := d) n i hi ŽĆ).Nonempty := by
        rcases BHW.nonempty_os45Figure24SourcePatch
            (d := d) hd n i hi with Ō¤©u, huŌ¤®
        exact
          Ō¤©BHW.os45SourcePermutationHomeomorph d n ŽĆ u,
            u, hu, rflŌ¤®

      theorem BHW.os45Figure24CompactRealPatch_commonEdge_contact
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat)
          (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (ŽĆ : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) :
          Ōłā x0 Ōłł BHW.os45Figure24CompactRealPatch (d := d) n i hi ŽĆ,
            Ōłā u Ōłł BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch
                (d := d) (n := n) i hi,
              (fun k => x0 (ŽĆ k)) =
                BHW.os45CommonEdgeRealPoint
                  (d := d) (n := n)
                  (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) u := by
        let P :=
          BHW.os45_adjacent_identity_canonicalSourcePatch
            (d := d) hd i hi
        have hPsource :
            P.V =
              BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch (d := d) (n := n) i hi := by
          exact (BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch_eq_canonical
            (d := d) hd n i hi).symm
        let u := P.xseed
        let xcontact := P.xcontact
        have hu : u Ōłł BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch
            (d := d) (n := n) i hi := by
          simpa [u, hPsource] using P.xseed_mem
        have hxcontact : xcontact Ōłł
            BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch
              (d := d) (n := n) i hi := by
          simpa [xcontact, hPsource] using P.xcontact_mem
        have hcontact :
            xcontact =
              BHW.os45CommonEdgeRealPoint (d := d) (n := n)
                (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) u := by
          simpa [xcontact, u] using P.xcontact_commonEdge
        refine
          Ō¤©BHW.os45SourcePermutationHomeomorph d n ŽĆ xcontact,
            Ō¤©xcontact, hxcontact, rflŌ¤®, u, hu, ?_Ō¤®
        ext k ╬╝
        simp [BHW.os45SourcePermutationHomeomorph, hcontact]

      theorem BHW.os45Figure24CompactRealPatch_jost
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (ŽĆ : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) :
          BHW.os45Figure24CompactRealPatch (d := d) n i hi ŽĆ ŌŖå
            BHW.JostSet d n := by
        intro x hx
        rcases hx with Ō¤©u, hu, rflŌ¤®
        exact
          BHW.jostSet_permutation_invariant
            (d := d) (n := n) ŽĆ.symm
            (BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch_jost
              (d := d) hd n i hi hu)

      theorem BHW.os45Figure24CompactRealPatch_left_sector
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (ŽĆ : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) :
          ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł BHW.os45Figure24CompactRealPatch (d := d) n i hi ŽĆ ->
            BHW.realEmbed x Ōłł BHW.permutedExtendedTubeSector d n ŽĆ := by
        intro x hx
        rcases hx with Ō¤©u, hu, rflŌ¤®
        simpa [BHW.os45Figure24CompactRealPatch,
          BHW.os45SourcePermutationHomeomorph,
          BHW.permutedExtendedTubeSector, BHW.realEmbed] using
          BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch_realEmbed_mem_extendedTube
            (d := d) hd n i hi u hu

      theorem BHW.os45Figure24CompactRealPatch_right_sector
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (ŽĆ : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) :
          ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł BHW.os45Figure24CompactRealPatch (d := d) n i hi ŽĆ ->
            BHW.realEmbed x Ōłł
              BHW.permutedExtendedTubeSector d n
                (ŽĆ * Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®) := by
        intro x hx
        rcases hx with Ō¤©u, hu, rflŌ¤®
        simpa [BHW.os45Figure24CompactRealPatch,
          BHW.os45SourcePermutationHomeomorph,
          BHW.permutedExtendedTubeSector, BHW.realEmbed,
          Equiv.Perm.mul_apply] using
          BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch_swapRealEmbed_mem_extendedTube
            (d := d) hd n i hi u hu

      Lean-readiness boundary for the real-patch block: the eight declarations
      above are now fully certified as a finite-permutation layer.  Their only
      inputs are the checked canonical source patch, `Homeomorph.isOpenMap`,
      `BHW.jostSet_permutation_invariant`, and the definitional API
      `BHW.permutedExtendedTubeSector z ŽĆ Ōåö
      (fun k => z (ŽĆ k)) Ōłł BHW.ExtendedTube d n`.  They do not inspect
      `extendF` and do not use compact Wick equality, scalar representatives,
      PET independence, EOW, or locality.  The next declaration
      `BHW.os45CompactRealPatch_pullbackSchwartz` is now also certified, but
      only as a finite measure-preserving pullback: it uses
      `BHW.permuteSchwartz`, `BHW.tsupport_permuteSchwartz`, injectivity of
      `BHW.os45SourcePermutationHomeomorph`, and
      `(BHW.integral_perm_eq_self ŽĆ.symm h).symm`.  Its Lean surface is
      generic in the branch integrand
      `A : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé`; OS-specific consumers later
      specialize `A := BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)`.  It transports compact
      tests; it still does not prove the compact branch equality stored in
      `BHW.OS45CompactFigure24WickPairingEq`.

      theorem BHW.os45CompactRealPatch_pullbackSchwartz
          [NeZero d]
          (n : Nat)
          (A : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé)
          (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (ŽĆ : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
          (Žå : SchwartzMap (NPointDomain d n) Ōäé)
          (hŽå_comp :
            HasCompactSupport (Žå : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé))
          (hŽå_supp :
            tsupport (Žå : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) ŌŖå
              BHW.os45Figure24CompactRealPatch (d := d) n i hi ŽĆ) :
          Ōłā Žł : SchwartzNPoint d n,
            HasCompactSupport (Žł : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) Ōł¦
            tsupport (Žł : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) ŌŖå
              BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch (d := d) (n := n) i hi Ōł¦
            (ŌłĆ u,
              Žł u =
                Žå (BHW.os45SourcePermutationHomeomorph d n ŽĆ u)) Ōł¦
            (Ōł½ x : NPointDomain d n,
                A (fun k => BHW.realEmbed x (ŽĆ k)) * Žå x)
              =
             Ōł½ u : NPointDomain d n,
                A (BHW.realEmbed u) * Žł u) Ōł¦
            (Ōł½ x : NPointDomain d n,
                A (fun k => BHW.realEmbed x
                  ((ŽĆ * Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®) k)) * Žå x)
              =
             Ōł½ u : NPointDomain d n,
                A (BHW.realEmbed
                  (fun k => u (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤® k))) * Žł u := by
        let Žł : SchwartzNPoint d n :=
          BHW.permuteSchwartz (d := d) ŽĆ.symm Žå
        have hŽł_apply :
            ŌłĆ u,
              Žł u =
                Žå (BHW.os45SourcePermutationHomeomorph d n ŽĆ u) := by
          intro u
          simp [Žł, BHW.os45SourcePermutationHomeomorph]
        have hŽł_comp :
            HasCompactSupport (Žł : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) :=
          BHW.permuteSchwartz_hasCompactSupport
            (d := d) ŽĆ.symm Žå hŽå_comp
        have hŽł_supp :
            tsupport (Žł : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) ŌŖå
              BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch (d := d) (n := n) i hi := by
          intro u hu
          have hpre :
              (((LinearEquiv.funCongrLeft ŌäØ (Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ) ŽĆ.symm).toContinuousLinearEquiv :
                  NPointDomain d n ŌēāL[ŌäØ] NPointDomain d n).toHomeomorph u) Ōłł
                tsupport (Žå : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) := by
            rw [BHW.tsupport_permuteSchwartz (d := d) ŽĆ.symm Žå] at hu
            exact hu
          have hHu :
              BHW.os45SourcePermutationHomeomorph d n ŽĆ u Ōłł
                tsupport (Žå : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) := by
            simpa [BHW.os45SourcePermutationHomeomorph] using hpre
          rcases hŽå_supp hHu with Ō¤©v, hv, hv_eqŌ¤®
          have hvu : v = u :=
            (BHW.os45SourcePermutationHomeomorph d n ŽĆ).injective hv_eq
          simpa [hvu] using hv
        have hleft_pullback :
            (Ōł½ x : NPointDomain d n,
                A (fun k => BHW.realEmbed x (ŽĆ k)) * Žå x)
              =
             Ōł½ u : NPointDomain d n,
                A (BHW.realEmbed u) * Žł u := by
          let h : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé := fun x =>
            A (fun k => BHW.realEmbed x (ŽĆ k)) * Žå x
          have hp :=
            (BHW.integral_perm_eq_self (d := d) (n := n) ŽĆ.symm h).symm
          have harg : ŌłĆ x : NPointDomain d n,
              (fun k => BHW.realEmbed (fun k => x (ŽĆ.symm k)) (ŽĆ k)) =
                BHW.realEmbed x := by
            intro x; ext k ╬╝; simp [BHW.realEmbed]
          simpa [h, Žł, BHW.os45SourcePermutationHomeomorph, harg] using hp
        have hright_pullback :
            (Ōł½ x : NPointDomain d n,
                A (fun k => BHW.realEmbed x
                  ((ŽĆ * Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®) k)) * Žå x)
              =
             Ōł½ u : NPointDomain d n,
                A (BHW.realEmbed
                  (fun k => u (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤® k))) * Žł u := by
          let Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n) := Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®
          let h : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé := fun x =>
            A (fun k => BHW.realEmbed x ((ŽĆ * Žä) k)) * Žå x
          have hp :=
            (BHW.integral_perm_eq_self (d := d) (n := n) ŽĆ.symm h).symm
          have harg : ŌłĆ x : NPointDomain d n,
              (fun k => BHW.realEmbed (fun k => x (ŽĆ.symm k)) (ŽĆ (Žä k))) =
                BHW.realEmbed (fun k => x (Žä k)) := by
            intro x; ext k ╬╝; simp [BHW.realEmbed]
          simpa [h, Žł, Žä, BHW.os45SourcePermutationHomeomorph, harg,
            Equiv.Perm.mul_apply] using hp
        exact Ō¤©Žł, hŽł_comp, hŽł_supp, hŽł_apply,
          hleft_pullback, hright_pullbackŌ¤®

      structure BHW.Figure24LocalChartInput
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
          (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (V : Set (NPointDomain d n))
          (x0 : NPointDomain d n) : Prop where
        V_open : IsOpen V
        V_sourcePatch :
          V ŌŖå BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch (d := d) n i hi
        V_jost : ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V -> x Ōłł BHW.JostSet d n
        V_ET :
          ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V -> BHW.realEmbed x Ōłł BHW.ExtendedTube d n
        V_swapET :
          ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V ->
            BHW.realEmbed
              (fun k => x (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤® k)) Ōłł
              BHW.ExtendedTube d n
        V_ordered :
          ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V ->
            x Ōłł EuclideanOrderedPositiveTimeSector (d := d) (n := n) 1
        V_swap_ordered :
          ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V ->
            (fun k => x (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤® k)) Ōłł
              EuclideanOrderedPositiveTimeSector (d := d) (n := n)
                (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®)
        V_adjLift_ET :
          let Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n) :=
            Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®
          ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V ->
            ŌłĆ t,
              BHW.os45Figure24AdjacentLift
                (d := d) (n := n) hd Žä x t Ōłł
              BHW.ExtendedTube d n
        V_orientedPath_closure :
          ŌłĆ x Ōłł closure V,
            BHW.OS45Figure24OrientedPathField (d := d) n i hi x
        x0_mem : x0 Ōłł V

      /-
      ARCHIVED CIRCULAR TRANSCRIPT, DO NOT PORT.

      The theorem body below instantiates
      `BHW.os45_adjacent_commonBoundaryEnvelope` and the oriented branch-germ
      suppliers.  That is now rejected: the common-boundary envelope is
      downstream of
      `BHW.OS45CompactFigure24WickPairingEq`, the oriented adjacent `S'_n`
      seed/path package, and the branch-local oriented source germs.  The
      active proof of
      `BHW.os45Figure24_sourcePatch_pairing_eq_swappedSourcePatch_of_OSI45`
      must instead be the direct OS I ┬¦4.5 / BHW-Jost compact producer
      documented below:

        checked Wick compact branch-difference zero
          -> OS45SourcePatchBHWJostPairData
          -> distributional zero of P.difference on the selected source patch
          -> checked real-source difference / compact-pairing algebra
          -> source-patch compact branch equality.

      This archived body is retained only to record which common-boundary
      arguments were removed from the active route.
      -/

      theorem BHW.os45Figure24_sourcePatch_pairing_eq_swappedSourcePatch_of_OSI45
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
          (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (V : Set (NPointDomain d n))
          (hV_open : IsOpen V)
          (hV_jost : ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V -> x Ōłł BHW.JostSet d n)
          (hV_ET :
            ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V -> BHW.realEmbed x Ōłł BHW.ExtendedTube d n)
          (hV_swapET :
            ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V ->
              BHW.realEmbed
                (fun k => x (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤® k)) Ōłł
                BHW.ExtendedTube d n)
          (hV_ordered :
            ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V ->
              x Ōłł EuclideanOrderedPositiveTimeSector (d := d) (n := n) 1)
          (hV_swap_ordered :
            ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V ->
              (fun k => x (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤® k)) Ōłł
                EuclideanOrderedPositiveTimeSector (d := d) (n := n)
                  (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®))
          (hV_adjLift_ET :
            let Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n) :=
              Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®
            ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V ->
              ŌłĆ t,
                BHW.os45Figure24AdjacentLift
                  (d := d) (n := n) hd Žä x t Ōłł
                BHW.ExtendedTube d n)
          (hV_sourcePatch :
            V ŌŖå BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch (d := d) n i hi)
          {x0 : NPointDomain d n}
          (hx0V : x0 Ōłł V)
          (hChart :
            BHW.OS45Figure24SourceChartAt hd OS lgc n i hi V x0)
          (hV_orientedPath_closure :
            ŌłĆ x Ōłł closure hChart.V0,
              BHW.OS45Figure24OrientedPathField (d := d) n i hi x)
          (Žł : SchwartzNPoint d n)
          (hŽł_comp :
            HasCompactSupport (Žł : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé))
          (hŽł_supp :
            tsupport (Žł : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) ŌŖå hChart.V0) :
          Ōł½ u : NPointDomain d n,
              BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                (BHW.realEmbed u) * Žł u
            =
          Ōł½ u : NPointDomain d n,
              BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                (BHW.realEmbed
                  (fun k => u (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤® k))) *
                Žł u := by
        classical
        let Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n) :=
          Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®
        -- Step 1: the checked OS45 Euclidean edge theorem gives compact
        -- vanishing of the Wick-side branch difference on the selected chart
        -- patch.  This is the only use of Euclidean symmetry here.
        have hwick_pairing_zero_all :
            ŌłĆ (Žć : SchwartzNPoint d n),
              HasCompactSupport (Žć : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) ->
              tsupport (Žć : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) ŌŖå hChart.V0 ->
              Ōł½ x : NPointDomain d n,
                  (bvt_F OS lgc n (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x (Žä k))) -
                    bvt_F OS lgc n (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x k))) *
                    Žć x = 0 := by
          intro Žć hŽć_comp hŽć_supp
          have hwick_eq :
              Ōł½ x : NPointDomain d n,
                  bvt_F OS lgc n (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x (Žä k))) *
                    Žć x
                =
              Ōł½ x : NPointDomain d n,
                  bvt_F OS lgc n (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x k)) *
                    Žć x := by
            exact
              os45_adjacent_euclideanEdge_pairing_eq_on_timeSector
                (d := d) OS lgc n i hi hChart.V0
                (fun x hx => hV_jost x (hChart.V0_sub hx))
                (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
                (fun x hx => hV_ordered x (hChart.V0_sub hx))
                (by
                  intro x hx
                  simpa [Žä, Equiv.swap_inv, one_mul] using
                    hV_swap_ordered x (hChart.V0_sub hx))
                Žć hŽć_supp
          have hleft_int :
              Integrable
                (fun x : NPointDomain d n =>
                  bvt_F OS lgc n
                    (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x (Žä k))) * Žć x) :=
            (BHW.integrable_pairings_of_os45_adjacent_euclideanEdge_on_timeSector
              (d := d) OS lgc n i hi hChart.V0
              (fun x hx => hV_jost x (hChart.V0_sub hx))
              (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
              (fun x hx => hV_ordered x (hChart.V0_sub hx))
              (by
                intro x hx
                simpa [Žä, Equiv.swap_inv, one_mul] using
                  hV_swap_ordered x (hChart.V0_sub hx))
              Žć hŽć_comp hŽć_supp).1
          have hright_int :
              Integrable
                (fun x : NPointDomain d n =>
                  bvt_F OS lgc n
                    (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x k)) * Žć x) :=
            (BHW.integrable_pairings_of_os45_adjacent_euclideanEdge_on_timeSector
              (d := d) OS lgc n i hi hChart.V0
              (fun x hx => hV_jost x (hChart.V0_sub hx))
              (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
              (fun x hx => hV_ordered x (hChart.V0_sub hx))
              (by
                intro x hx
                simpa [Žä, Equiv.swap_inv, one_mul] using
                  hV_swap_ordered x (hChart.V0_sub hx))
              Žć hŽć_comp hŽć_supp).2
          -- Rewrite equality of the two compact Wick pairings as vanishing
          -- of the paired Wick branch difference.  The integrability facts
          -- are the standard compact-support/continuous-branch estimates for
          -- the two Wick traces.
          exact
            BHW.integral_wickBranchDifference_mul_eq_zero_of_pairing_eq
              (d := d) OS lgc n Žä Žć hleft_int hright_int hwick_eq
        -- Step 2: build the genuine OS45 common-boundary envelope.  Its
        -- trace formulas identify one holomorphic chart function `Hc` with
        -- the Wick branch difference on the Wick trace and with the real
        -- source PET-overlap branch difference on the real trace.
        rcases
          BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch_sourceEnvironment
            (d := d) hd n i hi with
          Ō¤©Ufig, hUfig_open, hSourcePatch_closure, hUfig_sourceŌ¤®
        have hV0_sub_sourcePatch :
            hChart.V0 ŌŖå
              BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch (d := d) n i hi := by
          intro x hx
          exact hV_sourcePatch (hChart.V0_sub hx)
        have hV0_closure_sub_Ufig :
            closure hChart.V0 ŌŖå Ufig := by
          intro x hx
          exact hSourcePatch_closure
            (closure_mono hV0_sub_sourcePatch hx)
        obtain
          Ō¤©Uc, Hc, hUc_open, hUc_conn, hHc_holo,
            hwick_mem_c, hreal_mem_c, hwick_trace_c, hreal_trace_cŌ¤® :=
          BHW.os45_adjacent_commonBoundaryEnvelope
            (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi hChart.V0
            (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
            hChart.V0_open
            hChart.V0_connected
            Ō¤©x0, hChart.x0_memŌ¤®
            (fun x hx => hV_jost x (hChart.V0_sub hx))
            (fun x hx => hV_ET x (hChart.V0_sub hx))
            (fun x hx => hV_swapET x (hChart.V0_sub hx))
            (fun x hx => hV_ordered x (hChart.V0_sub hx))
            (fun x hx => by
              simpa [Žä, Equiv.swap_inv, one_mul] using
                hV_swap_ordered x (hChart.V0_sub hx))
            (BHW.os45Figure24_sourceChart_wickTrace_mem hd OS lgc n i hi
              V x0 hChart)
            (BHW.os45Figure24_sourceChart_realTrace_mem hd OS lgc n i hi
              V x0 hChart)
            (BHW.os45Figure24_sourceChart_geometry hd OS lgc n i hi
              V x0 hChart)
            (BHW.os45Figure24_sourceChart_swappedGeometry hd OS lgc n i hi
              V x0 hChart)
            (BHW.os45Figure24_sourceChart_precompact hd OS lgc n i hi
              V x0 hChart)
            (BHW.os45Figure24_sourceChart_horizontal_id hd OS lgc n i hi
              V x0 hChart)
            (BHW.os45Figure24_sourceChart_horizontal_swap hd OS lgc n i hi
              V x0 hChart)
            (BHW.os45Figure24_sourceChart_ordered_closure hd OS lgc n i hi
              V x0 hChart)
            (BHW.os45Figure24_sourceChart_swap_ordered_closure hd OS lgc n i hi
              V x0 hChart)
            (BHW.os45Figure24_sourceChart_horizontal_id_closure hd OS lgc n i hi
              V x0 hChart)
            (BHW.os45Figure24_sourceChart_horizontal_swap_closure hd OS lgc n i hi
              V x0 hChart)
            (BHW.os45BranchHorizontalOrientedSourceGermAt_of_figure24_id
              (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi Ufig hChart.V0
              hUfig_open hUfig_source
              (BHW.os45Figure24_sourceChart_ordered_closure
                hd OS lgc n i hi V x0 hChart)
              hV0_closure_sub_Ufig)
            (BHW.os45BranchHorizontalOrientedSourceGermAt_of_figure24_adjacent
              (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi Ufig hChart.V0
              hUfig_open hChart.V0_open Ō¤©x0, hChart.x0_memŌ¤®
              hChart.V0_connected hV0_sub_sourcePatch
              hUfig_source
              (BHW.os45Figure24_sourceChart_ordered_closure
                hd OS lgc n i hi V x0 hChart)
              (BHW.os45Figure24_sourceChart_swap_ordered_closure
                hd OS lgc n i hi V x0 hChart)
              hV_orientedPath_closure
              hV0_closure_sub_Ufig)
        -- Step 3: convert compact Wick-side vanishing into pointwise
        -- vanishing of `Hc` on the Wick real section, then apply the totally
        -- real identity theorem on the connected common chart.
        have hHc_zero_wick :
            ŌłĆ x Ōłł hChart.V0,
              Hc (BHW.os45CommonChartCLE (d := d) (n := n)
                    (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
                    (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x k))) = 0 := by
          exact
            BHW.os45CommonBoundary_wickTrace_zero_of_compactPairing_zero
              (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi hChart.V0
              (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) Uc Hc
              hChart.V0_open hHc_holo hwick_mem_c hwick_trace_c
              hwick_pairing_zero_all
        have hHc_zero :
            ŌłĆ z Ōłł Uc, Hc z = 0 :=
          BHW.os45CommonBoundary_identity_of_wickTrace_zero
            (d := d) hd n hChart.V0 Uc Hc
            hChart.V0_open Ō¤©x0, hChart.x0_memŌ¤®
            hUc_open hUc_conn hHc_holo
            hwick_mem_c hHc_zero_wick
        -- Step 4: read the zero statement on the real trace and integrate.
        refine MeasureTheory.integral_congr_ae
          (Filter.Eventually.of_forall ?_)
        intro x
        by_cases hx : x Ōłł hChart.V0
        ┬Ę have hreal_zero :
              BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                  (BHW.realEmbed (fun k => x (Žä k))) -
                BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                  (BHW.realEmbed x) = 0 := by
            have hz :=
              hHc_zero
                (BHW.os45CommonChartCLE (d := d) (n := n)
                  (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) (BHW.realEmbed x))
                (hreal_mem_c x hx)
            simpa [hreal_trace_c x hx, Žä] using hz
          exact by
            have hbranch_eq :=
              sub_eq_zero.mp hreal_zero
            calc
              BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n) (BHW.realEmbed x) * Žł x
                  =
                BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                  (BHW.realEmbed (fun k => x (Žä k))) * Žł x := by
                  rw [hbranch_eq]
        ┬Ę have hŽłx : Žł x = 0 := by
            exact
              (notMem_tsupport_iff_eventuallyEq.mp
                (fun hxSupp => hx (hŽł_supp hxSupp))).self_of_nhds
          simp [hŽłx, Žä]

      theorem BHW.os45CanonicalSourcePatch_extendF_eq_local
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
          (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (V : Set (NPointDomain d n))
          (hV_open : IsOpen V)
          (hV_jost : ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V -> x Ōłł BHW.JostSet d n)
          (hV_ET :
            ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V -> BHW.realEmbed x Ōłł BHW.ExtendedTube d n)
          (hV_swapET :
            ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V ->
              BHW.realEmbed
                (fun k => x (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤® k)) Ōłł
                BHW.ExtendedTube d n)
          (hV_ordered :
            ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V ->
              x Ōłł EuclideanOrderedPositiveTimeSector (d := d) (n := n) 1)
          (hV_swap_ordered :
            ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V ->
              (fun k => x (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤® k)) Ōłł
                EuclideanOrderedPositiveTimeSector (d := d) (n := n)
                  (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®))
          (hV_adjLift_ET :
            let Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n) :=
              Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®
            ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V ->
              ŌłĆ t,
                BHW.os45Figure24AdjacentLift
                  (d := d) (n := n) hd Žä x t Ōłł
                BHW.ExtendedTube d n)
          (hV_sourcePatch :
            V ŌŖå BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch (d := d) n i hi)
          {x0 : NPointDomain d n}
          (hx0V : x0 Ōłł V)
          (hChart :
            BHW.OS45Figure24SourceChartAt hd OS lgc n i hi V x0)
          (hV_orientedPath_closure :
            ŌłĆ x Ōłł closure hChart.V0,
              BHW.OS45Figure24OrientedPathField (d := d) n i hi x)
          (Žł : SchwartzNPoint d n)
          (hŽł_comp :
            HasCompactSupport (Žł : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé))
          (hŽł_supp :
            tsupport (Žł : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) ŌŖå hChart.V0) :
          Ōł½ u : NPointDomain d n,
              BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                (BHW.realEmbed u) * Žł u
            =
          Ōł½ u : NPointDomain d n,
              BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                (BHW.realEmbed
                  (fun k => u (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤® k))) *
                Žł u := by
        exact
          BHW.os45Figure24_sourcePatch_pairing_eq_swappedSourcePatch_of_OSI45
            (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi V hV_open hV_jost
            hV_ET hV_swapET hV_ordered hV_swap_ordered
            hV_adjLift_ET hV_sourcePatch hx0V hChart hV_orientedPath_closure
            Žł hŽł_comp hŽł_supp

      theorem BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch_compactSupport_chartPartition
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
          (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (Žł : SchwartzNPoint d n)
          (hŽł_comp :
            HasCompactSupport (Žł : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé))
          (hŽł_supp :
            tsupport (Žł : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) ŌŖå
              BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch (d := d) (n := n) i hi) :
          Ōłā (A : Type) (_ : Fintype A)
            (Žła : A -> SchwartzNPoint d n)
            (Va : A -> Set (NPointDomain d n))
            (x0a : A -> NPointDomain d n)
            (hCharta :
              ŌłĆ a, BHW.OS45Figure24SourceChartAt
                hd OS lgc n i hi (Va a) (x0a a)),
            (ŌłĆ a, HasCompactSupport (Žła a : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé)) Ōł¦
            (ŌłĆ a,
              tsupport (Žła a : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) ŌŖå
                (hCharta a).V0) Ōł¦
	            (ŌłĆ u, (Ōłæ a, Žła a u) = Žł u) Ōł¦
	        (ŌłĆ a, BHW.Figure24LocalChartInput
	          (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi (Va a) (x0a a)) := by
	        classical
	        let Poriented :=
	          BHW.os45_adjacent_identity_canonicalSourcePatch_with_orientedPath
	            (d := d) hd i hi
	        let P := Poriented.toCanonical
	        have hŽł_suppP :
	            tsupport (Žł : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) ŌŖå P.V := by
	          simpa [BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch_eq_canonical
	            (d := d) hd n i hi] using hŽł_supp
	        let K : Set (NPointDomain d n) :=
	          tsupport (Žł : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé)
	        let ╬▓ := {x : NPointDomain d n // x Ōłł K}
	        let center : ╬▓ -> NPointDomain d n := fun b => b.1
	        have hcenter_mem : ŌłĆ b : ╬▓, center b Ōłł P.V := by
	          intro b
	          exact hŽł_suppP b.2
	        let chart : ŌłĆ b : ╬▓,
	            BHW.OS45Figure24SourceChartAt
	              hd OS lgc n i hi P.V (center b) :=
	          fun b =>
	            BHW.os45Figure24_sourceChart_at
	              (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi P.V
	              P.V_open P.V_jost P.V_ordered P.V_swap_ordered
	              P.adjLift_mem_extendedTube (x0 := center b)
	              (hcenter_mem b)
	        -- Each local chart is first shrunk to a bounded ball inside its
	        -- `V0`; the boundedness hypothesis is exactly what the existing SCV
	        -- finite Schwartz partition theorem requires.
	        choose r hr_pos hr_closed using
	          fun b : ╬▓ =>
	            SCV.exists_pos_closedBall_subset_of_isOpen
	              (V := (chart b).V0) (chart b).V0_open
	              (chart b).x0_mem
	        let U╬▓ : ╬▓ -> Set (NPointDomain d n) := fun b =>
	          Metric.ball (center b) (r b / 2)
	        have hU╬▓_open : ŌłĆ b, IsOpen (U╬▓ b) := by
	          intro b
	          exact isOpen_ball
	        have hU╬▓_sub_chart : ŌłĆ b, U╬▓ b ŌŖå (chart b).V0 := by
	          intro b y hy
	          exact hr_closed b
	            ((Metric.closedBall_subset_closedBall
	              (by linarith [hr_pos b]))
	              (Metric.ball_subset_closedBall hy))
	        have hcover : K ŌŖå Ōŗā b : ╬▓, U╬▓ b := by
	          intro x hx
	          refine Set.mem_iUnion.mpr Ō¤©Ō¤©x, hxŌ¤®, ?_Ō¤®
	          simp [U╬▓, center, hr_pos]
	        obtain Ō¤©t, htcoverŌ¤® :=
	          hŽł_comp.elim_finite_subcover U╬▓ hU╬▓_open hcover
	        let A := {b : ╬▓ // b Ōłł t}
	        letI : Fintype A := inferInstance
	        let U╬▒ : A -> Set (NPointDomain d n) := fun a => U╬▓ a.1
	        have hU╬▒_open : ŌłĆ a, IsOpen (U╬▒ a) := fun a => hU╬▓_open a.1
	        have hU╬▒_relcompact :
	            ŌłĆ a, Ōłā c R, U╬▒ a ŌŖå Metric.closedBall c R := by
	          intro a
	          exact Ō¤©center a.1, r a.1 / 2,
	            fun y hy => Metric.ball_subset_closedBall hyŌ¤®
	        have hK_cover╬▒ : K ŌŖå Ōŗā a : A, U╬▒ a := by
	          intro x hx
	          rcases Set.mem_iUnionŌéé.mp (htcover hx) with Ō¤©b, hb, hxbŌ¤®
	          exact Set.mem_iUnion.mpr Ō¤©Ō¤©b, hbŌ¤®, hxbŌ¤®
	        obtain Ō¤©Žć, hŽć_comp, hŽć_supp, hŽć_partŌ¤® :=
	          SCV.exists_finite_schwartz_partitionOfUnity_on_compact
	            (K := K) hŽł_comp hU╬▒_open hU╬▒_relcompact hK_cover╬▒
	        let Žła : A -> SchwartzNPoint d n := fun a =>
	          SchwartzMap.smulLeftCLM Ōäé
	            (Žć a : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) Žł
	        let Va : A -> Set (NPointDomain d n) := fun _ => P.V
	        let x0a : A -> NPointDomain d n := fun a => center a.1
	        let hCharta :
	            ŌłĆ a, BHW.OS45Figure24SourceChartAt
	              hd OS lgc n i hi (Va a) (x0a a) := by
	          intro a
	          simpa [Va, x0a, center] using chart a.1
	        refine Ō¤©A, inferInstance, Žła, Va, x0a, hCharta, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_Ō¤®
	        ┬Ę intro a
	          rw [HasCompactSupport]
	          exact IsCompact.of_isClosed_subset (hŽć_comp a)
	            (isClosed_tsupport _)
	            (by
	              intro x hx
	              exact
	                (SchwartzMap.tsupport_smulLeftCLM_subset
	                  (F := Ōäé) (g := (Žć a : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé))
	                  (f := Žł) hx).2)
	        ┬Ę intro a
	          have hloc :
	              SCV.SupportsInOpen
	                (Žła a : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) (U╬▒ a) := by
	            simpa [Žła] using
	              SCV.supportsInOpen_partition_mul_left
	                (Žć := Žć a) (Žå := Žł)
	                (U := U╬▒ a) (V := Set.univ)
	                (hŽć_supp a)
	                (Ō¤©hŽł_comp, subset_univ _Ō¤® :
	                  SCV.SupportsInOpen
	                    (Žł : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) Set.univ)
	          exact hloc.2.trans (by
	            simpa [U╬▒, hCharta, Va, x0a] using hU╬▓_sub_chart a.1)
	        ┬Ę have hŽł_sum :
	              Žł = Ōłæ a : A, Žła a := by
	            simpa [Žła] using
	              SCV.schwartzMap_eq_finset_sum_smulLeftCLM_of_sum_eq_one_on_tsupport
	                (Finset.univ : Finset A) Žć Žł
	                (by simpa [K] using hŽć_part)
	          intro u
	          exact congrFun (congrArg DFunLike.coe hŽł_sum.symm) u
	        ┬Ę intro a
	          exact
	            { V_open := P.V_open
	              V_sourcePatch := by
	                intro x hx
	                simpa [Va, P,
	                  BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch_eq_canonical
	                    (d := d) hd n i hi] using hx
	              V_jost := P.V_jost
	              V_ET := P.V_ET
	              V_swapET := by simpa [P.Žä] using P.V_swapET
	              V_ordered := P.V_ordered
	              V_swap_ordered := by simpa [P.Žä] using P.V_swap_ordered
	              V_adjLift_ET := by simpa [P.Žä] using P.adjLift_mem_extendedTube
	              V_orientedPath_closure := by
	                intro x hx
	                exact Poriented.orientedPath_closure x hx
	              x0_mem := hcenter_mem a.1 }

	      theorem BHW.continuousOn_sourcePatch_branch_extendF_on_sourceChart
	          [NeZero d]
	          (hd : 2 <= d)
	          (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
	          (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
	          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
	          (V : Set (NPointDomain d n))
	          {x0 : NPointDomain d n}
	          (hInput :
	            BHW.Figure24LocalChartInput
	              (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi V x0)
	          (hChart :
	            BHW.OS45Figure24SourceChartAt hd OS lgc n i hi V x0)
	          (Žü : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
	          (hŽü :
	            Žü = (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) Ōł©
	            Žü = Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®) :
	          ContinuousOn
	            (fun u : NPointDomain d n =>
	              BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
	                (BHW.realEmbed (fun k => u (Žü k))))
	            hChart.V0 := by
	        have hF_holo :
	            DifferentiableOn Ōäé (bvt_F OS lgc n)
	              (BHW.ForwardTube d n) := by
	          simpa [BHW_forwardTube_eq (d := d) (n := n)] using
	            bvt_F_holomorphic (d := d) OS lgc n
	        have hF_cinv :
	            ŌłĆ (╬ø : ComplexLorentzGroup d)
	              (z : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé),
	              z Ōłł BHW.ForwardTube d n ->
	              BHW.complexLorentzAction ╬ø z Ōłł
	                BHW.ForwardTube d n ->
	              bvt_F OS lgc n (BHW.complexLorentzAction ╬ø z) =
	                bvt_F OS lgc n z := by
	          intro ╬ø z hz h╬øz
	          exact bvt_F_complexLorentzInvariant_forwardTube
	            (d := d) OS lgc n ╬ø z
	            ((BHW_forwardTube_eq (d := d) (n := n)) Ō¢Ė hz)
	            ((BHW_forwardTube_eq (d := d) (n := n)) Ō¢Ė h╬øz)
	        have hExtend_cont :
	            ContinuousOn (BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n))
	              (BHW.ExtendedTube d n) :=
	          (BHW.extendF_holomorphicOn n (bvt_F OS lgc n)
	            hF_holo hF_cinv).continuousOn
	        have hbranch_cont :
	            Continuous
	              (fun u : NPointDomain d n =>
	                BHW.realEmbed (fun k => u (Žü k))) :=
	          BHW.continuous_realEmbedNPoint.comp
	            (BHW.continuous_permNPoint (d := d) (n := n) Žü)
	        refine hExtend_cont.comp hbranch_cont.continuousOn ?_
	        intro u hu
	        have huV : u Ōłł V := hChart.V0_sub hu
	        rcases hŽü with rfl | rfl
	        ┬Ę simpa using hInput.V_ET u huV
	        ┬Ę simpa using hInput.V_swapET u huV

	      Real-source integrability on a source chart is no longer a separate
	      production target.  The checked public helper
	      `BHW.integrable_extendF_realSource_mul_schwartz_of_ET` is applied
	      directly to `hChart.V0`; its only chart-specific input is the
	      ordinary or swapped extended-tube membership transported along
	      `hChart.V0_sub`.

	      theorem BHW.integral_sourcePatch_branch_eq_of_finite_schwartz_sum
	          [NeZero d]
	          (hd : 2 <= d)
	          (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
	          (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
	          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
	          {A : Type} [Fintype A]
	          (Žł : SchwartzNPoint d n)
	          (Žła : A -> SchwartzNPoint d n)
	          (hŽł_comp :
	            HasCompactSupport (Žł : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé))
	          (hŽła_comp :
	            ŌłĆ a, HasCompactSupport (Žła a : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé))
	          (hleft_int :
	            ŌłĆ a, Integrable
	              (fun u : NPointDomain d n =>
	                BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
	                  (BHW.realEmbed u) * Žła a u))
	          (hright_int :
	            ŌłĆ a, Integrable
	              (fun u : NPointDomain d n =>
	                BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
	                  (BHW.realEmbed
	                    (fun k => u (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤® k))) *
	                  Žła a u))
	          (hsum : ŌłĆ u, (Ōłæ a, Žła a u) = Žł u)
	          (hlocal :
	            ŌłĆ a,
	              Ōł½ u : NPointDomain d n,
	                  BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
	                    (BHW.realEmbed u) * Žła a u
	                =
	              Ōł½ u : NPointDomain d n,
	                  BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
	                    (BHW.realEmbed
	                      (fun k => u
	                        (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤® k))) *
	                    Žła a u) :
	          Ōł½ u : NPointDomain d n,
	              BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
	                (BHW.realEmbed u) * Žł u
	            =
	          Ōł½ u : NPointDomain d n,
	              BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
	                (BHW.realEmbed
	                  (fun k => u (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤® k))) *
	                Žł u := by
	        -- Finite linearity of the Lebesgue integral after rewriting
	        -- `Žł` by `hsum`.  Integrability is supplied by compact support of
	        -- `Žł` and each `Žła a`, continuity of `extendF` on the ordinary
	        -- and swapped extended-tube source-patch images, and the support
	        -- containment in each local chart.
	        have hleft_sum :
	            Ōł½ u : NPointDomain d n,
	                BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
	                  (BHW.realEmbed u) * Žł u
	              =
	            Ōłæ a,
	              Ōł½ u : NPointDomain d n,
	                BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
	                  (BHW.realEmbed u) * Žła a u := by
	          rw [ŌåÉ MeasureTheory.integral_finset_sum
	            (f := fun a u =>
	              BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
	                (BHW.realEmbed u) * Žła a u)
	            (by intro a _; exact hleft_int a)]
	          apply MeasureTheory.integral_congr_ae
	          filter_upwards with u
	          simp [hsum u, Finset.mul_sum]
	        have hright_sum :
	            Ōł½ u : NPointDomain d n,
	                BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
	                  (BHW.realEmbed
	                    (fun k => u
	                      (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤® k))) * Žł u
	              =
	            Ōłæ a,
	              Ōł½ u : NPointDomain d n,
	                BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
	                  (BHW.realEmbed
	                    (fun k => u
	                      (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤® k))) * Žła a u := by
	          rw [ŌåÉ MeasureTheory.integral_finset_sum
	            (f := fun a u =>
	              BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
	                (BHW.realEmbed
	                  (fun k => u
	                    (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤® k))) * Žła a u)
	            (by intro a _; exact hright_int a)]
	          apply MeasureTheory.integral_congr_ae
	          filter_upwards with u
	          simp [hsum u, Finset.mul_sum]
	        calc
	          Ōł½ u : NPointDomain d n,
	              BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
	                (BHW.realEmbed u) * Žł u
	              = _ := hleft_sum
	          _ =
	            Ōłæ a,
	              Ōł½ u : NPointDomain d n,
	                BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
	                  (BHW.realEmbed
	                    (fun k => u
	                      (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤® k))) * Žła a u := by
	                exact Finset.sum_congr rfl (by intro a _; exact hlocal a)
	          _ =
	            Ōł½ u : NPointDomain d n,
	              BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
	                (BHW.realEmbed
	                  (fun k => u
	                    (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤® k))) * Žł u :=
	                hright_sum.symm

	      theorem BHW.os45CanonicalSourcePatch_extendF_eq
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
          (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (Žł : SchwartzNPoint d n)
          (hŽł_comp :
            HasCompactSupport (Žł : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé))
          (hŽł_supp :
            tsupport (Žł : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) ŌŖå
              BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch (d := d) (n := n) i hi) :
          Ōł½ u : NPointDomain d n,
              BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                (BHW.realEmbed u) * Žł u
            =
          Ōł½ u : NPointDomain d n,
              BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                (BHW.realEmbed
                  (fun k => u (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤® k))) *
                Žł u
            := by
	        obtain Ō¤©A, hA, Žła, Va, x0a, hCharta,
	          hŽła_comp, hŽła_supp, hsum, hInputsŌ¤® :=
	          BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch_compactSupport_chartPartition
	            (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi Žł hŽł_comp hŽł_supp
	        classical
	        letI := hA
	        have hlocal :
	            ŌłĆ a,
              Ōł½ u : NPointDomain d n,
                  BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                    (BHW.realEmbed u) * Žła a u
                =
              Ōł½ u : NPointDomain d n,
                  BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                    (BHW.realEmbed
                      (fun k => u
                        (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤® k))) *
                    Žła a u := by
          intro a
          exact
            BHW.os45CanonicalSourcePatch_extendF_eq_local
              (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi (Va a)
              (hInputs a).V_open (hInputs a).V_jost
              (hInputs a).V_ET (hInputs a).V_swapET
              (hInputs a).V_ordered (hInputs a).V_swap_ordered
	              (hInputs a).V_adjLift_ET (hInputs a).V_sourcePatch
              (hInputs a).x0_mem
	              (hCharta a)
              (fun x hx =>
                (hInputs a).V_orientedPath_closure x
                  (BHW.closure_sourceChart_sub_closure_input
                    (hCharta a) hx))
              (Žła a) (hŽła_comp a) (hŽła_supp a)
	        have hleft_int :
	            ŌłĆ a, Integrable
	              (fun u : NPointDomain d n =>
	                BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
	                  (BHW.realEmbed u) * Žła a u) := by
	          intro a
	          exact
	            BHW.integrable_extendF_realSource_mul_schwartz_of_ET
	              (d := d) OS lgc n (hCharta a).V0
	              (hCharta a).V0_open (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
	              (by
	                intro u hu
	                exact (hInputs a).V_ET u ((hCharta a).V0_sub hu))
	              (Žła a) (hŽła_comp a) (hŽła_supp a)
	        have hright_int :
	            ŌłĆ a, Integrable
	              (fun u : NPointDomain d n =>
	                BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
	                  (BHW.realEmbed
	                    (fun k => u
	                      (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤® k))) *
	                  Žła a u) := by
	          intro a
	          exact
	            BHW.integrable_extendF_realSource_mul_schwartz_of_ET
	              (d := d) OS lgc n (hCharta a).V0
	              (hCharta a).V0_open
	              (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®)
	              (by
	                intro u hu
	                exact (hInputs a).V_swapET u ((hCharta a).V0_sub hu))
	              (Žła a) (hŽła_comp a) (hŽła_supp a)
	        exact
	          BHW.integral_sourcePatch_branch_eq_of_finite_schwartz_sum
	            (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi Žł Žła
	            hŽł_comp hŽła_comp hleft_int hright_int hsum hlocal

      theorem BHW.os45CompactFigure24_branchEq_on_realPatch
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
          (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (ŽĆ : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) :
          ŌłĆ (Žå : SchwartzMap (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ) Ōäé),
            HasCompactSupport
              (Žå : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ) -> Ōäé) ->
            tsupport
              (Žå : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ) -> Ōäé) ŌŖå
              BHW.os45Figure24CompactRealPatch (d := d) n i hi ŽĆ ->
            Ōł½ x : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ,
                BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                  (fun k => BHW.realEmbed x (ŽĆ k)) * Žå x
              =
            Ōł½ x : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> ŌäØ,
                BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                  (fun k => BHW.realEmbed x
                    ((ŽĆ * Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®) k)) *
                  Žå x := by
        intro Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp
        obtain Ō¤©Žł, hŽł_comp, hŽł_supp, hŽł_def,
          hleft_pullback, hright_pullbackŌ¤® :=
          BHW.os45CompactRealPatch_pullbackSchwartz
            (d := d) (n := n) OS lgc i hi ŽĆ Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp
        have hcanonical :
            Ōł½ u : NPointDomain d n,
                BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                  (BHW.realEmbed u) * Žł u
              =
            Ōł½ u : NPointDomain d n,
                BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                  (BHW.realEmbed
                    (fun k => u
                      (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤® k))) *
                  Žł u := by
          exact
            BHW.os45CanonicalSourcePatch_extendF_eq
              (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi Žł hŽł_comp hŽł_supp
        exact hleft_pullback.trans (hcanonical.trans hright_pullback.symm)

      noncomputable def BHW.os45CompactFigure24WickPairingEq_of_OSI45
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
          (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n) :
          BHW.OS45CompactFigure24WickPairingEq
            (d := d) n i hi OS lgc := by
        exact
          { realPatch := BHW.os45Figure24CompactRealPatch (d := d) n i hi
            realPatch_open :=
              BHW.os45Figure24CompactRealPatch_open (d := d) n i hi
            realPatch_nonempty :=
              BHW.os45Figure24CompactRealPatch_nonempty
                (d := d) hd n i hi
            realPatch_jost :=
              BHW.os45Figure24CompactRealPatch_jost
                (d := d) hd n i hi
            realPatch_left_sector :=
              BHW.os45Figure24CompactRealPatch_left_sector
                (d := d) hd n i hi
            realPatch_right_sector :=
              BHW.os45Figure24CompactRealPatch_right_sector
                (d := d) hd n i hi
            realPatch_commonEdge_contact :=
              BHW.os45Figure24CompactRealPatch_commonEdge_contact
                (d := d) hd n i hi
            compact_branch_eq :=
              BHW.os45CompactFigure24_branchEq_on_realPatch
                (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi }

      structure BHW.OS45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarSeed
          [NeZero d]
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          {F : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé}
          (hRep : BHW.SourceOrientedScalarRepresentativeData
            (d := d) n F) where
        Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)
        Žä_eq : Žä = Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®
        V : Set (NPointDomain d n)
        V_open : IsOpen V
        V_nonempty : V.Nonempty
        Wseed : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n)
        Wseed_relOpen :
          BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety d n Wseed
        Wseed_nonempty : Wseed.Nonempty
        Wscal : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n)
        Wscal_relOpen :
          BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety d n Wscal
        Wscal_connected : IsConnected Wscal
        Wseed_subset : Wseed ŌŖå Wscal
        Wscal_double :
          Wscal ŌŖå BHW.sourceOrientedDoublePermutationDomain d n Žä
        Wscal_component :
          Ōłā Gbase Ōłł Wscal,
            Wscal =
              connectedComponentIn
                (BHW.sourceOrientedDoublePermutationDomain d n Žä) Gbase
        seed_eq :
          Set.EqOn
            (fun G =>
              hRep.Phi (BHW.sourcePermuteOrientedGram d n Žä G))
            hRep.Phi
            Wseed
        wick_mem :
          ŌłĆ x Ōłł V,
            BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
              ((BHW.os45QuarterTurnCLE (d := d) (n := n)).symm
                (BHW.realEmbed
                  (BHW.os45CommonEdgeRealPoint
                    (d := d) (n := n)
                    (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) x))) Ōłł Wscal

      structure BHW.OS45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedSeedFigure24Path
          [NeZero d]
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          {F : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé}
          (hRep : BHW.SourceOrientedScalarRepresentativeData
            (d := d) n F) where
        seed : BHW.OS45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarSeed
          (d := d) n i hi hRep
        path_to_quarterTurn :
          ŌłĆ x Ōłł closure seed.V,
            BHW.OS45Figure24OrientedPathField (d := d) n i hi x
        quarterTurn_mem_closure :
          ŌłĆ x Ōłł closure seed.V,
            BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
              ((BHW.os45QuarterTurnCLE (d := d) (n := n)).symm
                (BHW.realEmbed
                  (BHW.os45CommonEdgeRealPoint
                    (d := d) (n := n)
                    (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) x))) Ōłł seed.Wscal
        corridor_eq :
          Set.EqOn
            (fun G =>
              hRep.Phi
                (BHW.sourcePermuteOrientedGram d n seed.Žä G))
            hRep.Phi
            seed.Wscal

      theorem BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarizationChart_of_figure24
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
          (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (hRep :
            BHW.SourceOrientedScalarRepresentativeData
              (d := d) n (bvt_F OS lgc n)) :
          BHW.OS45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarizationChart
            (d := d) n i hi hRep

      theorem BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedSourceEq_of_compactWickPairingEq
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
          (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (hRep :
            BHW.SourceOrientedScalarRepresentativeData
              (d := d) n (bvt_F OS lgc n))
          (hChart :
            BHW.OS45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarizationChart
              (d := d) n i hi hRep)
          (hCompact :
            BHW.OS45CompactFigure24WickPairingEq
              (d := d) n i hi OS lgc) :
          BHW.OS45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedSourceEq
            (d := d) n i hi hRep hChart := by
        let hRealSeed :=
          BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedRealSeed_of_compactWickPairingEq
            (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi hRep hChart hCompact
        exact
          BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedSourceEq_of_realSeed
            (d := d) hd n i hi hRep hChart hRealSeed

      theorem BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarSeed_of_compactWickPairingEq
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
          (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (hRep :
            BHW.SourceOrientedScalarRepresentativeData
              (d := d) n (bvt_F OS lgc n))
          (hChart :
            BHW.OS45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarizationChart
              (d := d) n i hi hRep)
          (hCompact :
            BHW.OS45CompactFigure24WickPairingEq
              (d := d) n i hi OS lgc) :
          BHW.OS45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarSeed
            (d := d) n i hi hRep := by
        let hRealSeed :=
          BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedRealSeed_of_compactWickPairingEq
            (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi hRep hChart hCompact
        exact
          BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarSeed_of_realSeed
            (d := d) hd n i hi hRep hChart hRealSeed

      theorem BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedSeedFigure24Path
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
          (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (hRep :
            BHW.SourceOrientedScalarRepresentativeData
              (d := d) n (bvt_F OS lgc n))
          (hSeed :
            BHW.OS45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarSeed
              (d := d) n i hi hRep)
          (hOrientedPath :
            ŌłĆ x Ōłł closure hSeed.V,
              BHW.OS45Figure24OrientedPathField
                (d := d) n i hi x)
          (hQuarterTurn_mem_closure :
            ŌłĆ x Ōłł closure hSeed.V,
              BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
                ((BHW.os45QuarterTurnCLE (d := d) (n := n)).symm
                  (BHW.realEmbed
                    (BHW.os45CommonEdgeRealPoint
                      (d := d) (n := n)
                      (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) x))) Ōłł hSeed.Wscal) :
          BHW.OS45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedSeedFigure24Path
            (d := d) n i hi hRep := by
        classical
        refine
          { seed := hSeed
            path_to_quarterTurn := hOrientedPath
            quarterTurn_mem_closure := hQuarterTurn_mem_closure
            corridor_eq := ?_ }
        have hDouble_swap :
            hSeed.Wscal ŌŖå
              BHW.sourceOrientedDoublePermutationDomain d n
                (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®) := by
          simpa [hSeed.Žä_eq] using hSeed.Wscal_double
        have hSeed_swap :
            let Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n) :=
              Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®
            Set.EqOn
              (fun G =>
                hRep.Phi (BHW.sourcePermuteOrientedGram d n Žä G))
              hRep.Phi
              hSeed.Wseed := by
          simpa [hSeed.Žä_eq] using hSeed.seed_eq
        have hCorridor_swap :
            let Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n) :=
              Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®
            Set.EqOn
              (fun G =>
                hRep.Phi (BHW.sourcePermuteOrientedGram d n Žä G))
              hRep.Phi
              hSeed.Wscal :=
          BHW.os45AdjacentOrientedScalarEq_on_quarterTurnCorridor
            (d := d) hd n i hi hRep
            hSeed.Wseed hSeed.Wscal
            hSeed.Wscal_relOpen hSeed.Wscal_connected
            hSeed.Wseed_relOpen hSeed.Wseed_nonempty
            hSeed.Wseed_subset hDouble_swap hSeed_swap
        intro G hG
        have hGcorr := hCorridor_swap G hG
        simpa [hSeed.Žä_eq] using hGcorr

      noncomputable def BHW.OS45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarSeed.restrict_sourcePatch
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          {F : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé}
          (hRep :
            BHW.SourceOrientedScalarRepresentativeData
              (d := d) n F)
          (hSeed :
            BHW.OS45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarSeed
              (d := d) n i hi hRep)
          (V : Set (NPointDomain d n))
          (hV_open : IsOpen V)
          (hV_nonempty : V.Nonempty)
          (hV_sub : V ŌŖå hSeed.V) :
          BHW.OS45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarSeed
            (d := d) n i hi hRep :=
        { Žä := hSeed.Žä
          Žä_eq := hSeed.Žä_eq
          V := V
          V_open := hV_open
          V_nonempty := hV_nonempty
          Wseed := hSeed.Wseed
          Wseed_relOpen := hSeed.Wseed_relOpen
          Wseed_nonempty := hSeed.Wseed_nonempty
          Wscal := hSeed.Wscal
          Wscal_relOpen := hSeed.Wscal_relOpen
          Wscal_connected := hSeed.Wscal_connected
          Wseed_subset := hSeed.Wseed_subset
          Wscal_double := hSeed.Wscal_double
          Wscal_component := hSeed.Wscal_component
          seed_eq := hSeed.seed_eq
          wick_mem := by
            intro x hx
            exact hSeed.wick_mem x (hV_sub hx) }

      theorem BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedSeedFigure24Path_of_compactWickPairingEq
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
          (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (hRep :
            BHW.SourceOrientedScalarRepresentativeData
              (d := d) n (bvt_F OS lgc n))
          (hCompact :
            BHW.OS45CompactFigure24WickPairingEq
              (d := d) n i hi OS lgc)
          (V : Set (NPointDomain d n))
          (hV_open : IsOpen V)
          (hV_nonempty : V.Nonempty)
          (hV_sub :
            let hChart :=
              BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarizationChart_of_figure24
                (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi hRep
            let hSeed :=
              BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarSeed_of_compactWickPairingEq
                (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi hRep hChart hCompact
            V ŌŖå hSeed.V)
          (hQuarterTurn_mem_closure :
            let hChart :=
              BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarizationChart_of_figure24
                (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi hRep
            let hSeed :=
              BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarSeed_of_compactWickPairingEq
                (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi hRep hChart hCompact
            ŌłĆ x Ōłł closure V,
              BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
                ((BHW.os45QuarterTurnCLE (d := d) (n := n)).symm
                  (BHW.realEmbed
                    (BHW.os45CommonEdgeRealPoint
                      (d := d) (n := n)
                      (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) x))) Ōłł hSeed.Wscal)
          (hOrientedPath :
            ŌłĆ x Ōłł closure V,
              BHW.OS45Figure24OrientedPathField
                (d := d) n i hi x) :
          BHW.OS45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedSeedFigure24Path
            (d := d) n i hi hRep := by
        let hChart :=
          BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarizationChart_of_figure24
            (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi hRep
        let hSeed0 :=
          BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarSeed_of_compactWickPairingEq
            (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi hRep hChart hCompact
        let hSeed :=
          BHW.OS45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarSeed.restrict_sourcePatch
            (d := d) hd n i hi hRep hSeed0
            V hV_open hV_nonempty
            (by simpa [hChart, hSeed0] using hV_sub)
        have hPath :
            ŌłĆ x Ōłł closure hSeed.V,
              BHW.OS45Figure24OrientedPathField
                (d := d) n i hi x := by
          intro x hx
          exact hOrientedPath x (by simpa [hSeed] using hx)
        have hQuarterTurn :
            ŌłĆ x Ōłł closure hSeed.V,
              BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
                ((BHW.os45QuarterTurnCLE (d := d) (n := n)).symm
                  (BHW.realEmbed
                    (BHW.os45CommonEdgeRealPoint
                      (d := d) (n := n)
                      (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) x))) Ōłł hSeed.Wscal := by
          intro x hx
          have hmem0 :
              BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
                ((BHW.os45QuarterTurnCLE (d := d) (n := n)).symm
                  (BHW.realEmbed
                    (BHW.os45CommonEdgeRealPoint
                      (d := d) (n := n)
                      (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) x))) Ōłł hSeed0.Wscal := by
            exact
              (by
                simpa [hChart, hSeed0] using hQuarterTurn_mem_closure)
                x (by simpa [hSeed] using hx)
          simpa [hSeed] using hmem0
        exact
          BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedSeedFigure24Path
            (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi hRep hSeed hPath hQuarterTurn
      ```

      The `hQuarterTurn_mem_closure` input in the last display is
      intentional.  It is **not** a hidden assumption that `closure V` lies in
      the open seed patch.  For the canonical Figure-2-4 source patch this
      would be the wrong topology.  The required theorem is the oriented
      corridor-membership statement:

      ```lean
      theorem BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedQuarterTurnMem_closure_of_figure24Path
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
          (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          (hRep :
            BHW.SourceOrientedScalarRepresentativeData
              (d := d) n (bvt_F OS lgc n))
          (hCompact :
            BHW.OS45CompactFigure24WickPairingEq
              (d := d) n i hi OS lgc)
          (V : Set (NPointDomain d n))
          (hV_open : IsOpen V)
          (hV_nonempty : V.Nonempty)
          (hV_connected : IsConnected V)
          (hV_sub :
            let hChart :=
              BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarizationChart_of_figure24
                (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi hRep
            let hSeed :=
              BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarSeed_of_compactWickPairingEq
                (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi hRep hChart hCompact
            V ŌŖå hSeed.V)
          (hOrientedPath :
            ŌłĆ x Ōłł closure V,
              BHW.OS45Figure24OrientedPathField
                (d := d) n i hi x) :
          let hChart :=
            BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarizationChart_of_figure24
              (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi hRep
          let hSeed :=
            BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedScalarSeed_of_compactWickPairingEq
              (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi hRep hChart hCompact
          ŌłĆ x Ōłł closure V,
            BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
              ((BHW.os45QuarterTurnCLE (d := d) (n := n)).symm
                (BHW.realEmbed
                  (BHW.os45CommonEdgeRealPoint
                    (d := d) (n := n)
                    (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) x))) Ōłł hSeed.Wscal
      ```

      Its proof is the oriented version of the checked
      `BHW.os45AdjacentQuarterTurnScalarCorridor_of_figure24` membership
      argument, but the closure step needs one extra component field and one
      real-topology hypothesis.  The theorem must not infer membership of a
      limit point from relative openness of `hSeed.Wscal`; instead
      `hSeed.Wscal` records that it is the connected component of the
      oriented adjacent double domain selected by the `S'_n` seed, and the
      local patch `V` is connected.  For each `x Ōłł closure V`, the oriented
      Figure-2-4 path proves that the quarter-turn scalar

      ```lean
      q x :=
        BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
          ((BHW.os45QuarterTurnCLE (d := d) (n := n)).symm
            (BHW.realEmbed
              (BHW.os45CommonEdgeRealPoint
                (d := d) (n := n)
                (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) x)))
      ```

      lies in the oriented double domain.  Since `q` is continuous and
      `closure V` is connected, `q '' closure V` is connected.  It intersects
      `hSeed.Wscal` at any point of `V`, by the already proved source-patch
      field `hSeed.wick_mem` and the inclusion `V ŌŖå hSeed.V`.  Therefore
      `q '' closure V` is contained in the same connected component of the
      double domain as `hSeed.Wscal`, and the stored component identity gives
      the desired endpoint membership.  This proof uses only the BHW/Jost
      source corridor and the oriented Figure-2-4 path; it does not use local
      EOW, final locality, PET independence, or any closure-in-open shortcut.

      The finite/topological support needed by the proof is:

      ```lean
      theorem BHW.continuous_os45QuarterTurnOrientedScalar
          [NeZero d]
          (n : Nat) :
          Continuous
            (fun x : NPointDomain d n =>
              BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
                ((BHW.os45QuarterTurnCLE (d := d) (n := n)).symm
                  (BHW.realEmbed
                    (BHW.os45CommonEdgeRealPoint
                      (d := d) (n := n)
                      (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) x)))) := by
        exact
          (BHW.continuous_sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n).comp
            ((BHW.os45QuarterTurnCLE (d := d) (n := n)).symm.continuous.comp
              ((BHW.continuous_realEmbedNPoint (d := d) (n := n)).comp
                (BHW.continuous_os45CommonEdgeRealPoint
                  (d := d) (n := n) (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)))))

      theorem BHW.os45QuarterTurnOrientedScalar_mem_double_of_orientedPath
          [NeZero d]
          (hd : 2 <= d)
          (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
          {x : NPointDomain d n}
          (hPath :
            BHW.OS45Figure24OrientedPathField (d := d) n i hi x) :
          let Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n) :=
            Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®
          BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n
            ((BHW.os45QuarterTurnCLE (d := d) (n := n)).symm
              (BHW.realEmbed
                (BHW.os45CommonEdgeRealPoint
                  (d := d) (n := n)
                  (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) x))) Ōłł
            BHW.sourceOrientedDoublePermutationDomain d n Žä := by
        classical
        let Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n) := Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®
        let Q := BHW.os45QuarterTurnCLE (d := d) (n := n)
        let y :=
          BHW.os45CommonEdgeRealPoint (d := d) (n := n)
            (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) x
        rcases hPath with
          Ō¤©╬ō, ╬ö, h╬ō_cont, h╬ö_cont, h╬ō0, h╬ō1, h╬ō_ET, h╬ö_ET, h╬ö_orientedŌ¤®
        let q : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n :=
          BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n (Q.symm (BHW.realEmbed y))
        have hleft :
            q Ōłł BHW.sourceOrientedExtendedTubeDomain d n := by
          refine Ō¤©╬ō (1 : unitInterval), h╬ō_ET (1 : unitInterval), ?_Ō¤®
          simpa [q, Q, y] using (congrArg
            (BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n) h╬ō1).symm
        have hright :
            BHW.sourcePermuteOrientedGram d n Žä q Ōłł
              BHW.sourceOrientedExtendedTubeDomain d n := by
          refine Ō¤©╬ö (1 : unitInterval), h╬ö_ET (1 : unitInterval), ?_Ō¤®
          have h╬ö1 := h╬ö_oriented (1 : unitInterval)
          simpa [q, Q, y, h╬ō1] using h╬ö1.symm
        exact Ō¤©hleft, hrightŌ¤®

      theorem BHW.os45AdjacentSPrimeOrientedQuarterTurnMem_closure_of_figure24Path
      ```
