         theorem BHW.os45Figure24_adjacentInitialBoundary_of_OSI45_4_1_4_12
             ... := by
           let Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n) :=
             Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®
           let ╬®Žä : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) :=
             BHW.permutedExtendedTubeSector d n Žä
           let branchŽä :
               (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé :=
             fun z =>
               BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n) (fun k => z (Žä k))
           have hF_holo_BHW :
               DifferentiableOn Ōäé (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                 (BHW.ForwardTube d n) := by
             simpa [BHW_forwardTube_eq (d := d) (n := n)] using
               bvt_F_holomorphic (d := d) OS lgc n
           have hF_cinv_BHW :
               ŌłĆ (╬ø : ComplexLorentzGroup d)
                 (z : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé),
                 z Ōłł BHW.ForwardTube d n ->
                 BHW.complexLorentzAction ╬ø z Ōłł BHW.ForwardTube d n ->
                   bvt_F OS lgc n
                     (BHW.complexLorentzAction ╬ø z) =
                   bvt_F OS lgc n z := by
             exact bvt_F_complexLorentzInvariant_forwardTube
               (d := d) OS lgc n
           have h╬®_open : IsOpen ╬®Žä := by
             simpa [╬®Žä] using
               BHW.isOpen_permutedExtendedTubeSector
                 (d := d) (n := n) Žä
           have hPFT : BHW.PermutedForwardTube d n Žä ŌŖå ╬®Žä := by
             intro z hz
             change (fun k => z (Žä k)) Ōłł BHW.ExtendedTube d n
             exact BHW.forwardTube_subset_extendedTube
               (d := d) (n := n) hz
           have hwick : ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł hChart.V0 ->
               (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x (Žä k))) Ōłł ╬®Žä := by
             intro x hx
             have hxord :
                 x Ōłł EuclideanOrderedPositiveTimeSector
                   (d := d) (n := n) 1 :=
               hV_ordered x (hChart.V0_sub hx)
             exact hPFT
               (wick_mem_permutedForwardTube_of_ordered
                 (d := d) (n := n) (ŽĆ := Žä) x hxord)
           have hbranch_holo :
               DifferentiableOn Ōäé branchŽä ╬®Žä := by
             exact
               (BHW.extendF_holomorphicOn n (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                 hF_holo_BHW hF_cinv_BHW).comp_differentiableOn
                   (differentiable_permNPoint Žä).differentiableOn
                   (by intro z hz; simpa [╬®Žä,
                     BHW.permutedExtendedTubeSector] using hz)
           have hbranch_eq :
               ŌłĆ z, z Ōłł ╬®Žä ->
                 branchŽä z =
                   BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                     (fun k => z (Žä k)) := by
             intro z hz; rfl
           have hpair :
               Ōł½ x : NPointDomain d n,
                   branchŽä (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x (Žä k))) * Žå x
                 =
               OS.S n ŽłZ := by
             have hŽåZ :
                 OS.S n ŽåZ =
                   Ōł½ x : NPointDomain d n,
                     bvt_F OS lgc n
                       (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x k)) * Žå x := by
               simpa [hŽåZ_def] using
                 bvt_euclidean_restriction (d := d) OS lgc n ŽåZ
             have hE3 : OS.S n ŽåZ = OS.S n ŽłZ := by
               subst ŽåZ
               subst ŽłZ
               refine OS.E3_symmetric (n := n) (Žā := Žä.symm) _ _ ?_
               intro x
               simp [permuteZeroDiagonalSchwartz, Žä]
             calc
               Ōł½ x : NPointDomain d n,
                   branchŽä (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x (Žä k))) * Žå x
                   =
                 Ōł½ x : NPointDomain d n,
                   bvt_F OS lgc n
                     (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x k)) * Žå x := by
                     -- Pointwise integrand rewrite using `Žä * Žä = 1`,
                     -- `hV_ordered`, and
                     -- `BHW.extendF_eq_on_forwardTube`.
                     exact integral_congr_ae
                       (ae_of_all _ fun x => by
                         simp [branchŽä, Žä, Equiv.swap_inv,
                           BHW.extendF_eq_on_forwardTube])
               _ = OS.S n ŽåZ := hŽåZ.symm
               _ = OS.S n ŽłZ := hE3
           exact
             { Žä := Žä
               ╬®Žä := ╬®Žä
               ╬®Žä_sector_eq := rfl
               ╬®Žä_open := h╬®_open
               V_ordered := hV_ordered
               V_swap_ordered := by
                 intro x hx
                 simpa [Žä] using hV_swap_ordered x hx
               permutedForward_subset_╬®Žä := hPFT
               wick_adjacent_mem := hwick
               branchŽä := branchŽä
               branchŽä_holo := hbranch_holo
               branchŽä_eq_correctedExtendF := hbranch_eq
               branchŽä_boundary_pairing := hpair }

         theorem BHW.os45Figure24_adjacentLorentzInvariant_of_OSI45_4_14
             ... (Dinit :
               BHW.OS45AdjacentPermutedTubeBoundaryFunctional
                 hd OS lgc n i hi V hChart Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp ŽłZ) := by
           have hF_holo_BHW :
               DifferentiableOn Ōäé (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                 (BHW.ForwardTube d n) := by
             simpa [BHW_forwardTube_eq (d := d) (n := n)] using
               bvt_F_holomorphic (d := d) OS lgc n
           have hF_cinv_BHW :
               ŌłĆ (╬ø : ComplexLorentzGroup d)
                 (z : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé),
                 z Ōłł BHW.ForwardTube d n ->
                 BHW.complexLorentzAction ╬ø z Ōłł BHW.ForwardTube d n ->
                   bvt_F OS lgc n
                     (BHW.complexLorentzAction ╬ø z) =
                   bvt_F OS lgc n z := by
             exact bvt_F_complexLorentzInvariant_forwardTube
               (d := d) OS lgc n
           refine { branchŽä_lorentzInvariant := ?_ }
           intro ╬ø z hz h╬øz
           rw [Dinit.branchŽä_eq_correctedExtendF _ h╬øz,
             Dinit.branchŽä_eq_correctedExtendF _ hz]
           have hperm :
               (fun k =>
                   (BHW.complexLorentzAction ╬ø z) (Dinit.Žä k)) =
               BHW.complexLorentzAction ╬ø
                 (fun k => z (Dinit.Žä k)) := by
             simp [BHW.complexLorentzAction]
           rw [hperm]
           exact
             BHW.extendF_complex_lorentz_invariant n
               (bvt_F OS lgc n) hF_holo_BHW hF_cinv_BHW ╬ø
               (fun k => z (Dinit.Žä k))
               (by simpa [Dinit.╬®Žä_sector_eq,
                 BHW.permutedExtendedTubeSector] using hz)
         ```

         The displayed `wick_mem_permutedForwardTube_of_ordered` and
         `differentiable_permNPoint` names may be implemented as private
         one-line topology helpers if no exact declaration already exists:
         the first is just the definition of `BHW.PermutedForwardTube` after
         `Žä * Žä = 1`, and the second is continuity/differentiability of a
         finite coordinate permutation.  The final integral-congruence line
         is deliberately recorded at theorem-surface level: the production
         proof must rewrite the pointwise integrand by the same displayed
         steps and then call the repository's standard integral congruence
         lemma, rather than introducing a new analytic shortcut.

         A later implementation may package these subclaims as private
         helpers, but only if the helpers expose this content: an initial
         adjacent permuted-tube boundary theorem, a Lorentz/BHW continuation
         theorem on `D╬®.╬®`, and the resulting canonical-lift compact pairing.
         Those helpers are still source mathematics, not forwarding wrappers.

         The theorem surface for
         `BHW.os45Figure24_adjacentBranchData_of_OSI45` must fill three
         provenance fields: holomorphic/Lorentz continuation, real Jost
         boundary equality, and the fixed canonical-lift compact pairing.  A
         packet with only `adjacent_holo`, `adjacent_lorentzInvariant`, and
         one lift-pairing field is too weak: the later real-boundary theorem
         would be false for an arbitrary analytic branch.  The source
         comparison is therefore stored directly as
         `adjacent_realBoundary_eq_ordinary`.

         ```lean
         theorem BHW.os45Figure24_adjacentBranchData_of_OSI45
             ... := by
           classical
           let Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n) :=
             Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®
           have Dinit :
               BHW.OS45AdjacentPermutedTubeBoundaryFunctional
                 hd OS lgc n i hi V hChart Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp ŽłZ :=
             BHW.os45Figure24_adjacentInitialBoundary_of_OSI45_4_1_4_12
               (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi V hV_jost
               hV_ordered hV_swap_ordered hChart Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp
               ŽåZ ŽłZ hŽåZ_def hŽłZ_def
           have Dlor :
               BHW.OS45AdjacentPermutedTubeLorentzInvariantBranch
                 hd OS lgc n i hi V hChart Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp ŽłZ Dinit :=
             BHW.os45Figure24_adjacentLorentzInvariant_of_OSI45_4_14
               (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi V hChart
               Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp ŽłZ Dinit
           exact
             BHW.os45Figure24_adjacentBHWContinuation_to_JostDomain
               (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi V hV_jost
               hV_ET hV_swapET hChart Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp
               ŽåZ ŽłZ Dinit D╬® Dlor
         ```

         The final continuation constructor is the local implementation-facing
         form of OS I ┬¦4.5 after `(4.1)/(4.12)` and `(4.14)` have been
         isolated.  It may be implemented as a private theorem, but its proof
         term must visibly construct the adjacent branch on `D╬®.╬®`, prove the
         real-boundary comparison for every compact `Žć` supported in
         `hChart.V0`, and prove the fixed lift pairing for `Žå`.

         ```lean
         structure BHW.OS45AdjacentBHWJostContinuationData
             [NeZero d]
             (hd : 2 <= d)
             (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
             (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
             (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
             (V : Set (NPointDomain d n))
             (hV_jost : ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V -> x Ōłł BHW.JostSet d n)
             (hV_ET :
               ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V -> BHW.realEmbed x Ōłł BHW.ExtendedTube d n)
             (hV_swapET :
               ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V ->
                 BHW.realEmbed (fun k => x (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤® k)) Ōłł
                   BHW.ExtendedTube d n)
             {x0 : NPointDomain d n}
             (hChart :
               BHW.OS45Figure24SourceChartAt hd OS lgc n i hi V x0)
             (Žå : SchwartzNPoint d n)
             (hŽå_comp :
               HasCompactSupport (Žå : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé))
             (hŽå_supp :
               tsupport (Žå : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) ŌŖå hChart.V0)
             (ŽłZ : ZeroDiagonalSchwartz d n)
             (Dinit :
               BHW.OS45AdjacentPermutedTubeBoundaryFunctional
                 hd OS lgc n i hi V hChart Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp ŽłZ)
             (D╬® :
               BHW.OS45Figure24JostRuelleDomainData
                 hd OS lgc n i hi V hV_jost hV_ET hV_swapET hChart
                 Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp)
             (Dlor :
               BHW.OS45AdjacentPermutedTubeLorentzInvariantBranch
                 hd OS lgc n i hi V hChart Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp ŽłZ Dinit)
             where
           Badj : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé
           Badj_holo : DifferentiableOn Ōäé Badj D╬®.╬®
           Badj_lorentzInvariant :
             ŌłĆ ╬ø z, z Ōłł D╬®.╬® ->
               BHW.complexLorentzAction ╬ø z Ōłł D╬®.╬® ->
                 Badj (BHW.complexLorentzAction ╬ø z) = Badj z
           Badj_realBoundary_eq_ordinary :
             ŌłĆ Žć : SchwartzNPoint d n,
               HasCompactSupport (Žć : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) ->
               tsupport (Žć : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) ŌŖå hChart.V0 ->
                 Ōł½ x : NPointDomain d n,
                     BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n) (BHW.realEmbed x) * Žć x
                   =
                 Ōł½ x : NPointDomain d n,
                     Badj (BHW.realEmbed x) * Žć x
           Badj_liftPairing :
             Ōł½ x : NPointDomain d n,
                 Badj (hChart.adjLift x (0 : unitInterval)) * Žå x
               =
             OS.S n ŽłZ

         theorem BHW.os45_bhwJostContinuation_adjacentPermutedBranch
             ...
             (Dinit :
               BHW.OS45AdjacentPermutedTubeBoundaryFunctional
                 hd OS lgc n i hi V hChart Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp ŽłZ)
             (D╬® :
               BHW.OS45Figure24JostRuelleDomainData
                 hd OS lgc n i hi V hV_jost hV_ET hV_swapET hChart
                 Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp)
             (Dlor :
               BHW.OS45AdjacentPermutedTubeLorentzInvariantBranch
                 hd OS lgc n i hi V hChart Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp ŽłZ Dinit) :
             BHW.OS45AdjacentBHWJostContinuationData
               hd OS lgc n i hi V hV_jost hV_ET hV_swapET hChart
               Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp ŽłZ Dinit D╬® Dlor
         ```

         The adjacent-branch record is then assembled from this continuation
         result:

         ```lean
         theorem BHW.os45Figure24_adjacentBHWContinuation_to_JostDomain
             ... : BHW.OS45Figure24AdjacentBranchData
               hd OS lgc n i hi V hV_jost hV_ET hV_swapET hChart
               Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp ŽåZ ŽłZ D╬® := by
           classical
           let C :
               BHW.OS45AdjacentBHWJostContinuationData
                 hd OS lgc n i hi V hV_jost hV_ET hV_swapET hChart
                 Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp ŽłZ Dinit D╬® Dlor :=
             BHW.os45_bhwJostContinuation_adjacentPermutedBranch
               (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi V hV_jost
               hV_ET hV_swapET hChart Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp
               ŽłZ Dinit D╬® Dlor
           exact
             { adjacentBranch := C.Badj
               adjacent_holo := C.Badj_holo
               adjacent_lorentzInvariant := C.Badj_lorentzInvariant
               adjacent_realBoundary_eq_ordinary := by
                 intro Žć hŽć_comp hŽć_supp
                 exact C.Badj_realBoundary_eq_ordinary Žć hŽć_comp hŽć_supp
               adjacent_lift_pairing_eq_permutedSchwinger :=
                 C.Badj_liftPairing }
         ```

         The displayed
         `BHW.os45_bhwJostContinuation_adjacentPermutedBranch` is not a
         license for a new axiom.  It is a genuine OS-I/BHW producer: start
         with `Dinit.branchŽä` on the adjacent permuted tube, use
         `Dlor.branchŽä_lorentzInvariant` for the BHW continuation, follow the
         deterministic Figure-2-4/Jost continuation path into `D╬®.╬®`, and
         transport distributional boundary values along that path.  Its
         `Badj_realBoundary_eq_ordinary` output is consumed by generic
         Jost/Ruelle uniqueness; it cannot be recovered from that uniqueness
         theorem without circularity.

         Implementation transcript for
         `BHW.os45_bhwJostContinuation_adjacentPermutedBranch`.  The proof is
         one OS-I ┬¦4.5 specialization, but its internal obligations are fixed:

         1. **Continue the branch.**  Apply the local
            Bargmann-Hall-Wightman/Jost continuation theorem to the
            Lorentz-invariant branch `Dinit.branchŽä` on
            `Dinit.╬®Žä = BHW.permutedExtendedTubeSector d n Dinit.Žä`.  The
            continuation domain is exactly `D╬®.╬®`, not an arbitrary connected
            component.  The output branch `Badj` is characterized by
            agreement with `Dinit.branchŽä` on the selected adjacent
            permuted-tube edge and by analytic continuation along the
            deterministic Figure-2-4 path.
         2. **Holomorphy and Lorentz invariance.**  `Badj_holo` is the
            holomorphy output of the BHW continuation on `D╬®.╬®`.
            `Badj_lorentzInvariant` is transported from
            `Dlor.branchŽä_lorentzInvariant` along the same continuation; it is
            not re-proved from the ordinary branch.
         3. **Real-boundary comparison.**  For every compact
            `Žć : SchwartzNPoint d n` with `tsupport Žć ŌŖå hChart.V0`, apply the
            OS-I ┬¦4.5 real Jost boundary comparison to the two continued
            branches.  This gives the exact distributional field
            `Badj_realBoundary_eq_ordinary Žć hŽć_comp hŽć_supp`:

            ```lean
            Ōł½ x, BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n) (BHW.realEmbed x) * Žć x =
              Ōł½ x, Badj (BHW.realEmbed x) * Žć x
            ```

            The proof uses the same `(4.1)/(4.12)/(4.14)` branch selection,
            the local real Jost patch `hChart.V0`, and compact-test
            distributional equality.  It must not use generic Jost/Ruelle
            uniqueness, because this field is an input to that theorem.
         4. **Canonical-lift pairing.**  Transport
            `Dinit.branchŽä_boundary_pairing` from the adjacent Wick edge to
            the deterministic canonical lift `x Ōå” hChart.adjLift x 0` along
            the selected Figure-2-4 continuation.  This proves
            `Badj_liftPairing`; the only compact-test symmetry used here is
            the zero-diagonal `ŽłZ` equality already stored in `Dinit`.

         Lean-shaped body of the source theorem:

         ```lean
         theorem BHW.os45_bhwJostContinuation_adjacentPermutedBranch
             ... := by
           classical
           obtain
             Ō¤©Badj, hBadj_agrees_edge, hBadj_holo, hBadj_inv,
               hBadj_realBoundary, hBadj_liftŌ¤® :=
             BHW.os45_BHWJost_continue_adjacentBranch_from_OSI45
               (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi V hV_jost hV_ET hV_swapET
               hChart Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp ŽłZ Dinit D╬® Dlor
           exact
             { Badj := Badj
               Badj_holo := hBadj_holo
               Badj_lorentzInvariant := hBadj_inv
               Badj_realBoundary_eq_ordinary := by
                 intro Žć hŽć_comp hŽć_supp
                 exact hBadj_realBoundary Žć hŽć_comp hŽć_supp
               Badj_liftPairing := hBadj_lift }
         ```

         The displayed
         `BHW.os45_BHWJost_continue_adjacentBranch_from_OSI45` is the actual
         standard-paper theorem to formalize here.  It is not allowed to
         mention source scalar representatives, EOW envelopes, PET
         monodromy, `bvt_W`, or final locality.  Its proof is exactly OS I
         ┬¦4.5 plus the local BHW continuation theorem: equations `(4.1)` and
         `(4.12)` identify the adjacent compact boundary branch, `(4.14)`
         gives Lorentz covariance, BHW/Jost continuation carries the branch
         to the Figure-2-4 domain, and the two compact consequences above are
         read off by analytic continuation of distributions.

         To keep this paper theorem implementation-level rather than
         slogan-level, split it one more time through a local continuation
         carrier.  This carrier is the Figure-2-4 specialization of the OS I
         ┬¦4.5 sentence: E2 plus `(4.1)`, `(4.12)`, `(4.14)` gives a symmetric
         analytic branch on the adjacent/permuted tube, and the
         Bargmann-Hall-Wightman theorem continues that branch through the
         proper complex Lorentz/Jost domain.  The carrier is local: it names
         only the selected adjacent transposition, selected chart, selected
         compact test, and deterministic canonical lift.

         ```lean
         structure BHW.OS45BHWJostLocalContinuationData
             [NeZero d]
             (hd : 2 <= d)
             (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
             (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
             (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
             (V : Set (NPointDomain d n))
             (hV_jost : ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V -> x Ōłł BHW.JostSet d n)
             (hV_ET :
               ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V -> BHW.realEmbed x Ōłł BHW.ExtendedTube d n)
             (hV_swapET :
               ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V ->
                 BHW.realEmbed (fun k => x (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤® k)) Ōłł
                   BHW.ExtendedTube d n)
             {x0 : NPointDomain d n}
             (hChart :
               BHW.OS45Figure24SourceChartAt hd OS lgc n i hi V x0)
             (Žå : SchwartzNPoint d n)
             (hŽå_comp :
               HasCompactSupport (Žå : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé))
             (hŽå_supp :
               tsupport (Žå : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) ŌŖå hChart.V0)
             (ŽłZ : ZeroDiagonalSchwartz d n)
             (Dinit :
               BHW.OS45AdjacentPermutedTubeBoundaryFunctional
                 hd OS lgc n i hi V hChart Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp ŽłZ)
             (D╬® :
               BHW.OS45Figure24JostRuelleDomainData
                 hd OS lgc n i hi V hV_jost hV_ET hV_swapET hChart
                 Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp)
             (Dlor :
               BHW.OS45AdjacentPermutedTubeLorentzInvariantBranch
                 hd OS lgc n i hi V hChart Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp ŽłZ Dinit)
             where
           ╬®J : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé)
           ╬®J_open : IsOpen ╬®J
           ╬®J_connected : IsConnected ╬®J
           ╬®J_sub_bhwJostHull :
             ╬®J ŌŖå
               BHW.os45BHWJostHull d n Dinit.Žä
                 (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x0 (Dinit.Žä k)))
           D╬®_sub_╬®J : D╬®.╬® ŌŖå ╬®J
           ╬®Žä_sub_╬®J : Dinit.╬®Žä ŌŖå ╬®J
           adjacentEdge_mem_╬®J :
             ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł hChart.V0 ->
               (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x (Dinit.Žä k))) Ōłł ╬®J
           adjacentEdge_mem_╬®Žä :
             ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł hChart.V0 ->
               (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x (Dinit.Žä k))) Ōłł Dinit.╬®Žä :=
             Dinit.wick_adjacent_mem
           realPatch_mem_╬®J :
             ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł hChart.V0 -> BHW.realEmbed x Ōłł ╬®J
           lift_mem_╬®J_of_support :
             ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł tsupport (Žå : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) ->
               hChart.adjLift x (0 : unitInterval) Ōłł ╬®J
           WJ : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé
           WJ_holo : DifferentiableOn Ōäé WJ ╬®J
           WJ_lorentzInvariant :
             ŌłĆ ╬ø z, z Ōłł ╬®J ->
               BHW.complexLorentzAction ╬ø z Ōłł ╬®J ->
                 WJ (BHW.complexLorentzAction ╬ø z) = WJ z
           WJ_agrees_╬®Žä :
             ŌłĆ z, z Ōłł Dinit.╬®Žä -> WJ z = Dinit.branchŽä z
           WJ_agrees_initialEdge :
             ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł hChart.V0 ->
               WJ (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x (Dinit.Žä k))) =
                 Dinit.branchŽä (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x (Dinit.Žä k))) := by
             intro x hx
             exact WJ_agrees_╬®Žä
               (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x (Dinit.Žä k)))
               (adjacentEdge_mem_╬®Žä x hx)
           WJ_restrict_D╬®_holo :
             DifferentiableOn Ōäé WJ D╬®.╬® := WJ_holo.mono D╬®_sub_╬®J
           WJ_restrict_D╬®_lorentzInvariant :
             ŌłĆ ╬ø z, z Ōłł D╬®.╬® ->
               BHW.complexLorentzAction ╬ø z Ōłł D╬®.╬® ->
                 WJ (BHW.complexLorentzAction ╬ø z) = WJ z := by
             intro ╬ø z hz h╬øz
             exact WJ_lorentzInvariant ╬ø z (D╬®_sub_╬®J hz) (D╬®_sub_╬®J h╬øz)
           WJ_realBoundary_eq_ordinary :
             ŌłĆ Žć : SchwartzNPoint d n,
               HasCompactSupport (Žć : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) ->
               tsupport (Žć : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) ŌŖå hChart.V0 ->
                 Ōł½ x : NPointDomain d n,
                     BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n) (BHW.realEmbed x) * Žć x
                   =
                 Ōł½ x : NPointDomain d n,
                     WJ (BHW.realEmbed x) * Žć x
           WJ_liftPairing :
             Ōł½ x : NPointDomain d n,
                 WJ (hChart.adjLift x (0 : unitInterval)) * Žå x
               =
             OS.S n ŽłZ
         ```

         The symbol
         `BHW.os45BHWJostHull d n Dinit.Žä
           (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x0 (Dinit.Žä k)))`
         is a local proof-doc name for the proper-complex Lorentz/Jost path
         component of the identity and `Dinit.Žä` adjacent tube used in
         OS I ┬¦4.5.  A Lean implementation may
         spell it as an existing local BHW hull if one is already available,
         but it may not replace it by global PET branch independence.  The
         required geometric facts are exactly the fields above: the hull
         contains the whole initial adjacent tube `Dinit.╬®Žä`, the adjacent
         Wick edge, the real Jost patch, `D╬®.╬®`, and the canonical lift over
         `tsupport Žå`, and it is connected on this local Figure-2-4
         component.  The continued branch must agree with `Dinit.branchŽä` on
         all of `Dinit.╬®Žä`; agreement only on the selected edge is too weak to
         be the BHW analytic-continuation input.

         The actual lower theorem is then:

         ```lean
         theorem BHW.os45_BHWJostLocalContinuationData_from_OSI45
             ...
             (hV_open : IsOpen V)
             (hV_adjLift_ET :
               let Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n) :=
                 Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®
               ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V -> ŌłĆ t,
                 BHW.os45Figure24AdjacentLift
                   (d := d) (n := n) hd Žä x t Ōłł
                 BHW.ExtendedTube d n)
             (hV_sourcePatch :
               V ŌŖå BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch (d := d) n i hi)
             (hV_orientedPath_closure :
               ŌłĆ x Ōłł closure hChart.V0,
                 BHW.OS45Figure24OrientedPathField (d := d) n i hi x)
             (Dinit :
               BHW.OS45AdjacentPermutedTubeBoundaryFunctional
                 hd OS lgc n i hi V hChart Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp ŽłZ)
             (D╬® :
               BHW.OS45Figure24JostRuelleDomainData
                 hd OS lgc n i hi V hV_jost hV_ET hV_swapET hChart
                 Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp)
             (Dlor :
               BHW.OS45AdjacentPermutedTubeLorentzInvariantBranch
                 hd OS lgc n i hi V hChart Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp ŽłZ Dinit) :
             BHW.OS45BHWJostLocalContinuationData
               hd OS lgc n i hi V hV_jost hV_ET hV_swapET hChart
               Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp ŽłZ Dinit D╬® Dlor
         ```

         Its proof is not allowed to be a wrapper around
         `OS45AdjacentBHWJostContinuationData`.  It is the place where the
         paper theorem is formalized:

         * use `(4.1)` and `(4.12)` to identify `Dinit.branchŽä` as the
           Fourier-Laplace/Wightman branch selected by the permuted
           zero-diagonal compact test `ŽłZ`;
         * use `(4.14)` through `Dlor.branchŽä_lorentzInvariant` to meet the
           BHW theorem's complex-Lorentz covariance hypothesis;
         * construct the local proper-complex/Jost hull and prove the
           membership fields for the whole initial tube `Dinit.╬®Žä`, the
           adjacent Wick edge, real Jost patch, `D╬®.╬®`, and
           `hChart.adjLift ┬Ę 0`;
         * obtain `WJ`, `WJ_holo`, and `WJ_lorentzInvariant` by the
           Bargmann-Hall-Wightman continuation theorem on that local connected
           hull;
         * prove `WJ_agrees_╬®Žä` as the branch-normalization condition in the
           BHW theorem, then derive `WJ_agrees_initialEdge` from
           `Dinit.wick_adjacent_mem`;
         * prove `WJ_realBoundary_eq_ordinary` by equality of the two
           boundary-value distributions on the real Jost patch, not by generic
           Jost/Ruelle uniqueness;
         * prove `WJ_liftPairing` by applying the same continued branch to
           the fixed compact lift family and using the initial compact
           boundary pairing `Dinit.branchŽä_boundary_pairing`.

         For production implementation, this lower theorem should not be
         attacked as one large proof.  The proof-doc-complete split is the
         following five local support surfaces.  These are all inside the same
         OS I ┬¦4.5/BHW theorem; none is a public theorem-2 shortcut.

         The hull in the first support surface must be a concrete path
         component, not an unnamed connected open set.  Use the proper-complex
         Lorentz saturation of the identity extended tube and the selected
         adjacent permuted tube:

         ```lean
         def BHW.os45BHWJostAmbient
             (d n : Nat) (Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) :
             Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) :=
           {z | Ōłā ╬ø u,
             u Ōłł BHW.ExtendedTube d n Ōł¦
             z = BHW.complexLorentzAction ╬ø u} Ōł¬
           {z | Ōłā ╬ø u,
             u Ōłł BHW.permutedExtendedTubeSector d n Žä Ōł¦
             z = BHW.complexLorentzAction ╬ø u}

         def BHW.os45BHWJostHull
             (d n : Nat) (Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
             (zbase : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) :
             Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) :=
           pathComponentIn (BHW.os45BHWJostAmbient d n Žä) zbase
         ```

         In the local carrier choose

         ```lean
         let zŽä0 : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé :=
           fun k => wickRotatePoint (x0 (Dinit.Žä k))
         ```

         and set `╬®J := BHW.os45BHWJostHull d n Dinit.Žä zŽä0`.  The proof
         then has no hidden component choice.  The needed topology API is
         exact: `JoinedIn`, `JoinedIn.refl`, `JoinedIn.trans`,
         `JoinedIn.mono`, `JoinedIn.somePath`, and `JoinedIn.somePath_mem`
         are in `Mathlib.Topology.Connected.PathConnected`;
         the checked local helper
         `BHW.isOpen_pathComponentIn_of_isOpen_normed` supplies the open
         path-component fact in the finite-dimensional normed source
         configuration spaces; `IsOpen.isConnected_iff_isPathConnected` is in
         `Mathlib.Topology.Connected.LocPathConnected`; `Path.trans` and
         `Path.trans_range` are in `Mathlib.Topology.Path`.

         The path-component proof must be split into these finite pieces:

         ```lean
         theorem BHW.os45BHWJostAmbient_open
             [NeZero d] (hd : 2 <= d) (n : Nat)
             (Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) :
             IsOpen (BHW.os45BHWJostAmbient d n Žä)

         theorem BHW.os45BHWJostAmbient_mem_identity
             (z : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé)
             (hz : z Ōłł BHW.ExtendedTube d n) :
             z Ōłł BHW.os45BHWJostAmbient d n Žä

         theorem BHW.os45BHWJostAmbient_mem_adjacent
             (z : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé)
             (hz : z Ōłł BHW.permutedExtendedTubeSector d n Žä) :
             z Ōłł BHW.os45BHWJostAmbient d n Žä

         theorem BHW.os45Figure24_joined_adjacentWick_to_adjLift0
             ...
             (x : NPointDomain d n) (hx : x Ōłł hChart.V0) :
             JoinedIn (BHW.os45BHWJostAmbient d n Dinit.Žä)
               (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x (Dinit.Žä k)))
               (hChart.adjLift x (0 : unitInterval))

         theorem BHW.os45Figure24_joined_adjLift0_to_realPatch
             ...
             (x : NPointDomain d n) (hx : x Ōłł hChart.V0) :
             JoinedIn (BHW.os45BHWJostAmbient d n Dinit.Žä)
               (hChart.adjLift x (0 : unitInterval))
               (BHW.realEmbed x)
         ```

         The first joined theorem uses
         `BHW.figure24RotateAdjacentConfig_lorentz_inverse`,
         `hChart.adjLift_def`, `BHW.os45Figure24IdentityPath_zero`, and a
         path in the proper complex Lorentz group from `1` to `╬øinv`; the
         image path is `t Ōå” complexLorentzAction (╬øpath t) zraw`.  The second
         joined theorem uses the deterministic Figure-2-4 path
         `t Ōå” hChart.adjLift x t`, its extended-tube membership, and the
         endpoint calculation supplied by the chart's `figPath_closure`
         field.  Both paths live in the ambient because the ambient contains
         the identity tube and the adjacent tube together with their
         proper-complex Lorentz images.  They do not use PET branch
         independence, scalar representatives, or final locality.

         ```lean
         theorem BHW.os45_BHWJostHullData_of_figure24
             ... :
             Ōłā ╬®J : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé),
               IsOpen ╬®J Ōł¦
               IsConnected ╬®J Ōł¦
               ╬®J ŌŖå
                 BHW.os45BHWJostHull d n Dinit.Žä
                   (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x0 (Dinit.Žä k))) Ōł¦
               Dinit.╬®Žä ŌŖå ╬®J Ōł¦
               D╬®.╬® ŌŖå ╬®J Ōł¦
               (ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł hChart.V0 ->
                 (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x (Dinit.Žä k))) Ōłł ╬®J) Ōł¦
               (ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł hChart.V0 -> BHW.realEmbed x Ōłł ╬®J) Ōł¦
               (ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł tsupport (Žå : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) ->
                 hChart.adjLift x (0 : unitInterval) Ōłł ╬®J)

         theorem BHW.os45_BHWJostBranch_onLocalHull_of_OSI45
             ...
             {╬®J : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé)}
             (h╬®_open : IsOpen ╬®J)
             (h╬®_conn : IsConnected ╬®J)
             (h╬®_hull :
               ╬®J ŌŖå
                 BHW.os45BHWJostHull d n Dinit.Žä
                   (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x0 (Dinit.Žä k))))
             (h╬®Žä : Dinit.╬®Žä ŌŖå ╬®J) :
             Ōłā WJ : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé,
               DifferentiableOn Ōäé WJ ╬®J Ōł¦
               (ŌłĆ ╬ø z, z Ōłł ╬®J ->
                 BHW.complexLorentzAction ╬ø z Ōłł ╬®J ->
                   WJ (BHW.complexLorentzAction ╬ø z) = WJ z) Ōł¦
               (ŌłĆ z, z Ōłł Dinit.╬®Žä -> WJ z = Dinit.branchŽä z)

         theorem BHW.os45_BHWJostRealBoundaryEq_of_OSI45
             ...
             {╬®J : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé)}
             {WJ : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé}
             (hV_open : IsOpen V)
             (hV_adjLift_ET :
               let Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n) :=
                 Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®
               ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V -> ŌłĆ t,
                 BHW.os45Figure24AdjacentLift
                   (d := d) (n := n) hd Žä x t Ōłł
                 BHW.ExtendedTube d n)
             (hV_sourcePatch :
               V ŌŖå BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch (d := d) n i hi)
             (hV_orientedPath_closure :
               ŌłĆ x Ōłł closure hChart.V0,
                 BHW.OS45Figure24OrientedPathField (d := d) n i hi x)
             (hW_holo : DifferentiableOn Ōäé WJ ╬®J)
             (hW_inv :
               ŌłĆ ╬ø z, z Ōłł ╬®J ->
                 BHW.complexLorentzAction ╬ø z Ōłł ╬®J ->
                   WJ (BHW.complexLorentzAction ╬ø z) = WJ z)
             (hW_╬®Žä : ŌłĆ z, z Ōłł Dinit.╬®Žä -> WJ z = Dinit.branchŽä z)
             (hreal : ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł hChart.V0 -> BHW.realEmbed x Ōłł ╬®J) :
             ŌłĆ Žć : SchwartzNPoint d n,
               HasCompactSupport (Žć : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) ->
               tsupport (Žć : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) ŌŖå hChart.V0 ->
                 Ōł½ x : NPointDomain d n,
                     BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n) (BHW.realEmbed x) * Žć x
                   =
                 Ōł½ x : NPointDomain d n,
                     WJ (BHW.realEmbed x) * Žć x

         theorem BHW.os45_BHWJostLiftPairing_of_OSI45
             ...
             {WJ : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé}
             (hLift_transport :
               ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł tsupport (Žå : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) ->
                 WJ (hChart.adjLift x (0 : unitInterval)) =
                   Dinit.branchŽä
                     (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x (Dinit.Žä k)))) :
             Ōł½ x : NPointDomain d n,
                 WJ (hChart.adjLift x (0 : unitInterval)) * Žå x
               =
             OS.S n ŽłZ
         ```

         The remaining transport theorem in this sequence is the equality
         consumed by `hLift_transport`:

         ```lean
         theorem BHW.os45_BHWJostLiftTransport_onSupport_of_OSI45
             ...
             {╬®J : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé)}
             {WJ : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé}
             (hW_inv :
               ŌłĆ ╬ø z, z Ōłł ╬®J ->
                 BHW.complexLorentzAction ╬ø z Ōłł ╬®J ->
                   WJ (BHW.complexLorentzAction ╬ø z) = WJ z)
             (h╬®Žä : Dinit.╬®Žä ŌŖå ╬®J)
             (hW_╬®Žä : ŌłĆ z, z Ōłł Dinit.╬®Žä -> WJ z = Dinit.branchŽä z)
             (hlift : ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł tsupport (Žå : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) ->
               hChart.adjLift x (0 : unitInterval) Ōłł ╬®J) :
             ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł tsupport (Žå : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) ->
               WJ (hChart.adjLift x (0 : unitInterval)) =
                 Dinit.branchŽä
                   (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x (Dinit.Žä k)))
         ```

         This theorem is where the selected Figure-2-4 lift at `0` is related
         to the adjacent Wick edge.  Since the checked Figure-2-4 lift is the
         rotated two-plane realization
         `figure24RotateAdjacentConfig hd (permAct Žä (IdentityPath x t))`,
         the proof is not an endpoint equality.  It is the same Lorentz
         normalization used by
         `BHW.os45Figure24AdjacentLift_extendF_eq_permutedWick_zero`: choose
         `╬øinv` from `BHW.figure24RotateAdjacentConfig_lorentz_inverse`, prove

         ```lean
         BHW.complexLorentzAction ╬øinv
           (hChart.adjLift x (0 : unitInterval)) =
             fun k => wickRotatePoint (x (Dinit.Žä k))
         ```

         using `hChart.adjLift_def`,
         `BHW.os45Figure24AdjacentLift`, `BHW.permAct`, and
         `BHW.os45Figure24IdentityPath_zero`; then apply
         `hW_inv` with `hlift x hx` and
         `h╬®Žä (Dinit.wick_adjacent_mem x (hŽå_supp hx))`, and finally rewrite
         the adjacent Wick value by `hW_╬®Žä`.  This Lorentz transport theorem
         must be exported as its own proof step; it must not be hidden inside
         the integral proof.  Once `hLift_transport` is available,
         `os45_BHWJostLiftPairing_of_OSI45` is only `integral_congr` plus
         `Dinit.branchŽä_boundary_pairing`, with the standard support split:
         on `tsupport Žå` use `hLift_transport`, and off `tsupport Žå` the test
         factor `Žå x` is zero because `support Žå ŌŖå tsupport Žå`.

         Lean-shaped assembly of the local carrier:

         ```lean
         theorem BHW.os45_BHWJostLocalContinuationData_from_OSI45
             ... := by
           classical
           obtain
             Ō¤©╬®J, h╬®J_open, h╬®J_conn, h╬®J_hull, h╬®Žä_sub,
               hD╬®_sub, hadj_mem, hreal_mem, hlift_memŌ¤® :=
             BHW.os45_BHWJostHullData_of_figure24
               (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi V hV_jost hV_ET hV_swapET
               hChart Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp ŽłZ Dinit D╬® Dlor
           obtain
             Ō¤©WJ, hWJ_holo, hWJ_inv, hWJ_╬®ŽäŌ¤® :=
             BHW.os45_BHWJostBranch_onLocalHull_of_OSI45
               (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi V hV_jost hV_ET hV_swapET
               hChart Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp ŽłZ Dinit D╬® Dlor
               h╬®J_open h╬®J_conn h╬®J_hull h╬®Žä_sub
           have hrealBoundary :
               ŌłĆ Žć : SchwartzNPoint d n,
                 HasCompactSupport (Žć : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) ->
                 tsupport (Žć : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) ŌŖå hChart.V0 ->
                   Ōł½ x : NPointDomain d n,
                       BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n) (BHW.realEmbed x) * Žć x
                     =
                   Ōł½ x : NPointDomain d n,
                       WJ (BHW.realEmbed x) * Žć x :=
             BHW.os45_BHWJostRealBoundaryEq_of_OSI45
               (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi V hV_jost hV_ET hV_swapET
               hChart Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp ŽłZ Dinit D╬® Dlor
               hV_open hV_adjLift_ET hV_sourcePatch
               hV_orientedPath_closure
               hWJ_holo hWJ_inv hWJ_╬®Žä hreal_mem
           have hLiftTransport :
               ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł tsupport (Žå : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) ->
                 WJ (hChart.adjLift x (0 : unitInterval)) =
                   Dinit.branchŽä
                     (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x (Dinit.Žä k))) :=
             BHW.os45_BHWJostLiftTransport_onSupport_of_OSI45
               (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi V hV_jost hV_ET hV_swapET
               hChart Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp ŽłZ Dinit D╬® Dlor
               hWJ_inv h╬®Žä_sub hWJ_╬®Žä hlift_mem
           have hLiftPairing :
               Ōł½ x : NPointDomain d n,
                   WJ (hChart.adjLift x (0 : unitInterval)) * Žå x
                 =
               OS.S n ŽłZ :=
             BHW.os45_BHWJostLiftPairing_of_OSI45
               (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi V hChart
               Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp ŽłZ Dinit WJ hLiftTransport
           exact
             { ╬®J := ╬®J
               ╬®J_open := h╬®J_open
               ╬®J_connected := h╬®J_conn
               ╬®J_sub_bhwJostHull := h╬®J_hull
               D╬®_sub_╬®J := hD╬®_sub
               ╬®Žä_sub_╬®J := h╬®Žä_sub
               adjacentEdge_mem_╬®J := hadj_mem
               realPatch_mem_╬®J := hreal_mem
               lift_mem_╬®J_of_support := hlift_mem
               WJ := WJ
               WJ_holo := hWJ_holo
               WJ_lorentzInvariant := hWJ_inv
               WJ_agrees_╬®Žä := hWJ_╬®Žä
               WJ_realBoundary_eq_ordinary := hrealBoundary
               WJ_liftPairing := hLiftPairing }
         ```

         Proof-body checklist for these five lower surfaces:

         * `os45_BHWJostHullData_of_figure24`.
           Let `Žä := Dinit.Žä`,
           `zŽä0 := fun k => wickRotatePoint (x0 (Žä k))`, and
           `Ambient := BHW.os45BHWJostAmbient d n Žä`.  Define
           `╬®J := pathComponentIn Ambient zŽä0`.  The proof is:

           1. `Ambient` is open.  Each summand is an indexed union over
              `╬ø : ComplexLorentzGroup d` of the image of either
              `BHW.ExtendedTube d n` or
              `BHW.permutedExtendedTubeSector d n Žä` under the homeomorphism
              `z Ōå” complexLorentzAction ╬ø z`.  Use
              `BHW.isOpen_extendedTube`,
              `BHW.isOpen_permutedExtendedTubeSector`, and the action
              homeomorphism/open-map lemma; finish with `isOpen_iUnion` and
              `IsOpen.union`.
           2. `zŽä0 Ōłł Ambient`, because
              `Dinit.wick_adjacent_mem x0 hChart.x0_mem : zŽä0 Ōłł Dinit.╬®Žä`
              and `Dinit.╬®Žä` is definitionally the selected permuted
              extended-tube sector.
           3. `╬®J_open` is `Ambient_open.pathComponentIn zŽä0`.  This uses
              local path connectedness of the finite-dimensional complex
              configuration space, already available by typeclass once the
              imports include `Mathlib.Topology.Connected.LocPathConnected`.
           4. `╬®J_connected` follows from
              `isPathConnected_pathComponentIn hzŽä0` and
              `IsPathConnected.isConnected`.
           5. `Dinit.╬®Žä ŌŖå ╬®J`: prove
              `h╬®Žä_path : IsPathConnected Dinit.╬®Žä` from the checked
              connectedness/path-connectedness of the permuted extended-tube
              sector.  For `z Ōłł Dinit.╬®Žä`, use
              `h╬®Žä_path.joinedIn zŽä0 hzŽä0 z hz`, then
              `JoinedIn.mono` along `BHW.os45BHWJostAmbient_mem_adjacent`.
           6. `D╬®.╬® ŌŖå ╬®J`: first prove
              `hD╬®_path : IsPathConnected D╬®.╬®` by
              `D╬®.╬®_open.isConnected_iff_isPathConnected.mp D╬®.╬®_connected`.
              Let `zreal0 := BHW.realEmbed x0`.  The path from `zŽä0` to
              `zreal0` is the concatenation of
              `BHW.os45Figure24_joined_adjacentWick_to_adjLift0 x0
              hChart.x0_mem` and
              `BHW.os45Figure24_joined_adjLift0_to_realPatch x0
              hChart.x0_mem`, using `JoinedIn.trans`.  For any
              `z Ōłł D╬®.╬®`, join `zreal0` to `z` inside `D╬®.╬®` by
              `hD╬®_path.joinedIn`, push that path to `Ambient` through the
              identity-tube inclusion `D╬®.╬®_sub_extendedTube`, and concatenate
              again.  This is the exact OS I Figure-2-4 local connection
              between the identity and adjacent tube; it is not global PET
              independence.
           7. The remaining membership fields are pointwise consequences of
              the two subset fields:

           ```lean
           hreal_mem x hx := hD╬®_sub (D╬®.realEmbed_mem x hx)
           hlift_mem x hx :=
             hD╬®_sub (D╬®.lift_mem_of_support x hx)
           hadj_mem x hx := h╬®Žä_sub (Dinit.wick_adjacent_mem x hx)
           ```

           where `D╬®.realEmbed_mem` and `D╬®.lift_mem_of_support` are the
           existing domain fields, and `hŽå_supp hx : x Ōłł hChart.V0` is
           already used inside `D╬®.lift_mem_of_support`.

         * `os45_BHWJostBranch_onLocalHull_of_OSI45`.
           This is the formal Bargmann-Hall-Wightman continuation theorem on
           the local hull.  The inputs are `Dinit.branchŽä_holo`,
           `Dlor.branchŽä_lorentzInvariant`, `h╬®Žä : Dinit.╬®Žä ŌŖå ╬®J`,
           `h╬®_open`, `h╬®_conn`, and `h╬®_hull`.  The proof applies the
           local BHW theorem: analytic continuation of a proper-complex
           Lorentz invariant branch from one tube to the connected hull is
           single-valued; the produced branch agrees with the initial branch
           on all of `Dinit.╬®Žä`.  In Lean this should be a genuine local BHW
           theorem, for example:

           ```lean
           BHW.bargmannHallWightman_continue_branch_on_localHull
             (╬®0 := Dinit.╬®Žä) (╬®J := ╬®J) (B0 := Dinit.branchŽä)
             Dinit.╬®Žä_open h╬®_open h╬®_conn h╬®Žä h╬®_hull
             Dinit.branchŽä_holo Dlor.branchŽä_lorentzInvariant
           ```

           This theorem is allowed to use the Hall-Wightman/Bargmann proof
           internally.  It is not allowed to call a theorem whose conclusion
           is global PET branch independence or final locality.
           Its proof transcript is:

           1. For a fixed `z Ōłł Dinit.╬®Žä`, study
              `A Ōå” Dinit.branchŽä (BHW.complexLorentzAction A z)` on the open
              subset of the proper complex Lorentz group where the argument
              stays in `Dinit.╬®Žä`.  In local complex coordinates on the group,
              this is holomorphic.  On the real restricted Lorentz subgroup it
              is constant by `Dlor.branchŽä_lorentzInvariant`; the totally-real
              identity theorem on the group chart makes it constant on the
              local complex chart.
           2. Cover a proper-complex Lorentz path by finitely many such charts.
              This is Hall-Wightman Lemma 1 in local Lean form: the branch is
              invariant under every proper complex Lorentz transformation for
              which both endpoints stay in the current tube chart.
           3. Prove single-valuedness for two representations of the same hull
              point by the Hall-Wightman curve construction: if
              `A ŌĆó u = B ŌĆó v` with `u,v Ōłł Dinit.╬®Žä`, then the scalar-product
              data agree and the two tube points are connected by the finite
              chain of complex-Lorentz charts in the selected component, so
              the two analytic continuations give the same value.
           4. Define `WJ z` by choosing any such representation/chain from
              `Dinit.╬®Žä` to `z`; step 3 proves this choice-independent.
              Holomorphy of `WJ` on `╬®J` is local, because near every hull
              point the chosen final complex-Lorentz chart identifies `WJ`
              with `Dinit.branchŽä` precomposed with a complex-linear
              coordinate map.
           5. `WJ_agrees_╬®Žä` is obtained by choosing the trivial chain.  The
              global-looking Lorentz invariance field follows by appending one
              more proper-complex Lorentz chart to the representing chain and
              using the same single-valuedness argument.

         * `os45_BHWJostRealBoundaryEq_of_OSI45`.
           This theorem is not a one-line appeal to the later generic
           Jost/Ruelle uniqueness theorem.  It is the OS I ┬¦4.5 adjacent
           real-boundary comparison theorem specialized to the selected
           Figure-2-4 patch.  For each compact
           `Žć : SchwartzNPoint d n` with
           `tsupport Žć ŌŖå hChart.V0`, the proof must rebuild the compact
           zero-diagonal data for `Žć`, not reuse the fixed `Žå`-specific
           pairing field in `Dinit`:

           ```lean
           let ŽćZ : ZeroDiagonalSchwartz d n :=
             Ō¤©Žć, zeroDiagonal_of_tsupport_subset_jostOverlap
               (d := d) (n := n) hChart.V0
               (fun x hx => hV_jost x (hChart.V0_sub hx))
               Žć hŽć_suppŌ¤®
           let ŽłŽćZ : ZeroDiagonalSchwartz d n :=
             permuteZeroDiagonalSchwartz
               (d := d) (n := n) Dinit.Žä.symm ŽćZ
           ```

           Then construct the fresh initial adjacent datum
           `DinitŽć` by
           `BHW.os45Figure24_adjacentInitialBoundary_of_OSI45_4_1_4_12`,
           using `Dinit.V_ordered` and `Dinit.V_swap_ordered` as the ordered
           sector inputs, and construct `DlorŽć` from `(4.14)`.  The branch
           `DinitŽć.branchŽä` is definitionally the same corrected adjacent
           branch as `Dinit.branchŽä`; prove this by extensionality from the
           shared formula
           `branchŽä z = extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n) (fun k => z (Dinit.Žä k))`
           on `╬®Žä = permutedExtendedTubeSector d n Dinit.Žä`.

           The adjacent real boundary value is then identified pointwise on
           the real patch before integration:

           ```lean
           have hW_real :
               ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł hChart.V0 ->
                 WJ (BHW.realEmbed x) =
                   BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                     (BHW.realEmbed (fun k => x (Dinit.Žä k))) := by
             intro x hx
             have hzŽä : BHW.realEmbed x Ōłł Dinit.╬®Žä := by
               -- Unfold the selected permuted-sector real embedding and use
               -- `hV_swapET x (hChart.V0_sub hx)`.
               simpa [Dinit.╬®Žä_sector_eq,
                 BHW.permutedExtendedTubeSector, BHW.permAct,
                 Dinit.Žä] using hV_swapET x (hChart.V0_sub hx)
             calc
               WJ (BHW.realEmbed x)
                   = Dinit.branchŽä (BHW.realEmbed x) :=
                     hW_╬®Žä (BHW.realEmbed x) hzŽä
               _ = BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                     (fun k => (BHW.realEmbed x) (Dinit.Žä k)) :=
                     Dinit.branchŽä_eq_correctedExtendF
                       (BHW.realEmbed x) hzŽä
               _ = BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                     (BHW.realEmbed (fun k => x (Dinit.Žä k))) := by
                     congr 1
           ```

           Finally apply the OS I ┬¦4.5 compact branch-difference theorem on
           the same Figure-2-4 source patch:

           ```lean
           have hsource :
               Ōł½ x : NPointDomain d n,
                   BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n) (BHW.realEmbed x) * Žć x
                 =
               Ōł½ x : NPointDomain d n,
                   BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                     (BHW.realEmbed (fun k => x (Dinit.Žä k))) * Žć x :=
             BHW.os45Figure24_sourcePatch_pairing_eq_swappedSourcePatch_of_OSI45
               (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi V
               hV_open hV_jost hV_ET hV_swapET
               Dinit.V_ordered Dinit.V_swap_ordered
               hV_adjLift_ET hV_sourcePatch hChart.x0_mem hChart
               hV_orientedPath_closure
               Žć hŽć_comp hŽć_supp
           exact hsource.trans
             (integral_congr_ae (Filter.Eventually.of_forall
               (fun x => by by_cases hx : x Ōłł hChart.V0
                 ┬Ę rw [hW_real x hx]
                 ┬Ę have hŽćx : Žć x = 0 := by
                     exact
                       (notMem_tsupport_iff_eventuallyEq.mp
                         (fun hxSupp => hx (hŽć_supp hxSupp))).self_of_nhds
                   simp [hŽćx])))
           ```

           If the production theorem is not placed in the same file as
           `os45Figure24_sourcePatch_pairing_eq_swappedSourcePatch_of_OSI45`,
           the signature must carry exactly the chart-produced fields needed
           by that theorem: `V` open, `V ŌŖå os45Figure24SourcePatch`, and the
           closure-level `OS45Figure24OrientedPathField` on `hChart.V0`.  They
           may be stored in `OS45Figure24SourceChartAt` or passed explicitly,
           but they must not be replaced by a global PET theorem, scalar
           representative equality, final `bvt_W` locality, the oriented
           common-boundary envelope, or the later OS-specific
           `JostRuelleCompactBoundaryData` package that consumes the compact
           theorem.

           Dependency-order check.  The call to
           `BHW.os45Figure24_sourcePatch_pairing_eq_swappedSourcePatch_of_OSI45`
           in this real-boundary theorem is non-circular only because that
           source-patch theorem is proved earlier by the direct OS I
           ┬¦4.5/BHW-Jost compact producer, not by the branch-horizontal
           common-boundary/EOW supplier.  It must not call
           `BHW.os45_adjacent_commonBoundaryEnvelope`,
           `BHW.os45Figure24_realBoundaryEq_of_OSI45`,
           `BHW.os45_BHWJostRealBoundaryEq_of_OSI45`, any field of
           `OS45Figure24AdjacentBranchData`, or the later OS-specific
           `JostRuelleCompactBoundaryData` package.  Conversely,
           `os45_BHWJostRealBoundaryEq_of_OSI45` may consume only the finished
           source-patch compact branch-difference theorem as a compact-test
           real-trace equality, then rewrite the adjacent trace pointwise by
           `WJ_agrees_╬®Žä` and `Dinit.branchŽä_eq_correctedExtendF`.  This is the
           corrected Lean DAG:

           ```text
           Wick compact branch-difference zero
             -> OS45SourcePatchBHWJostPairData
             -> distributional zero of P.difference on the source patch
             -> checked pair-data real-source/compact-pairing algebra
             -> os45Figure24_sourcePatch_pairing_eq_swappedSourcePatch_of_OSI45
             -> os45_BHWJostRealBoundaryEq_of_OSI45
             -> JostRuelleCompactBoundaryData.realBoundary_eq
             -> jostRuelle_uniqueContinuation_compactBoundary
           ```

           The DAG direction is part of the theorem surface.  A Lean proof
           that derives the source-patch compact branch-difference theorem
           from the Jost/Ruelle package would be circular, even if each
           individual statement typechecks.

         * `os45_BHWJostLiftTransport_onSupport_of_OSI45`.
           For `x Ōłł tsupport Žå`, set
           `zlift := hChart.adjLift x 0` and
           `zraw := fun k => wickRotatePoint (x (Dinit.Žä k))`.  Choose
           `╬øinv` from `BHW.figure24RotateAdjacentConfig_lorentz_inverse` and
           prove `complexLorentzAction ╬øinv zlift = zraw` by
           `hChart.adjLift_def`, the definition of
           `BHW.os45Figure24AdjacentLift`, `BHW.permAct`, and
           `BHW.os45Figure24IdentityPath_zero`.  Then:

           ```lean
           have hzlift : zlift Ōłł ╬®J := hlift x hx
           have hzraw╬®Žä : zraw Ōłł Dinit.╬®Žä :=
             Dinit.wick_adjacent_mem x (hŽå_supp hx)
           have hzraw : zraw Ōłł ╬®J := h╬®Žä hzraw╬®Žä
           have hWraw : WJ zraw = WJ zlift :=
             hW_inv ╬øinv zlift hzlift (by simpa [hact] using hzraw)
           exact hWraw.symm.trans (hW_╬®Žä zraw hzraw╬®Žä)
           ```

         * `os45_BHWJostLiftPairing_of_OSI45`.
           Apply `integral_congr_ae`.  On `tsupport Žå`, rewrite the integrand
           by `hLift_transport`; outside `tsupport Žå`, use
           `support_subset_tsupport` to show `Žå x = 0`.  The resulting
           integral is exactly `Dinit.branchŽä_boundary_pairing`.

         With this local continuation carrier, the previously displayed source
         theorem becomes assembly only:

         ```lean
         theorem BHW.os45_BHWJost_continue_adjacentBranch_from_OSI45
             ... := by
           classical
           let C :
               BHW.OS45BHWJostLocalContinuationData
                 hd OS lgc n i hi V hV_jost hV_ET hV_swapET hChart
                 Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp ŽłZ Dinit D╬® Dlor :=
             BHW.os45_BHWJostLocalContinuationData_from_OSI45
               (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi V hV_jost hV_ET hV_swapET
               hChart Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp ŽłZ Dinit D╬® Dlor
           exact
             Ō¤©C.WJ,
              C.WJ_agrees_initialEdge,
              C.WJ_restrict_D╬®_holo,
              C.WJ_restrict_D╬®_lorentzInvariant,
              C.WJ_realBoundary_eq_ordinary,
              C.WJ_liftPairingŌ¤®
         ```

         /-- Real Jost boundary comparison for the two branches.  The source
         OS-I compact/distributional proof is stored in
         `Dadj.adjacent_realBoundary_eq_ordinary`; this theorem only rewrites
         the ordinary branch packet to the same `extendF` branch. -/
         theorem BHW.os45Figure24_realBoundaryEq_of_OSI45
             [NeZero d]
             (hd : 2 <= d)
             (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
             (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
             (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
             (V : Set (NPointDomain d n))
             (hV_jost : ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V -> x Ōłł BHW.JostSet d n)
             (hV_ET :
               ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V -> BHW.realEmbed x Ōłł BHW.ExtendedTube d n)
             (hV_swapET :
               ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V ->
                 BHW.realEmbed (fun k => x (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤® k)) Ōłł
                   BHW.ExtendedTube d n)
             (hV_ordered :
               ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V ->
                 x Ōłł EuclideanOrderedPositiveTimeSector (d := d) (n := n) 1)
             (hV_swap_ordered :
               ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V ->
                 (fun k => x (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤® k)) Ōłł
                   EuclideanOrderedPositiveTimeSector (d := d) (n := n)
                     (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®))
             {x0 : NPointDomain d n}
             (hChart :
               BHW.OS45Figure24SourceChartAt hd OS lgc n i hi V x0)
             (Žå : SchwartzNPoint d n)
             (hŽå_comp :
               HasCompactSupport (Žå : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé))
             (hŽå_supp :
               tsupport (Žå : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) ŌŖå hChart.V0)
             (ŽåZ ŽłZ : ZeroDiagonalSchwartz d n)
             (D╬® :
               BHW.OS45Figure24JostRuelleDomainData
                 hd OS lgc n i hi V hV_jost hV_ET hV_swapET hChart
                 Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp)
             (Dord :
               BHW.OS45Figure24OrdinaryBranchData
                 hd OS lgc n i hi V hV_jost hV_ET hV_swapET hChart
                 Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp D╬®)
             (Dadj :
               BHW.OS45Figure24AdjacentBranchData
                 hd OS lgc n i hi V hV_jost hV_ET hV_swapET hChart
                 Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp
                 ŽåZ ŽłZ D╬®) :
             ŌłĆ Žć : SchwartzNPoint d n,
               HasCompactSupport (Žć : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) ->
               tsupport (Žć : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) ŌŖå hChart.V0 ->
                 Ōł½ x : NPointDomain d n,
                     Dord.ordinaryBranch (BHW.realEmbed x) * Žć x
                   =
                 Ōł½ x : NPointDomain d n,
                     Dadj.adjacentBranch (BHW.realEmbed x) * Žć x
         ```

         Because `OS45Figure24AdjacentBranchData` now carries the real Jost
         boundary comparison as source provenance, the theorem above is a
         mechanical extraction rather than a second OS-I theorem asserted for
         an arbitrary adjacent branch:

         ```lean
         theorem BHW.os45Figure24_realBoundaryEq_of_OSI45
             ... := by
           intro Žć hŽć_comp hŽć_supp
           have hsrc :
               Ōł½ x : NPointDomain d n,
                   BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n) (BHW.realEmbed x) * Žć x
                 =
               Ōł½ x : NPointDomain d n,
                   Dadj.adjacentBranch (BHW.realEmbed x) * Žć x :=
             Dadj.adjacent_realBoundary_eq_ordinary
               Žć hŽć_comp hŽć_supp
           simpa [Dord.ordinaryBranch_def] using hsrc
         ```

         Lean-shaped proof of the ordinary branch packet:

         ```lean
         theorem BHW.os45Figure24_ordinaryBranchData_of_bvt_F
             ... (D╬® :
               BHW.OS45Figure24JostRuelleDomainData
                 hd OS lgc n i hi V hV_jost hV_ET hV_swapET hChart
                 Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp) := by
           let Bord : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé :=
             BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
           have hF_holo_BHW :
               DifferentiableOn Ōäé (bvt_F OS lgc n) (BHW.ForwardTube d n) := by
             simpa [BHW_forwardTube_eq (d := d) (n := n)] using
               bvt_F_holomorphic (d := d) OS lgc n
           have hF_cinv_BHW :
               ŌłĆ (╬ø : ComplexLorentzGroup d)
                 (z : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé),
                 z Ōłł BHW.ForwardTube d n ->
                 BHW.complexLorentzAction ╬ø z Ōłł BHW.ForwardTube d n ->
                 bvt_F OS lgc n (BHW.complexLorentzAction ╬ø z) =
                   bvt_F OS lgc n z := by
             intro ╬ø z hz h╬øz
             exact bvt_F_complexLorentzInvariant_forwardTube
               (d := d) OS lgc n ╬ø z
               ((BHW_forwardTube_eq (d := d) (n := n)) Ō¢Ė hz)
               ((BHW_forwardTube_eq (d := d) (n := n)) Ō¢Ė h╬øz)
           have hF_real_inv_BHW :
               ŌłĆ (╬ø : RestrictedLorentzGroup d)
                 (z : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé),
                 z Ōłł BHW.ForwardTube d n ->
                   bvt_F OS lgc n
                     (fun k ╬╝ => Ōłæ ╬Į, (╬ø.val.val ╬╝ ╬Į : Ōäé) * z k ╬Į) =
                   bvt_F OS lgc n z := by
             intro ╬ø z hz
             exact bvt_F_restrictedLorentzInvariant_forwardTube
               (d := d) OS lgc n ╬ø z
               ((BHW_forwardTube_eq (d := d) (n := n)) Ō¢Ė hz)
           have hBord_diff :
               DifferentiableOn Ōäé Bord D╬®.╬® :=
             (BHW.extendF_holomorphicOn n (bvt_F OS lgc n)
               hF_holo_BHW hF_cinv_BHW).mono D╬®.╬®_sub_extendedTube
           have hBord_inv :
               ŌłĆ ╬ø z, z Ōłł D╬®.╬® ->
                 BHW.complexLorentzAction ╬ø z Ōłł D╬®.╬® ->
                 Bord (BHW.complexLorentzAction ╬ø z) = Bord z := by
             intro ╬ø z hz h╬øz
             exact
               BHW.extendF_complex_lorentz_invariant
                 (d := d) n (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                 hF_holo_BHW hF_real_inv_BHW ╬ø z
                 (D╬®.╬®_sub_extendedTube hz)
           exact
             { ordinary_holo := by
                 simpa [Bord]
                   using hBord_diff
               ordinary_lorentzInvariant := by
                 intro ╬ø z hz h╬øz
                 simpa [Bord] using hBord_inv ╬ø z hz h╬øz
               ordinary_eq_extendF_on_lift := by
                 intro x hx
                 rfl }
         ```

         This proof uses only ordinary Hall-Wightman/BHW support already
         required upstream: holomorphy of `bvt_F`, complex Lorentz invariance
         on the forward tube for `extendF_holomorphicOn`, restricted real
         Lorentz invariance for the checked
         `BHW.extendF_complex_lorentz_invariant`, and no unimplemented
         extension-invariance bridge.  It does not use the
         scalar representative, the adjacent trace theorem, local source
         equality, PET, EOW, or final locality.

         The assembly of
         `os45CanonicalAdjacentBranchBoundaryData_of_OSI45` then has no
         discretion: define `Žä`, `ŽåZ`, and `ŽłZ` exactly as above; obtain
         `D╬® := os45Figure24_jostRuelleDomainData_of_chart`, then
         `Dord := os45Figure24_ordinaryBranchData_of_bvt_F ... D╬®`, then
         `Dadj := os45Figure24_adjacentBranchData_of_OSI45 ... ŽåZ ŽłZ D╬®`,
         and finally set
         `hreal := os45Figure24_realBoundaryEq_of_OSI45 ... D╬® Dord Dadj`,
         which is only a rewrite of
         `Dadj.adjacent_realBoundary_eq_ordinary` through
         `Dord.ordinaryBranch_def`.
         Build the generic `jr` record with
         `╬® := D╬®.╬®`, `lift := fun x => hChart.adjLift x 0`,
         `jostPatch := hChart.V0`, `ordinaryBranch := Dord.ordinaryBranch`,
         and `adjacentBranch := Dadj.adjacentBranch`.  Fill
         `jr.lift_mem_of_support` from `D╬®.lift_mem_of_support`,
         `jr.jostPatch_*` and `jr.jostPatch_realEmbed_mem` from the domain
         packet, `jr.ordinary_holo` and `jr.ordinary_lorentzInvariant` from
         `Dord`, `jr.adjacent_holo` and `jr.adjacent_lorentzInvariant` from
         `Dadj`, and `jr.realBoundary_eq` from `hreal`.  Set `jr_lift_eq`
         by `rfl`, set `ordinary_eq_extendF_on_lift` from
         `Dord.ordinary_eq_extendF_on_lift`, and set
         `adjacent_lift_pairing_eq_permutedSchwinger` from
         `Dadj.adjacent_lift_pairing_eq_permutedSchwinger`.

         Lean-shaped proof of the canonical adjacent boundary data assembly:

         ```lean
         theorem BHW.os45CanonicalAdjacentBranchBoundaryData_of_OSI45
             ... := by
           classical
           let Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n) :=
             Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®
           let ŽåZ : ZeroDiagonalSchwartz d n :=
             Ō¤©Žå, zeroDiagonal_of_tsupport_subset_jostOverlap
               (d := d) (n := n) hChart.V0
               (fun x hx => hV_jost x (hChart.V0_sub hx))
               Žå hŽå_suppŌ¤®
           let ŽłZ : ZeroDiagonalSchwartz d n :=
             permuteZeroDiagonalSchwartz (d := d) (n := n) Žä.symm ŽåZ
           have hŽåZ_def :
               ŽåZ =
                 Ō¤©Žå, zeroDiagonal_of_tsupport_subset_jostOverlap
                   (d := d) (n := n) hChart.V0
                   (fun x hx => hV_jost x (hChart.V0_sub hx))
                   Žå hŽå_suppŌ¤® := rfl
           have hŽłZ_def :
               ŽłZ =
                 permuteZeroDiagonalSchwartz (d := d) (n := n)
                   Žä.symm ŽåZ := rfl
           have D╬® :
               BHW.OS45Figure24JostRuelleDomainData
                 hd OS lgc n i hi V hV_jost hV_ET hV_swapET hChart
                 Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp :=
             BHW.os45Figure24_jostRuelleDomainData_of_chart
               (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi V hV_jost hV_ET
               hV_swapET hChart Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp
           have Dord :
               BHW.OS45Figure24OrdinaryBranchData
                 hd OS lgc n i hi V hV_jost hV_ET hV_swapET hChart
                 Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp D╬® :=
             BHW.os45Figure24_ordinaryBranchData_of_bvt_F
               (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi V hV_jost hV_ET
               hV_swapET hChart Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp D╬®
           have Dadj :
               BHW.OS45Figure24AdjacentBranchData
                 hd OS lgc n i hi V hV_jost hV_ET hV_swapET hChart
                 Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp ŽåZ ŽłZ D╬® :=
             BHW.os45Figure24_adjacentBranchData_of_OSI45
               (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi V hV_jost
               hV_ET hV_swapET hV_ordered hV_swap_ordered
               hChart Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp ŽåZ ŽłZ hŽåZ_def
               (by simpa [Žä] using hŽłZ_def) D╬®
           have hreal :
               ŌłĆ Žć : SchwartzNPoint d n,
                 HasCompactSupport (Žć : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) ->
                 tsupport (Žć : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) ŌŖå hChart.V0 ->
                   Ōł½ x : NPointDomain d n,
                       Dord.ordinaryBranch (BHW.realEmbed x) * Žć x
                     =
                   Ōł½ x : NPointDomain d n,
                       Dadj.adjacentBranch (BHW.realEmbed x) * Žć x :=
             BHW.os45Figure24_realBoundaryEq_of_OSI45
               (d := d) hd OS lgc n i hi V hV_jost
               hV_ET hV_swapET hV_ordered hV_swap_ordered
               hChart Žå hŽå_comp hŽå_supp ŽåZ ŽłZ D╬® Dord Dadj
           let jr : BHW.JostRuelleCompactBoundaryData hd n Žå hŽå_comp :=
             { ╬® := D╬®.╬®
               ╬®_open := D╬®.╬®_open
               ╬®_connected := D╬®.╬®_connected
               lift := fun x => hChart.adjLift x (0 : unitInterval)
               lift_mem_of_support := D╬®.lift_mem_of_support
               jostPatch := hChart.V0
               jostPatch_open := D╬®.jostPatch_open
               jostPatch_nonempty := D╬®.jostPatch_nonempty
               jostPatch_jost := D╬®.jostPatch_jost
               jostPatch_realEmbed_mem := D╬®.realEmbed_mem
               ordinaryBranch := Dord.ordinaryBranch
               adjacentBranch := Dadj.adjacentBranch
               ordinary_holo := Dord.ordinary_holo
               adjacent_holo := Dadj.adjacent_holo
               ordinary_lorentzInvariant :=
                 Dord.ordinary_lorentzInvariant
               adjacent_lorentzInvariant :=
                 Dadj.adjacent_lorentzInvariant
               realBoundary_eq := hreal }
           exact
             { Žä := Žä
               ŽåZ := ŽåZ
               ŽłZ := ŽłZ
               ŽåZ_def := hŽåZ_def
               ŽłZ_def := by simpa [Žä] using hŽłZ_def
               jr := jr
               jr_lift_eq := by intro x; rfl
               ordinary_eq_extendF_on_lift :=
                 Dord.ordinary_eq_extendF_on_lift
               adjacent_lift_pairing_eq_permutedSchwinger :=
                 Dadj.adjacent_lift_pairing_eq_permutedSchwinger }
         ```

         The corrected source-patch PET-overlap theorem is **not** obtained by
         adding fields that compare each real source branch separately with a
         Schwinger functional.  Such statements would identify
         `extendF (realEmbed x)` or `extendF (realEmbed (x Ōłś Žä))` with
         Wick-rotated Euclidean values one branch at a time, which is not what
         `bvt_euclidean_restriction` says.  The OS I ┬¦4.5 theorem supplies
         only the branch-difference continuation: the compact Wick-side
         difference vanishes by Euclidean symmetry, and the direct OS I
         ┬¦4.5/BHW-Jost source-patch carrier transports that same difference
         to the selected real source PET-overlap trace.  This carrier is
         upstream of the oriented common-boundary envelope and must not call
         `BHW.os45_adjacent_commonBoundaryEnvelope`.  The source-patch theorem
         surface is:

         ```lean
         theorem BHW.os45Figure24_sourcePatch_pairing_eq_swappedSourcePatch_of_OSI45
             [NeZero d]
             (hd : 2 <= d)
             (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
             (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
             (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
             (V : Set (NPointDomain d n))
             (hV_open : IsOpen V)
             (hV_jost : ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V -> x Ōłł BHW.JostSet d n)
             (hV_ET :
               ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V -> BHW.realEmbed x Ōłł BHW.ExtendedTube d n)
             (hV_swapET :
               ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V ->
                 BHW.realEmbed (fun k => x (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤® k)) Ōłł
                   BHW.ExtendedTube d n)
             (hV_ordered :
               ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V ->
                 x Ōłł EuclideanOrderedPositiveTimeSector (d := d) (n := n) 1)
             (hV_swap_ordered :
               ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V ->
                 (fun k => x (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤® k)) Ōłł
                   EuclideanOrderedPositiveTimeSector (d := d) (n := n)
                     (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®))
             (hV_adjLift_ET :
               let Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n) :=
                 Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®
               ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V -> ŌłĆ t,
                 BHW.os45Figure24AdjacentLift
                   (d := d) (n := n) hd Žä x t Ōłł
                 BHW.ExtendedTube d n)
             (hV_sourcePatch :
               V ŌŖå BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch (d := d) n i hi)
             {x0 : NPointDomain d n}
             (hx0V : x0 Ōłł V)
             (hChart :
               BHW.OS45Figure24SourceChartAt hd OS lgc n i hi V x0)
             (hV_orientedPath_closure :
               ŌłĆ x Ōłł closure hChart.V0,
                 BHW.OS45Figure24OrientedPathField (d := d) n i hi x)
             (Žł : SchwartzNPoint d n)
             (hŽł_comp :
               HasCompactSupport (Žł : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé))
             (hŽł_supp :
               tsupport (Žł : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) ŌŖå hChart.V0) :
             Ōł½ u : NPointDomain d n,
                 BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n) (BHW.realEmbed u) * Žł u
               =
             Ōł½ u : NPointDomain d n,
                 BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                   (BHW.realEmbed
                     (fun k => u (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤® k))) *
                   Žł u
         ```

         Its implementation transcript has exactly four mathematical steps.

         1. Let `Žä := Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®`.  Use the checked
            theorem
            `os45_adjacent_euclideanEdge_pairing_eq_on_timeSector` on
            `hChart.V0` with `Žü := 1`, ordinary order
            `fun x hx => hV_ordered x (hChart.V0_sub hx)`, and swapped order
            normalized by `Equiv.swap_inv` and `one_mul`, to prove the
            distributional Wick-side zero for **every** compact test supported
            in the chart:

            ```lean
            have hwick_pairing_zero_all :
                ŌłĆ (Žć : SchwartzNPoint d n),
                  HasCompactSupport (Žć : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) ->
                  tsupport (Žć : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) ŌŖå hChart.V0 ->
                  Ōł½ x,
                      (bvt_F OS lgc n (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x (Žä k))) -
                        bvt_F OS lgc n (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x k))) *
                        Žć x = 0 := ...
            ```

            This is the only Euclidean compact-test equality used by the
            theorem.  It is a branch-difference equality, not a value of either
            branch separately.  The helper
            `BHW.integral_wickBranchDifference_mul_eq_zero_of_pairing_eq` is
            only measure bookkeeping: it expands `(A - B) * Žć`, uses the
            standard compact-support integrability estimates for the two Wick
            traces, and rewrites equality of the two pairings as zero of the
            paired difference.

            The integrability side is local bookkeeping pinned to the same
            hypotheses as the checked Euclidean edge theorem:

            ```lean
            theorem BHW.integrable_pairings_of_os45_adjacent_euclideanEdge_on_timeSector
                [NeZero d]
                (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
                (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
                (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
                (V : Set (NPointDomain d n))
                (hV_jost : ŌłĆ x Ōłł V, x Ōłł BHW.JostSet d n)
                (Žü : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
                (hV_ordered : ŌłĆ x Ōłł V,
                  x Ōłł EuclideanOrderedPositiveTimeSector
                    (d := d) (n := n) Žü)
                (hV_swap_ordered : ŌłĆ x Ōłł V,
                  (fun k => x (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤® k)) Ōłł
                    EuclideanOrderedPositiveTimeSector (d := d) (n := n)
                      ((Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®).symm * Žü))
                (Žć : SchwartzNPoint d n)
                (hŽć_comp :
                  HasCompactSupport (Žć : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé))
                (hŽć_supp :
                  tsupport (Žć : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) ŌŖå V) :
                Integrable
                  (fun x : NPointDomain d n =>
                    bvt_F OS lgc n
                      (fun k =>
                        wickRotatePoint
                          (x (Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤® k))) *
                      Žć x) Ōł¦
                Integrable
                  (fun x : NPointDomain d n =>
                    bvt_F OS lgc n
                      (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x k)) * Žć x)
            ```

            Production Lean now supplies this integrability input directly.
            The identity Wick trace is continuous on the ordered source patch
            by `bvt_F_holomorphic`,
            `BHW.continuous_wickRotateRealConfig`, and
            `wickRotate_mem_forwardTube_of_mem_orderedPositiveTimeSector`;
            compact support gives integrability by
            `SCV.integrable_continuousOn_mul_schwartz_of_supportsInOpen`.
            The permuted Wick trace is reduced pointwise to the identity trace
            by the checked global permutation invariance `bvt_F_perm`.

            ```lean
            theorem BHW.continuous_wickRotateRealConfig
                {d n : Nat} :
                Continuous
                  (fun x : NPointDomain d n =>
                    fun k => wickRotatePoint (x k))

            theorem BHW.integrable_bvt_F_wickRotate_mul_schwartz_of_orderedSector
                [NeZero d]
                (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
                (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
                (n : Nat)
                (V : Set (NPointDomain d n))
                (hV_open : IsOpen V)
                (hV_ordered :
                  ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V ->
                    x Ōłł EuclideanOrderedPositiveTimeSector
                      (d := d) (n := n) (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)))
                (Žå : SchwartzNPoint d n)
                (hŽå_comp :
                  HasCompactSupport (Žå : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé))
                (hŽå_supp :
                  tsupport (Žå : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) ŌŖå V) :
                Integrable
                  (fun u : NPointDomain d n =>
                    bvt_F OS lgc n
                      (fun k => wickRotatePoint (u k)) * Žå u)

            theorem BHW.integrable_wickEdge_bvt_F_mul_schwartz_of_orderedSector
                [NeZero d]
                (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
                (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
                (n : Nat)
                (V : Set (NPointDomain d n))
                (hV_open : IsOpen V)
                (hV_ordered :
                  ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V ->
                    x Ōłł
                      EuclideanOrderedPositiveTimeSector
                        (d := d) (n := n) (1 : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)))
                (Žü : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
                (Žå : SchwartzNPoint d n)
                (hŽå_comp :
                  HasCompactSupport (Žå : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé))
                (hŽå_supp :
                  tsupport (Žå : NPointDomain d n -> Ōäé) ŌŖå V) :
                Integrable
                  (fun u : NPointDomain d n =>
                    bvt_F OS lgc n
                      (fun k => wickRotatePoint (u (Žü k))) * Žå u)
            ```

            Production Lean now has the final bridge
            `BHW.os45_wickBranchDifference_zero_of_euclideanEdge_pairing_eq_on_timeSector`;
            after the two Wick integrability hypotheses are supplied, that
            theorem calls the checked Euclidean-edge pairing theorem and the
            checked measure-algebra lemma below to produce exactly
            `hwick_pairing_zero_all`.

            ```lean
            theorem BHW.integral_wickBranchDifference_mul_eq_zero_of_pairing_eq
                [NeZero d]
                (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
                (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
                (n : Nat) (Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
                (Žć : SchwartzNPoint d n)
                (hleft_int :
                  Integrable
                    (fun x : NPointDomain d n =>
                      bvt_F OS lgc n
