            ```lean
                        (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x (Žä k))) * Žć x))
                (hright_int :
                  Integrable
                    (fun x : NPointDomain d n =>
                      bvt_F OS lgc n
                        (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x k)) * Žć x))
                (hpair :
                  Ōł½ x : NPointDomain d n,
                      bvt_F OS lgc n
                        (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x (Žä k))) * Žć x
                    =
                  Ōł½ x : NPointDomain d n,
                      bvt_F OS lgc n
                        (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x k)) * Žć x) :
                Ōł½ x : NPointDomain d n,
                    (bvt_F OS lgc n
                        (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x (Žä k))) -
                      bvt_F OS lgc n
                        (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x k))) * Žć x = 0 := by
              calc
                Ōł½ x : NPointDomain d n,
                    (bvt_F OS lgc n
                        (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x (Žä k))) -
                      bvt_F OS lgc n
                        (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x k))) * Žć x
                    =
                  (Ōł½ x : NPointDomain d n,
                    bvt_F OS lgc n
                      (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x (Žä k))) * Žć x) -
                  (Ōł½ x : NPointDomain d n,
                    bvt_F OS lgc n
                      (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x k)) * Žć x) := by
                    rw [sub_mul,
                      MeasureTheory.integral_sub hleft_int hright_int]
                _ = 0 := sub_eq_zero.mpr hpair
            ```

         2. Construct the direct OS-I/BHW-Jost source-patch difference
            carrier.  This is the active replacement for the earlier circular
            common-boundary-envelope step.  First construct the
            test-independent pair carrier:

            ```lean
            structure BHW.OS45SourcePatchBHWJostPairData
                [NeZero d] (hd : 2 <= d)
                (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
                (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
                (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
                (V : Set (NPointDomain d n)) where
              Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)
              Žä_eq : Žä = Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®
              U : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé)
              V_open : IsOpen V
              V_nonempty : V.Nonempty
              U_open : IsOpen U
              U_connected : IsConnected U
              wick_mem : ŌłĆ x Ōłł V, (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x k)) Ōłł U
              real_mem : ŌłĆ x Ōłł V, BHW.realEmbed x Ōłł U
              Bord Btau : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé
              Bord_holo : DifferentiableOn Ōäé Bord U
              Btau_holo : DifferentiableOn Ōäé Btau U
              Bord_wick_trace :
                ŌłĆ x Ōłł V,
                  Bord (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x k)) =
                    bvt_F OS lgc n (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x k))
              Btau_wick_trace :
                ŌłĆ x Ōłł V,
                  Btau (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x k)) =
                    bvt_F OS lgc n
                      (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x (Žä k)))
              Bord_real_trace :
                ŌłĆ x Ōłł V,
                  Bord (BHW.realEmbed x) =
                    BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n) (BHW.realEmbed x)
              Btau_real_trace :
                ŌłĆ x Ōłł V,
                  Btau (BHW.realEmbed x) =
                    BHW.extendF (bvt_F OS lgc n)
                      (BHW.realEmbed (fun k => x (Žä k)))

            theorem BHW.os45_sourcePatch_bhwJostPairData_on_figure24SourcePatch_of_OSI45
                [NeZero d] (hd : 2 <= d)
                (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
                (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
                (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n) :
                BHW.OS45SourcePatchBHWJostPairData
                  hd OS lgc n i hi
                    (BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch (d := d) (n := n) i hi)
            ```

            `Bord` is the ordinary BHW/Jost branch and `Btau` is the adjacent
            continued branch on the same selected Figure-2-4 hull.  The proof
            first sets
            `Pcan := BHW.os45_adjacent_identity_canonicalSourcePatch hd i hi`,
            rewrites its `V` by `BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch`, and uses the
            checked exact source-patch accessors for openness, nonemptiness,
            Jost membership, ordered-sector membership, ordinary/swapped
            extended-tube membership, and `BHW.permAct_realEmbed` for the
            permuted real trace.  It constructs the hull as the connected
            component of the local proper-complex Lorentz ambient containing
            the identity Wick edge, adjacent Wick edge, and real source patch;
            proves the two
            holomorphy fields from BHW continuation; proves the Wick trace
            formulas from OS-I equations (4.1), (4.12), and the checked Wick
            restriction; and proves the real trace formulas from the
            deterministic source-patch boundary identification with the
            checked exact source-patch tube fields.  A broader chart-local
            statement is only a later restriction corollary via
            `BHW.OS45SourcePatchBHWJostPairData.restrict`; it is not the first
            Lean target and must not reintroduce `OS45Figure24SourceChartAt`
            as an analytic dependency.  This is the direct OS-I/BHW-Jost
            proof-doc frontier; it is not final locality and not the oriented
            common-boundary envelope.

            The implementation-level split of this frontier is now fixed.
            The public pair-data theorem may not be the first Lean target; it
            must assemble the following lower surfaces:

            ```lean
            def BHW.os45SourcePatchBHWJostAmbient
                (d n : Nat) (Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) :
                Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) :=
              BHW.ExtendedTube d n Ōł¬
                {z | BHW.permAct (d := d) Žä z Ōłł BHW.ExtendedTube d n}

            def BHW.os45SourcePatchBHWJostHull
                (d n : Nat) (Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
                (z0 : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) :
                Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) :=
              pathComponentIn (BHW.os45SourcePatchBHWJostAmbient d n Žä) z0

            structure BHW.OS45SourcePatchBHWJostHullData
                [NeZero d] (hd : 2 <= d)
                (OS : OsterwalderSchraderAxioms d)
                (lgc : OSLinearGrowthCondition d OS)
                (n : Nat) (i : Fin n) (hi : i.val + 1 < n)
                (V : Set (NPointDomain d n))
                where
              Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)
              Žä_eq : Žä = Equiv.swap i Ō¤©i.val + 1, hiŌ¤®
              x0 : NPointDomain d n
              x0_mem : x0 Ōłł V
              z0 : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé
              z0_eq : z0 = fun k => wickRotatePoint (x0 k)
              U : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé)
              U_eq : U = BHW.os45SourcePatchBHWJostHull d n Žä z0
              V_open : IsOpen V
              V_nonempty : V.Nonempty
              U_open : IsOpen U
              U_connected : IsConnected U
              wick_id_mem :
                ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V ->
                  (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x k)) Ōłł U
              real_id_mem :
                ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V -> BHW.realEmbed x Ōłł U
              wick_id_ET :
                ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V ->
                  (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x k)) Ōłł BHW.ExtendedTube d n
              real_id_ET :
                ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V -> BHW.realEmbed x Ōłł BHW.ExtendedTube d n
              real_tau_ET :
                ŌłĆ x, x Ōłł V ->
                  BHW.permAct (d := d) Žä (BHW.realEmbed x) Ōłł
                    BHW.ExtendedTube d n
            ```

            `BHW.isOpen_os45SourcePatchBHWJostAmbient` is the union of
            `BHW.isOpen_extendedTube` and its preimage under the continuous
            finite permutation map.  The checked noncomputable hull-data
            constructor
            `BHW.os45_sourcePatch_bhwJostHullData_on_figure24SourcePatch`
            sets `U := pathComponentIn Ambient z0`; `U_open` is now the
            checked `BHW.os45SourcePatchBHWJostHull_open`, from
            `BHW.isOpen_pathComponentIn_of_isOpen_normed`, and `U_connected`
            follows from the path component in the finite-dimensional locally
            path-connected configuration space.  The checked
            `BHW.mem_os45SourcePatchBHWJostHull_of_extendedTube` now supplies
            both `U` membership fields after the selected seed gives
            `z0 Ōłł BHW.ExtendedTube d n`: `wick_id_mem` follows from
            `wick_id_ET`, and `real_id_mem` follows from `real_id_ET`.  The
            direct tube-membership fields are: ordered-sector membership plus
            `BHW.os45Figure24SourcePatch_wick_mem_extendedTube` gives
            `wick_id_ET`; checked exact source-patch ordinary/swapped
            extended-tube accessors, with `BHW.permAct_realEmbed` for the
            permuted real configuration, give the two real fields.  There is
            deliberately no direct `wick_tau_ET`: the checked swapped ordered
            sector does not imply
            `BHW.permAct Žä (fun k => wickRotatePoint (x k)) Ōłł BHW.ExtendedTube d n`.
            The adjacent Wick trace is an OS-I/BHW continuation output, not a
            source-patch tube-membership accessor.
            The Lean API is pinned to `JoinedIn.mono`,
            `BHW.isOpen_pathComponentIn_of_isOpen_normed`,
            `BHW.os45SourcePatchBHWJostHull_open`,
            `BHW.mem_os45SourcePatchBHWJostHull_of_extendedTube`, and
            `IsOpen.isConnected_iff_isPathConnected`.

            The generic continuation surface must not assert that every
            holomorphic function on an open subset meeting a connected hull
            extends to the whole hull.  That would be false even for domains
            in `Ōäé`.  The BHW/Jost theorem first constructs a continuation
            atlas: local holomorphic branches covering the selected hull,
            compatible on overlaps and normalized against the starting branch.
            The Lean-facing carrier is:

            ```lean
            structure BHW.BHWSourcePatchContinuationAtlas
                [NeZero d] (hd : 2 <= d)
                (n : Nat) (Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
                (╬®0 U : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé))
                (B0 : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé) where
              chart : Type
              carrier : chart -> Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé)
              branch : chart -> (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé
              cover : ŌłĆ z, z Ōłł U -> Ōłā a, z Ōłł carrier a
              carrier_open : ŌłĆ a, IsOpen (carrier a)
              carrier_sub_U : ŌłĆ a, carrier a ŌŖå U
              branch_holo : ŌłĆ a, DifferentiableOn Ōäé (branch a) (carrier a)
              overlap_eq :
                ŌłĆ a b,
                  Set.EqOn (branch a) (branch b) (carrier a Ōł® carrier b)
              base_agree :
                ŌłĆ z, z Ōłł ╬®0 Ōł® U ->
                  Ōłā a, z Ōłł carrier a Ōł¦ branch a z = B0 z

            theorem BHW.bhw_sourcePatchHull_has_continuationAtlas
                [NeZero d] (hd : 2 <= d)
                (n : Nat) (Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
                (╬®0 U : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé))
                (B0 : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé)
                (h╬®0_open : IsOpen ╬®0)
                (hU_open : IsOpen U)
                (hU_connected : IsConnected U)
                (h╬®0_sub_ambient :
                  ╬®0 ŌŖå BHW.os45SourcePatchBHWJostAmbient d n Žä)
                (hU_hull :
                  Ōłā z0, U = BHW.os45SourcePatchBHWJostHull d n Žä z0)
                (h╬®0_meets_U : (╬®0 Ōł® U).Nonempty)
                (hB0_holo : DifferentiableOn Ōäé B0 ╬®0)
                (hB0_realLorentz :
                  ŌłĆ R : RestrictedLorentzGroup d, ŌłĆ z, z Ōłł ╬®0 ->
                    BHW.complexLorentzAction
                        (ComplexLorentzGroup.ofReal R) z Ōłł ╬®0 ->
                      B0 (BHW.complexLorentzAction
                          (ComplexLorentzGroup.ofReal R) z) = B0 z) :
                BHW.BHWSourcePatchContinuationAtlas hd n Žä ╬®0 U B0

            theorem BHW.bhw_glue_sourcePatchContinuationAtlas
                [NeZero d] (hd : 2 <= d)
                (n : Nat) (Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
                (╬®0 U : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé))
                (B0 : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé)
                (A : BHW.BHWSourcePatchContinuationAtlas hd n Žä ╬®0 U B0) :
                Ōłā B : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé,
                  DifferentiableOn Ōäé B U Ōł¦
                  (ŌłĆ z, z Ōłł ╬®0 -> z Ōłł U -> B z = B0 z)

            theorem BHW.bargmannHallWightman_continue_branch_on_sourcePatchHull
                [NeZero d] (hd : 2 <= d)
                (n : Nat) (Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
                (╬®0 U : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé))
                (B0 : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé)
                (h╬®0_open : IsOpen ╬®0)
                (hU_open : IsOpen U)
                (hU_connected : IsConnected U)
                (h╬®0_sub_ambient :
                  ╬®0 ŌŖå BHW.os45SourcePatchBHWJostAmbient d n Žä)
                (hU_hull :
                  Ōłā z0, U = BHW.os45SourcePatchBHWJostHull d n Žä z0)
                (h╬®0_meets_U : (╬®0 Ōł® U).Nonempty)
                (hB0_holo : DifferentiableOn Ōäé B0 ╬®0)
                (hB0_realLorentz :
                  ŌłĆ R : RestrictedLorentzGroup d, ŌłĆ z, z Ōłł ╬®0 ->
                    BHW.complexLorentzAction
                        (ComplexLorentzGroup.ofReal R) z Ōłł ╬®0 ->
                      B0 (BHW.complexLorentzAction
                          (ComplexLorentzGroup.ofReal R) z) = B0 z) :
                Ōłā B : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé,
                  DifferentiableOn Ōäé B U Ōł¦
                  (ŌłĆ z, z Ōłł ╬®0 -> z Ōłł U -> B z = B0 z)
            ```

            The gluing theorem is the sheaf step: choose a chart containing
            `z`, use `overlap_eq` for independence of the choice, prove
            holomorphy locally from `branch_holo`, and prove agreement with
            `B0` by `base_agree`.  The hard theorem is
            `bhw_sourcePatchHull_has_continuationAtlas`.  Its proof is
            Hall-Wightman Lemma 1 in finite charts: real Lorentz covariance
            gives local constancy on proper-complex Lorentz exponential
            charts; path chains inside the selected hull produce local
            branches; and the closed invariant-monodromy theorem gives
            overlap equality and single-valuedness.  It may use the OS-I
            `(4.14)` covariance input for `bvt_F` and the local BHW proof,
            but it must not call
            `fullExtendF`, global PET independence, global
            source-representative packages,
            `BHW.os45_adjacent_commonBoundaryEnvelope`, or final locality.

            The atlas producer itself must be implemented through local
            invariant continuation charts, not by postulating an atlas.  These
            charts are local Hall-Wightman/Jost proof objects; in the
            conditional ordinary fork they use scalar-product descent, while
            in the strict route they use oriented-source descent.  In either
            case they must not consume the global
            `SourceScalarRepresentativeData` package as an input.  Each local
            chart carrier and scalar/oriented germ domain is explicitly
            preconnected: the identity theorem only propagates
            branch equality across the active component, so the implementation
            must shrink every Hall-Wightman/Jost neighborhood to an open
            preconnected carrier and a preconnected invariant-domain patch
            before storing it in a local chart or continuation chain.

            Critical route gate: the `BHWJostLocalScalar...` block below is
            the conditional ordinary fork.  It is Lean-ready only after the
            full-component Hall-Wightman source theorem below supplies
            `branch_same_sourceGram` with exact parameters.  On the strict OS
            I ┬¦4.5 proper-complex route, the same packet must be restated with
            the oriented invariant:

            ```lean
            structure BHW.BHWJostLocalOrientedContinuationChart
                [NeZero d] (hd : 2 <= d)
                (n : Nat) (Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
                (U : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé)) where
              carrier : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé)
              carrier_open : IsOpen carrier
              carrier_preconnected : IsPreconnected carrier
              carrier_sub_U : carrier ŌŖå U
              orientedDomain : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n)
              oriented_relOpen :
                BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety d n orientedDomain
              oriented_preconnected : IsPreconnected orientedDomain
              oriented_sub_variety :
                orientedDomain ŌŖå BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety d n
              oriented_mem :
                ŌłĆ z, z Ōłł carrier ->
                  BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n z Ōłł orientedDomain
              oriented_realizes :
                ŌłĆ G, G Ōłł orientedDomain ->
                  Ōłā z, z Ōłł carrier Ōł¦
                    BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n z = G
              Psi : BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n -> Ōäé
              Psi_holo :
                BHW.SourceOrientedVarietyGermHolomorphicOn d n Psi
                  orientedDomain
              branch : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé
              branch_eq_orientedPullback :
                ŌłĆ z, z Ōłł carrier ->
                  branch z =
                    Psi (BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n z)
              branch_holo : DifferentiableOn Ōäé branch carrier
              branch_same_sourceOrientedInvariant :
                ŌłĆ z w, z Ōłł carrier -> w Ōłł carrier ->
                  BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n z =
                    BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n w ->
                  branch z = branch w
              branch_complexLorentzInvariant :
                ŌłĆ ╬ø z, z Ōłł carrier ->
                  BHW.complexLorentzAction ╬ø z Ōłł carrier ->
                    branch (BHW.complexLorentzAction ╬ø z) = branch z

            structure BHW.BHWJostOrientedTransitionData
                [NeZero d] (hd : 2 <= d)
                (n : Nat) (Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
                (U : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé))
                (Cleft Cright :
                  BHW.BHWJostLocalOrientedContinuationChart hd n Žä U)
                (p q : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) where
              sourcePatch : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé)
              sourcePatch_open : IsOpen sourcePatch
              sourcePatch_preconnected : IsPreconnected sourcePatch
              sourcePatch_nonempty : sourcePatch.Nonempty
              source_mem : p Ōłł sourcePatch
              target_mem : q Ōłł Cright.carrier
              sourcePatch_sub :
                sourcePatch ŌŖå Cleft.carrier Ōł® Cright.carrier
              source_branch_agree :
                Set.EqOn Cleft.branch Cright.branch sourcePatch
              orientedPatch : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n)
              orientedPatch_relOpen :
                BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety d n orientedPatch
              orientedPatch_preconnected : IsPreconnected orientedPatch
              orientedPatch_nonempty : orientedPatch.Nonempty
              orientedPatch_sub :
                orientedPatch ŌŖå
                  Cleft.orientedDomain Ōł® Cright.orientedDomain
              sourcePatch_oriented_mem :
                ŌłĆ y, y Ōłł sourcePatch ->
                  BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n y Ōłł
                    orientedPatch
              orientedPatch_source_realizes :
                ŌłĆ G, G Ōłł orientedPatch ->
                  Ōłā y, y Ōłł sourcePatch Ōł¦
                    BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n y = G
              oriented_psi_agree :
                Set.EqOn Cleft.Psi Cright.Psi orientedPatch
            ```

            The strict-route local producers are the oriented replacements for
            the plain-Gram one-step packet.  They have the same topology shape
            as the conditional ordinary fork, but the seed descends through
            `sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant` and `Psi`.

            ```lean
            theorem BHW.bhw_jost_initialOrientedContinuationChart_at
                [NeZero d] (hd : 2 <= d)
                (n : Nat) (Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
                (╬®0 U : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé))
                (B0 : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé)
                (h╬®0_open : IsOpen ╬®0)
                (hU_open : IsOpen U)
                (h╬®0_sub_ambient :
                  ╬®0 ŌŖå BHW.os45SourcePatchBHWJostAmbient d n Žä)
                (hB0_holo : DifferentiableOn Ōäé B0 ╬®0)
                (hB0_realLorentz :
                  ŌłĆ R : RestrictedLorentzGroup d, ŌłĆ z, z Ōłł ╬®0 ->
                    BHW.complexLorentzAction
                        (ComplexLorentzGroup.ofReal R) z Ōłł ╬®0 ->
                      B0 (BHW.complexLorentzAction
                          (ComplexLorentzGroup.ofReal R) z) = B0 z)
                {p : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé}
                (hp : p Ōłł ╬®0 Ōł® U) :
                Ōłā C : BHW.BHWJostLocalOrientedContinuationChart hd n Žä U,
                Ōłā P : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé),
                  p Ōłł P Ōł¦
                  IsOpen P Ōł¦ IsPreconnected P Ōł¦ P.Nonempty Ōł¦
                  P ŌŖå ╬®0 Ōł® C.carrier Ōł¦
                  Set.EqOn C.branch B0 P

            theorem BHW.bhw_jost_localOrientedDescent_from_chartBranch_star
                [NeZero d] (hd : 2 <= d)
                (n : Nat) (Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
                (U : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé))
                (hU_open : IsOpen U)
                (hU_sub_ambient :
                  U ŌŖå BHW.os45SourcePatchBHWJostAmbient d n Žä)
                (Cprev :
                  BHW.BHWJostLocalOrientedContinuationChart hd n Žä U)
                {p : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé}
                (hpC : p Ōłł Cprev.carrier)
                (hpU : p Ōłł U) :
                Ōłā N Ōłł ­ØōØ p, IsOpen N Ōł¦ p Ōłł N Ōł¦
                  ŌłĆ q, q Ōłł N -> q Ōłł U ->
                    Nonempty
                      (╬Ż Cnext :
                        BHW.BHWJostLocalOrientedContinuationChart hd n Žä U,
                        BHW.BHWJostOrientedTransitionData hd n Žä U
                          Cprev Cnext p q)

            structure BHW.BHWJostOrientedSourceNormalFormGeometryPatch
                [NeZero d] (hd : 2 <= d)
                (n : Nat) (Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
                (U : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé))
                (center : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) where
              carrier : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé)
              carrier_open : IsOpen carrier
              carrier_preconnected : IsPreconnected carrier
              center_mem : center Ōłł carrier
              carrier_sub_U : carrier ŌŖå U
              orientedDomain : Set (BHW.SourceOrientedGramData d n)
              oriented_relOpen :
                BHW.IsRelOpenInSourceOrientedGramVariety d n orientedDomain
              oriented_preconnected : IsPreconnected orientedDomain
              oriented_sub_variety :
                orientedDomain ŌŖå BHW.sourceOrientedGramVariety d n
              oriented_mem :
                ŌłĆ z, z Ōłł carrier ->
                  BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n z Ōłł
                    orientedDomain
              oriented_realizes :
                ŌłĆ G, G Ōłł orientedDomain ->
                  Ōłā z, z Ōłł carrier Ōł¦
                    BHW.sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n z = G

            noncomputable def BHW.bhw_jost_orientedSourceNormalFormGeometryPatch_at
                [NeZero d] (hd : 2 <= d)
                (n : Nat) (Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))

            theorem BHW.bhw_jost_uniformOrientedDescent_on_sourceNormalFormPatch
                [NeZero d] (hd : 2 <= d)

            structure BHW.BHWJostOrientedBranchFreeTransferNeighborhood
            ```

            The oriented chain and closed-loop carriers are the field-for-field
            replacements of `BHWSourcePatchContinuationChain` and
            `BHWJostClosedContinuationLoop`, with
            `BHWJostLocalOrientedContinuationChart` replacing local scalar
            charts, `BHWJostOrientedTransitionData` replacing scalar
            transitions, and `closing_orientedPatch` replacing
            `closing_gramPatch`:

            ```lean

                [NeZero d] (hd : 2 <= d)
                (n : Nat) (Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
                (╬®0 U : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé))
                (B0 : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé)
                (p0 z : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) where
              base_mem : p0 Ōłł ╬®0 Ōł® U
              m : Nat
              node : Fin (m + 1) -> Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé
              node_zero : node 0 = p0
              node_last : node (Fin.last m) = z
              chart : Fin (m + 1) -> Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé)
              node_mem : ŌłĆ j, node j Ōłł chart j
              localChart :
                Fin (m + 1) ->
                  BHW.BHWJostLocalOrientedContinuationChart hd n Žä U
              branch : Fin (m + 1) ->
                (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé

              chart_preconnected : ŌłĆ j, IsPreconnected (chart j)
              chart_sub_U : ŌłĆ j, chart j ŌŖå U
              chart_eq_local : ŌłĆ j, chart j = (localChart j).carrier
              branch_eq_local :
                ŌłĆ j y, y Ōłł chart j ->
                  branch j y = (localChart j).branch y
              branch_holo : ŌłĆ j, DifferentiableOn Ōäé (branch j) (chart j)
              start_patch : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé)
              start_patch_open : IsOpen start_patch
              start_patch_preconnected : IsPreconnected start_patch
              start_patch_nonempty : start_patch.Nonempty
              start_mem : p0 Ōłł start_patch
              start_patch_sub : start_patch ŌŖå ╬®0 Ōł® chart 0
              start_agree :
                ŌłĆ y, y Ōłł start_patch -> branch 0 y = B0 y
              transition_patch :
                ŌłĆ j : Fin m, Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé)
              transition_patch_open : ŌłĆ j, IsOpen (transition_patch j)

              oriented_transition :

                    (localChart (Fin.castSucc j)) (localChart j.succ)
                    (node (Fin.castSucc j)) (node j.succ)
              final_mem : z Ōłł chart (Fin.last m)
              chart_is_lorentz_step :
                ŌłĆ j, Ōłā ╬®base : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé),
                  IsOpen ╬®base Ōł¦
                  ╬®base ŌŖå BHW.os45SourcePatchBHWJostAmbient d n Žä Ōł¦
                  Ōłā ╬ø : ComplexLorentzGroup d,
            ```

            Superseded-signature warning for this displayed monodromy block:
            the downstream monodromy names are still intended consumers, but
            the displayed seed-producer surface
            `bhw_jost_orientedMaxRankClosedLoopSeed_of_BHW` signature is too
            weak if read as a theorem for an arbitrary closed loop.  Its
            hard-range proof must first obtain source-backed data for the loop
            produced by the strict OS I ┬¦4.5 BHW/Jost atlas.  On the
            large-start-domain route that data is
            `BHWJostOrientedClosedLoopFiniteOverlapDomainData`; on the
            preferred patch-by-patch route it is
            `BHWJostOrientedClosingPatchTerminalSeedData`.  It may not consume
            only `hU_open`, `hU_connected`, and an arbitrary
            `BHWJostOrientedClosedContinuationLoop`.  The checked
            finite-overlap and terminal-seed consumers below are the
            replacement implementation surfaces for that seed producer.

            The checked chain surface deliberately has no
            `transition_patch_eq_sourcePatch` field.  The `snoc` constructor
            stores `T.sourcePatch` as the new transition patch, but downstream
            agreement uses only `consecutive_agree`,
            `transition_patch_sub_left/right`, and `branch_eq_local`; this
            avoids dependent casts without weakening the mathematical data.
            The finite compactness part is now implemented by
            `exists_of_nodeSteps`, `ofNodeSteps`, `exists_of_subdivision`,
            `ofSubdivision`, `exists_of_transferCover`, and
            `ofTransferCover`; the remaining non-mechanical content is the
            initial local chart and the branch-free one-step
            Hall-Wightman/Jost transfer producer.

            The chart fields `oriented_realizes` and
            `orientedPatch_source_realizes` are load-bearing.  They are
            produced by the same source-normal-form patch that constructs the
            chart: after shrinking to the local image of
            `sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant`, every invariant in the stored
            oriented domain has a source representative in the stored carrier,
            and every invariant in a transition patch has a source
            representative in the stored source overlap.  Thus
            `oriented_psi_agree` is proved by choosing source representatives
            in `sourcePatch`, rewriting both branches by
            `branch_eq_orientedPullback`, using `source_branch_agree`, and
            applying the local identity theorem on the preconnected oriented
            patch.  It is not inferred from one-way source-image inclusion.

            The proof of `bhw_jost_closedChain_orientedMonodromy_trivial` is
            an arity split.  If `n < d + 1`, the oriented determinant
            coordinates are vacuous, and
            `bhw_jost_closedChain_orientedMonodromy_smallArity` transports the
            checked pure-Gram small-arity identity-principle proof across the
            oriented coordinate equivalence.  In the remaining case, first
            call one of the genuine Hall-Wightman/Jost loop inputs now
            exposed below: either the large-start-domain package
            `BHWJostOrientedClosedLoopPreconnectedFiniteOverlapDomainData L`,
            or, on the patch-by-patch route, the accumulated-germ package
            `BHWJostOrientedClosingPatchTerminalSeedData L`.  This theorem is
            the real monodromy content, but its implementation must not use a
            global source representative or the degenerate "one seed lies in
            every transition patch" telescope.  The checked
            `of_commonTransitionSeed` constructor is only a sufficient special
            case; for a moving closed chain the common transition intersection
            need not be nonempty.

            There are now two distinct Lean shapes, and they must not be
            conflated.  The checked finite-overlap trace with
            `╬” := (L.chain.localChart 0).Psi` is valid only if the source-backed
            construction really supplies a large starting oriented domain:
            every positive-length step domain and the closing domain must lie
            in `(L.chain.localChart 0).orientedDomain`.  In that case the
            producer returns
            `BHWJostOrientedClosedLoopPreconnectedFiniteOverlapDomainData L`,
            and the public source-monodromy consumer is
            `BHW.bhw_jost_closedChain_sourceMonodromy_of_preconnectedFiniteOverlapData`.
            This is a conditional consumer of explicit large-start-domain data,
            not a theorem about arbitrary closed local chart loops.

            If OS I ┬¦4.5 supplies only patch-by-patch continuation, the
            faithful target is the checked accumulated-germ package
            `BHWJostOrientedClosingPatchTerminalSeedData L`.  Its hard content
            is exactly: choose a nonempty relatively open max-rank seed
            `terminalSeed ŌŖå L.closing_orientedPatch` and prove
            `Set.EqOn (L.chain.localChart (Fin.last L.chain.m)).Psi
              (L.chain.localChart 0).Psi terminalSeed`.  The proof may carry
            the analytic continuation as a germ represented by the current
            local chart at each step; it must not require the initial `Psi` to
            be holomorphic on every intermediate step domain.

            The proof transcript for that terminal-seed package is the real
            Hall-Wightman/Jost monodromy step.  First use the source-backed
            normal-form continuation atlas to transport the branch germ along
            the finite closed path, using the stored
            `branch_same_sourceOrientedInvariant`,
            `branch_complexLorentzInvariant`, and transition source-realization
            fields to compare consecutive local representatives on actual
            source overlaps.  Next choose a closing source patch `sourceSeed`
            inside the intersection of the terminal and starting source
            carriers, then shrink its oriented image to a nonempty relatively
            open max-rank seed `terminalSeed` in `L.closing_orientedPatch`
            using the checked full-frame max-rank chart shrinker.  The exact
            Lean payload is:
            `sourceSeed_sub_initial`,
            `sourceSeed_sub_final`,
            `sourceSeed_realizes :
              ŌłĆ G Ōłł terminalSeed, Ōłā y Ōłł sourceSeed,
                sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n y = G`, and
            `hsource_eq :
              Set.EqOn
                (L.chain.localChart (Fin.last L.chain.m)).branch
                (L.chain.localChart 0).branch
                sourceSeed`.
            Then call
            `BHWJostOrientedClosingPatchTerminalSeedData.of_sourcePatch_eqOn`.
            This constructor performs the checked
            `branch_eq_orientedPullback` rewrites needed to obtain
            terminal/initial `Psi` equality.  If the closed-path equality is
            naturally proved pointwise instead of on one source patch, use
            `BHWJostOrientedClosedContinuationLoop.exists_initial_final_source_realizations_of_closing`
            (or the branch-rewrite variant) and call
            `BHWJostOrientedClosingPatchTerminalSeedData.of_sourceRealized_branch_eq`.
            If that closed-path equality is proved by producing one matching
            source pair for every invariant in the whole closing oriented
            patch, call
            `BHWJostOrientedClosingPatchTerminalSeedData.of_closingPatch_exists_sourceBranch_eq`
            instead; it chooses the max-rank seed internally.  If the proof
            gives equality for all matching representative pairs, the stronger
            `BHWJostOrientedClosingPatchTerminalSeedData.of_closingPatch_sourceBranch_eq`
            is also available.  The
            endpoint call is then either
            `BHW.bhw_jost_closedChain_sourceMonodromy_of_closingPatchTerminalSeedData`
            after constructing the package, or directly
            `BHW.bhw_jost_closedChain_sourceMonodromy_of_closingPatch_exists_sourceBranch_eq`
            from the stronger whole-closing-patch existential equality input.

            The theorem
            `bhw_jost_closedChain_orientedMaxRankMonodromy_of_seed` is the
            identity-principle propagation step, not the monodromy theorem.
            Let
            `H := (L.chain.localChart (Fin.last L.chain.m)).Psi -
              (L.chain.localChart 0).Psi` and let `S` be the seed above.
            Restrict both `Psi_holo` fields to `L.closing_orientedPatch`,
            apply `SourceOrientedVarietyGermHolomorphicOn.sub`, and call
            `sourceOrientedGramVariety_maxRank_eqOn_of_connected_fullFrame` with
            `U := L.closing_orientedPatch`, `W := S.seed`, and
            `Ureg := L.closing_orientedPatch Ōł®
              {G | SourceOrientedMaxRankAt d n G}`.  The hypotheses come from
            `L.closing_orientedPatch_relOpen`, the explicit connectedness of
            `L.closing_orientedPatch Ōł® MaxRank` supplied by the
            finite-overlap source-backed data or by
            `sourceOrientedGramVariety_maxRank_inter_relOpen_isConnected`,
            `S.seed_relOpen`,
            `S.seed_nonempty`, `S.seed_sub`, and the equality statement
            `S.seed_eq`.  The extra max-rank seed-subset hypothesis is exactly
            the second projection of `S.seed_sub`.  The public
            max-rank monodromy theorem first obtains this seed from BHW and
            then calls the propagation theorem.

            `bhw_jost_closedChain_orientedMonodromy_extend_from_maxRank` is
            then mechanical.  Let
            `H := (L.chain.localChart (Fin.last L.chain.m)).Psi -
              (L.chain.localChart 0).Psi` on `L.closing_orientedPatch`.
            Build `hH_holo` by restricting both `Psi_holo` fields to
            `L.closing_orientedPatch` and applying
            `BHW.SourceOrientedVarietyGermHolomorphicOn.sub`.  The max-rank
            theorem says `Set.EqOn H 0` on
            `L.closing_orientedPatch Ōł® {G | SourceOrientedMaxRankAt d n G}`.
            Apply the already audited continuity/density theorem
            `sourceOrientedGramVariety_relOpen_eqOn_zero_of_eqOn_maxRank`,
            equivalently the final extension step inside
            `sourceOrientedGramVariety_identity_principle`, using
            `SourceOrientedVarietyGermHolomorphicOn.continuousOn` and
            `sourceOrientedMaxRank_dense_in_relOpen_inter`.  This yields
            `H = 0` on all of `L.closing_orientedPatch`, which is exactly the
            main theorem.

            The source-level theorem
            `bhw_jost_orientedClosedChain_monodromy_trivial` is then
            mechanical.  For `y Ōłł L.closing_patch`, use
            `L.closing_patch_oriented_mem` to put
            `G := sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant d n y` in
            `L.closing_orientedPatch`.  The oriented monodromy theorem gives
            equality of the final and initial `Psi` values at `G`.  The fields
            `branch_eq_local` and each local chart's
            `branch_eq_orientedPullback` rewrite the final and initial source
            branches to those two `Psi` values.  Since
            `L.closing_patch_sub_start hy` puts `y` in `chain.start_patch`,
            `chain.start_agree y` rewrites the initial source branch to
            `B0 y`.

            The same-endpoint comparison theorem must be stated with
            source-backed continuation provenance, not as a naive reversal of
            arbitrary one-sided chain data.  The checked transition structure
            now records `target_mem_sourcePatch : q Ōłł sourcePatch`, so
            `BHWJostOrientedTransitionData.symm` is a genuine checked reverse
            of an individual overlap.  This is necessary but not sufficient
            for the terminal comparison theorem: after following `CŌéü` to the
            common endpoint `z`, there is still no free transition from the
            terminal chart of `CŌéü` to the terminal chart of `CŌéé`, since that
            is exactly the equality being proved.

            The Lean-ready surface is therefore a provenance theorem, not an
            arbitrary chain theorem:

            ```lean
            structure BHW.BHWJostOrientedBranchFreeTransferControl
                [NeZero d] (hd : 2 Ōēż d)
                (n : Nat) (Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
                (U : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé)) where
              N : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé)
              N_open : IsOpen N
              transferChart :
                ŌłĆ p q, p Ōłł N -> p Ōłł U -> q Ōłł N -> q Ōłł U ->
                ŌłĆ Cprev : BHWJostLocalOrientedContinuationChart hd n Žä U,
                  p Ōłł Cprev.carrier ->
                    BHWJostLocalOrientedContinuationChart hd n Žä U
              transferTransition :
                ŌłĆ p q (hpN : p Ōłł N) (hpU : p Ōłł U)
                  (hqN : q Ōłł N) (hqU : q Ōłł U)
                  (Cprev : BHWJostLocalOrientedContinuationChart hd n Žä U)
                  (hpC : p Ōłł Cprev.carrier),
                    BHWJostOrientedTransitionData hd n Žä U Cprev
                      (transferChart p q hpN hpU hqN hqU Cprev hpC) p q

            structure BHW.BHWJostOrientedTransferContinuationTrace
                [NeZero d] (hd : 2 Ōēż d)
                (n : Nat) (Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
                (╬®0 U : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé))
                (B0 : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé)
                (p0 z : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) where
              chain :
                BHWJostOrientedSourcePatchContinuationChain
                  hd n Žä ╬®0 U B0 p0 z
              stepControl :
                (j : Fin chain.m) ->
                  BHWJostOrientedBranchFreeTransferControl hd n Žä U
              step_left_mem :
                ŌłĆ j, chain.node (Fin.castSucc j) Ōłł (stepControl j).N
              step_right_mem :
                ŌłĆ j, chain.node j.succ Ōłł (stepControl j).N
              step_transfer_chart_eq :
                ŌłĆ j,
                  (stepControl j).transferChart
                    (chain.node (Fin.castSucc j)) (chain.node j.succ)
                    (step_left_mem j)
                    (chain.chart_sub_U (Fin.castSucc j)
                      (chain.node_mem (Fin.castSucc j)))
                    (step_right_mem j)
                    (chain.chart_sub_U j.succ (chain.node_mem j.succ))
                    (chain.localChart (Fin.castSucc j))
                    (by
                      simpa [chain.chart_eq_local (Fin.castSucc j)]
                        using chain.node_mem (Fin.castSucc j)) =
                    chain.localChart j.succ
            ```

            For atlas overlaps we usually observe a trace at a point in its
            terminal chart rather than at the endpoint originally used to
            build the trace.  The checked carrier is:

            ```lean
            structure BHW.BHWJostOrientedTransferTerminalPointTrace
                [NeZero d] (hd : 2 Ōēż d)
                (n : Nat) (Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
                (╬®0 U : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé))
                (B0 : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé)
                (p0 y : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) where
              endpoint : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé
              trace :
                BHWJostOrientedTransferContinuationTrace
                  hd n Žä ╬®0 U B0 p0 endpoint
              point_mem : y Ōłł trace.chain.chart (Fin.last trace.chain.m)
            ```

            The zero-step and observation constructors are now checked:

            ```lean
            def BHW.BHWJostOrientedTransferContinuationTrace.base
                (C0 : BHWJostLocalOrientedContinuationChart hd n Žä U)
                (hbase : p0 Ōłł ╬®0 Ōł® U)
                (hp0C : p0 Ōłł C0.carrier)
                (start_patch : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé))
                (hstart_open : IsOpen start_patch)
                (hstart_preconnected : IsPreconnected start_patch)
                (hstart_nonempty : start_patch.Nonempty)
                (hstart_mem : p0 Ōłł start_patch)
                (hstart_sub : start_patch ŌŖå ╬®0 Ōł® C0.carrier)
                (hstart_agree :
                  ŌłĆ y, y Ōłł start_patch -> C0.branch y = B0 y) :
                BHWJostOrientedTransferContinuationTrace
                  hd n Žä ╬®0 U B0 p0 p0

            def BHW.BHWJostOrientedTransferTerminalPointTrace.ofTracePoint
                (T :
                  BHWJostOrientedTransferContinuationTrace
                    hd n Žä ╬®0 U B0 p0 endpoint)
                (hy : y Ōłł T.chain.chart (Fin.last T.chain.m)) :
                BHWJostOrientedTransferTerminalPointTrace
                  hd n Žä ╬®0 U B0 p0 y

            def BHW.BHWJostOrientedTransferTerminalPointTrace.atEndpoint
                (T :
                  BHWJostOrientedTransferContinuationTrace
                    hd n Žä ╬®0 U B0 p0 endpoint) :
                BHWJostOrientedTransferTerminalPointTrace
                  hd n Žä ╬®0 U B0 p0 endpoint
            ```

            `base` is the zero-step chain with all transfer-provenance fields
            over `Fin 0`.  The compact-cover subdivision still chooses
            centered `BHWJostOrientedBranchFreeTransferNeighborhood`s, but
            after the interval has selected an actual transfer set the trace
            stores the center-forgotten
            `BHWJostOrientedBranchFreeTransferControl`.  This keeps exactly
            the endpoint-membership and produced-next-chart provenance used
            by the trace induction.  The checked helper
            `BHWJostOrientedBranchFreeTransferNeighborhood.toTransferControl`
            performs the forgetting, and the checked constructor
            `BHWJostOrientedTransferContinuationTrace.snocAtTerminalNode`
            appends one such transfer-control step to an existing trace.
            `ofTracePoint` observes a trace at any terminal chart point;
            `atEndpoint` observes it at `T.chain.final_mem`.

            The local output used by the trace induction is the chart-level
            analogue of terminal chain comparison:

            ```lean
            structure BHW.BHWLocalChartTerminalComparisonData
                [NeZero d] {hd : 2 Ōēż d} {Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)}
                {U : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé)}
                (Cleft Cright :
                  BHWJostLocalOrientedContinuationChart hd n Žä U)
                (q : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) where
              terminalPatch : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé)
              endpoint_mem : q Ōłł terminalPatch
              terminalPatch_open : IsOpen terminalPatch
              terminalPatch_preconnected : IsPreconnected terminalPatch
              terminalPatch_sub_left : terminalPatch ŌŖå Cleft.carrier
              terminalPatch_sub_right : terminalPatch ŌŖå Cright.carrier
              terminal_branches_eq :
                Set.EqOn Cleft.branch Cright.branch terminalPatch
            ```

            The equality step required by this trace is the real one-step
            Hall-Wightman/Jost uniqueness datum for the stored
            center-forgotten transfer control.  The checked Lean interface is
            the type-valued control property

            ```lean
            def BHW.BHWJostOrientedTransferControlHasUniqueNext
                (K : BHWJostOrientedBranchFreeTransferControl hd n Žä U) :
                Type _ :=
              ŌłĆ {p q : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé}
                (hpN : p Ōłł K.N) (hpU : p Ōłł U)
                (hqN : q Ōłł K.N) (hqU : q Ōłł U)
                {CprevA CprevB :
                  BHWJostLocalOrientedContinuationChart hd n Žä U}
                (hpA : p Ōłł CprevA.carrier)
                (hpB : p Ōłł CprevB.carrier)
                (sourceSeed : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé))
                (hsourceSeed_mem : p Ōłł sourceSeed)
                (hsourceSeed_sub :
                  sourceSeed ŌŖå CprevA.carrier Ōł® CprevB.carrier)
                (hsourceSeed_eq :
                  Set.EqOn CprevA.branch CprevB.branch sourceSeed),
                BHWLocalChartTerminalComparisonData
                  (K.transferChart p q hpN hpU hqN hqU CprevA hpA)
                  (K.transferChart p q hpN hpU hqN hqU CprevB hpB) q
            ```

            The future local theorem must prove this property for controls
            produced by source-normal-form Hall-Wightman descent:

            ```lean
            theorem BHW.bhw_jost_orientedTransfer_unique_next
                (K : BHWJostOrientedBranchFreeTransferControl hd n Žä U)
                (hK : BHWJostOrientedTransferControlHasUniqueNext K)
                {p q : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé}
                (hpN : p Ōłł K.N) (hpU : p Ōłł U)
                (hqN : q Ōłł K.N) (hqU : q Ōłł U)
                {CprevA CprevB :
                  BHWJostLocalOrientedContinuationChart hd n Žä U}
                (hpA : p Ōłł CprevA.carrier) (hpB : p Ōłł CprevB.carrier)
                (sourceSeed : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé))
                (hsourceSeed_mem : p Ōłł sourceSeed)
                (hsourceSeed_sub :
                  sourceSeed ŌŖå CprevA.carrier Ōł® CprevB.carrier)
                (hsourceSeed_eq :
                  Set.EqOn CprevA.branch CprevB.branch sourceSeed) :
                BHWLocalChartTerminalComparisonData
                  (K.transferChart p q hpN hpU hqN hqU CprevA hpA)
                  (K.transferChart p q hpN hpU hqN hqU CprevB hpB) q
            ```

            Its proof is not a wrapper: it is exactly the local
            Hall-Wightman descent with the previous chart's branch as the seed
            branch.  It uses `branch_same_sourceOrientedInvariant`,
            `branch_complexLorentzInvariant`, and the normal-form
            source-realization fields to show that two descents from equal
            previous germs give equal next germs on a target source patch
            around `q`.

            The trace-level certified-step interface is checked as
            `BHWJostOrientedTransferContinuationTrace.HasUniqueSteps Tr`, with
            the zero-step case
            `BHWJostOrientedTransferContinuationTrace.hasUniqueSteps_base`.
            The checked bundled carriers
            `BHWJostOrientedCertifiedTransferContinuationTrace` and
            `BHWJostOrientedCertifiedTransferTerminalPointTrace` keep the raw
            trace plus step-uniqueness certificate, and expose `base`,
            `ofTracePoint`, `atEndpoint`, and forgetful maps back to the raw
            terminal-point trace API.  From this one-step uniqueness theorem,
            prove a finite induction
            `bhw_jost_orientedTransferTrace_terminalComparison_of_sameTrace`:
            two certified traces with the same finite nodes and same
            controlling branch-free neighborhoods, and with equal starting
            germs on an initial source patch, have terminal comparison data at
            the final node.  The induction state is a source patch around
            `chain.node i` contained in both current local-chart carriers,
            with equality of the current branches there; the successor case is
            exactly `bhw_jost_orientedTransfer_unique_next` applied to the
            stored `stepUnique j`.

            Finally the closed-path theorem for two terminal-point traces is:

            ```lean
            theorem BHW.bhw_jost_orientedTerminalPointComparison_of_transferTraces
                (TŌéü TŌéé :
                  BHWJostOrientedCertifiedTransferTerminalPointTrace
                    hd n Žä ╬®0 U B0 p0 y) :
                BHWLocalChartTerminalComparisonData
                  (TŌéü.trace.trace.chain.localChart
                    (Fin.last TŌéü.trace.trace.chain.m))
                  (TŌéé.trace.trace.chain.localChart
                    (Fin.last TŌéé.trace.trace.chain.m)) y
            ```

            The hard proof forms the source closed path obtained by following
            `TŌéü.trace.trace` and then the reversed source nodes of
            `TŌéé.trace.trace`, uses the branch-free transfer controls to
            continue the observed `TŌéü` terminal germ back to a closing patch
            at `p0`, constructs
            `BHWJostOrientedClosingPatchTerminalSeedData` for that closed
            loop by the strict OS I ┬¦4.5 BHW/Jost source-patch argument, and
            invokes
            `bhw_jost_closedChain_sourceMonodromy_of_closingPatchTerminalSeedData`.
            The resulting equality with `B0` on the closing patch, together
            with equality of the initial chart of the underlying raw trace
            `TŌéé.trace.trace` with `B0`, is transported forward along the
            certified stored trace of `TŌéé` by
            the finite uniqueness induction, yielding a terminal patch inside the two
            observed terminal charts at `y`.  For the special case `y = z`
            with `point_mem := chain.final_mem`, this chart-level comparison
            packages into
            `BHWOrientedTerminalChainComparisonData
            TŌéü.trace.trace.chain TŌéé.trace.trace.chain`;
            its checked method `continuedValue_eq` is only the endpoint
            evaluation.

            The checked assembly target for the atlas-from-chains step is
            `BHWOrientedContinuationChainAtlasData`.  The checked constructor
            `BHWOrientedContinuationChainAtlasData.ofSameEndpointComparisons`
            remains a useful high-level consumer if one has a theorem
            comparing arbitrary chain records, but the strict source-backed
            route must not try to manufacture such a theorem from the current
            data.  The final strict-route producer should instead use the
            checked certified trace-level variant
            `BHWOrientedContinuationTraceAtlasData.ofCertifiedTerminalPointComparisonsAndInitialChart`
            whose comparison hypothesis ranges over certified terminal-point
            traces for the certified selected transfer traces.  After the trace comparison produces
            terminal branch equality at an overlap point, the atlas forgets
            the trace provenance and stores only the underlying terminal chain
            chart.  The selected-chain field is now
            checked from path-connectedness by
            `BHW.bhw_jost_orientedContinuationChainAt_of_pathConnected_transferCover`:
            use `IsPathConnected.joinedIn p0 hbase.2 z hz`, take
            `JoinedIn.somePath`, and call the compact transfer-cover fold
            along that path.  The selected raw trace field is checked in the same
            way by
            `BHW.bhw_jost_orientedTransferContinuationTraceAt_of_pathConnected_transferCover`:
            the compact subdivision supplies centered transfer neighborhoods
            for adjacent path nodes, and each stored trace step keeps the
            center-forgotten transfer control actually used by the transfer
            call.  The selected certified trace field is now checked by
            `BHW.bhw_jost_orientedCertifiedTransferContinuationTraceAt_of_pathConnected_transferCover`:
            it runs the same compact-cover fold and stores `HasUniqueSteps` for
            every chosen center-forgotten transfer control.  The trace-level constructor derives the atlas
            `terminal_overlap_eq` field directly: for `y` in the intersection
            of the terminal charts of chains ending at `a` and `b`, build
            terminal-point traces from the selected traces for `a` and `b`
            using the two membership proofs, invoke
            `bhw_jost_orientedTerminalPointComparison_of_transferTraces`, and
            evaluate the resulting chart-level branch equality at `y`.

            The checked trace-atlas surface is:

            ```lean
            structure BHW.BHWOrientedContinuationTraceAtlasData
                [NeZero d] (hd : 2 Ōēż d)
                (n : Nat) (Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
                (╬®0 U : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé))
                (B0 : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé) where
              p0 : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé
              base_mem : p0 Ōłł ╬®0 Ōł® U
              traceAt :
                ŌłĆ z, z Ōłł U ->
                  BHWJostOrientedTransferContinuationTrace
                    hd n Žä ╬®0 U B0 p0 z
              terminal_overlap_comparison :
                ŌłĆ (a b : {z // z Ōłł U})
                  {y : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé},
                  y Ōłł (traceAt a.1 a.2).chain.chart
                    (Fin.last (traceAt a.1 a.2).chain.m) ->
                  y Ōłł (traceAt b.1 b.2).chain.chart
                    (Fin.last (traceAt b.1 b.2).chain.m) ->
                  BHWLocalChartTerminalComparisonData
                    ((traceAt a.1 a.2).chain.localChart
                      (Fin.last (traceAt a.1 a.2).chain.m))
                    ((traceAt b.1 b.2).chain.localChart
                      (Fin.last (traceAt b.1 b.2).chain.m)) y
              terminal_base_agree :
                ŌłĆ z (hz : z Ōłł ╬®0 Ōł® U),
                  ((traceAt z hz.2).chain.branch
                    (Fin.last (traceAt z hz.2).chain.m)) z = B0 z
            ```

            `BHWOrientedContinuationTraceAtlasData.to_chainAtlasData`
            proves ordinary atlas overlap by applying the selected-trace
            field `terminal_overlap_comparison a b hya hyb` at the common
            overlap point, evaluating the returned
            `BHWLocalChartTerminalComparisonData` at that same point, and
            rewriting both chain branches by `branch_eq_local`.  The minimal
            constructor
            `BHWOrientedContinuationTraceAtlasData.ofSelectedComparisonsAndInitialChart`
            takes only selected terminal-overlap comparison and selected
            base-chart comparison.  The certified checked constructor
            `BHWOrientedContinuationTraceAtlasData.ofCertifiedTerminalPointComparisonsAndInitialChart`
            forgets certified selected traces to raw traces for storage,
            derives selected overlap from certified terminal-point observations,
            and proves base agreement by comparing each selected trace with the
            certified zero-step base trace.  The older raw constructor still
            derives those selected fields from an arbitrary unbundled
            terminal-point trace comparison when such a theorem is available.

            The monodromy-facing retargeted bridge is now checked.  For two
            certified terminal-point observations `TŌéü TŌéé` at the same source
            point `y`, first retarget the underlying chains by
            `TßĄó.trace.trace.chain.retargetTerminal TßĄó.point_mem`.  If the
            closed-path theorem returns
            `BHWOrientedTerminalChainComparisonData` for these two
            same-endpoint chains, then
            `BHWOrientedTerminalChainComparisonData
              .ofCertifiedRetargetedTerminalPointTraceComparison`
            rewrites the final chart and branch of each retargeted chain by
            `retargetTerminal` and `snoc` and returns the exact
            `BHWLocalChartTerminalComparisonData` between the original
            terminal local charts.  The raw analogue
            `.ofRetargetedTerminalPointTraceComparison` has the same proof
            without certified step data.

            Hence the checked atlas assembly now has exactly two
            non-mechanical inputs left: a source-normal-form/uniform-descent
            producer of branch-free transfer neighborhoods on `U` whose stored
            controls carry `HasUniqueSteps`, and the hard certified
            retargeted-chain comparison theorem for two certified
            terminal-point observations.  The local
            `bhw_jost_orientedTerminalPointComparison_of_transferTraces`
            theorem is now a derived chart-packaging theorem: after closed
            monodromy supplies same-endpoint comparison of the two retargeted
            chains, the bridge above supplies the local chart comparison.  The
            finite one-step propagation constructor
            `BHW.bhw_jost_orientedTerminalComparison_of_sharedTransferSkeleton`
            is also checked: for two chart sequences built over the same
            finite node list and the same transfer controls, it propagates
            initial source-seed equality step by step by applying
            `BHWJostOrientedTransferControlHasUniqueNext` and rewriting by the
            stored chart-production equations.  Thus the repeated finite
            uniqueness part is no longer a prose gap; the remaining hard work
            is to obtain the closed-return seed or same-endpoint retargeted
            comparison from the BHW/Jost monodromy construction.  The
            closed-loop packaging bridge
            `BHWJostOrientedClosedContinuationLoop.terminalChainComparison_base_of_closingPatchTerminalSeedData`
            is checked as well: once the closing-patch terminal seed gives
            source monodromy, it packages terminal comparison between the
            closed-loop chain and the normalized zero-step base chain built
            from the initial chart.  The checked theorem
            `BHW.bhw_jost_orientedGluedBranch_of_certifiedTraces` composes
            certified selected traces, certified terminal-point comparison,
            and the initial chart to produce the glued holomorphic
            source-patch branch on `U`.  The checked path-connected theorem
            `BHW.bhw_jost_orientedGluedBranch_of_pathConnected_certifiedTransferCover`
            first selects the certified traces from a path-connected
            uniqueness-certified transfer cover and then applies that certified
            glue theorem.  The checked source-normal-form theorem
            `BHW.bhw_jost_orientedGluedBranch_of_pathConnected_sourceNormalFormProducer`
            specializes this to source-normal-form patches plus uniform
            descent, leaving one-step uniqueness for the produced controls and
            certified terminal comparison as the two hard analytic inputs.  The
            preferred strict-route endpoint is now
            `BHW.bhw_jost_orientedGluedBranch_of_pathConnected_sourceNormalFormProducer_retargetedComparisons`:
            its comparison hypothesis is already the same-endpoint comparison
            of the terminal-retargeted certified chains, matching the natural
            output of the closed-path Hall-Wightman/Jost monodromy proof.  The raw
            `BHW.bhw_jost_orientedGluedBranch_of_pathConnected_transferCover`
            remains a convenience surface after the certified theorem is
            available.

            The variant
            `BHWOrientedContinuationChainAtlasData.ofSameEndpointComparisonsAndBaseChain`
            also derives base agreement from the same comparison theorem:
            provide one normalized base chain whose terminal chart covers
            `╬®0 Ōł® U` and whose terminal branch equals `B0` there; for
            `z Ōłł ╬®0 Ōł® U`, retarget that base chain to endpoint `z`, compare it
            with the selected chain ending at `z`, and rewrite by
            `BHWOrientedContinuationChainAtlasData.terminal_base_agree_of_sameEndpointComparison`.
            The further specialization
            `BHWOrientedContinuationChainAtlasData.ofSameEndpointComparisonsAndInitialChart`
            constructs the normalized base chain as the zero-step chain from
            the initial chart, so the final atlas assembly can consume the
            direct initial-chart facts `╬®0 Ōł® U ŌŖå C0.carrier` and
            `ŌłĆ z Ōłł ╬®0 Ōł® U, C0.branch z = B0 z`.
            Its method `to_sourcePatchContinuationAtlas` builds the atlas
            whose charts are the terminal source charts and whose branches are
            the stored terminal branches; its method `exists_glued_branch`
            then calls the checked `bhw_glue_sourcePatchContinuationAtlas`.

            The plain rank-exact Gram monodromy theorem below remains only the
            conditional ordinary fork.  It is not the active strict OS II /
            OS I ┬¦4.5 Lean target.  The production route uses the checked
            oriented replacements
            `BHWJostLocalOrientedContinuationChart`,
            `BHWJostOrientedTransitionData`,
            `BHWJostOrientedBranchFreeTransferNeighborhood`,
            `BHWJostOrientedSourcePatchContinuationChain`,
            `BHWJostOrientedClosedContinuationLoop`, and the terminal-seed
            endpoints in `SourceOrientedBHWFiniteOverlap.lean`.  Therefore
            the scalar `bhw_jost_localContinuationStep` block below is
            documentation for the archived ordinary fork, not permission to
            start new scalar production Lean on the active route.

            ```lean
            structure BHW.BHWJostLocalScalarContinuationChart
                [NeZero d] (hd : 2 <= d)
                (n : Nat) (Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
                (U : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé)) where
              carrier : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé)
              carrier_open : IsOpen carrier
              carrier_preconnected : IsPreconnected carrier
              carrier_sub_U : carrier ŌŖå U
              gramDomain : Set (Fin n -> Fin n -> Ōäé)
              gram_relOpen :
                IsRelOpenInSourceComplexGramVariety d n gramDomain
              gram_preconnected : IsPreconnected gramDomain
              gram_sub_variety :
                gramDomain ŌŖå sourceComplexGramVariety d n
              gram_mem :
                ŌłĆ z, z Ōłł carrier ->
                  BHW.sourceMinkowskiGram d n z Ōłł gramDomain
              Phi : (Fin n -> Fin n -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé
              Phi_holo :
                SourceVarietyGermHolomorphicOn d n Phi gramDomain
              branch : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé
              branch_eq_pullback :
                ŌłĆ z, z Ōłł carrier ->
                  branch z = Phi (BHW.sourceMinkowskiGram d n z)
              branch_holo : DifferentiableOn Ōäé branch carrier
              branch_same_sourceGram :
                ŌłĆ z w, z Ōłł carrier -> w Ōłł carrier ->
                  BHW.sourceMinkowskiGram d n z =
                    BHW.sourceMinkowskiGram d n w ->
                  branch z = branch w
              branch_complexLorentzInvariant :
                ŌłĆ ╬ø z, z Ōłł carrier ->
                  BHW.complexLorentzAction ╬ø z Ōłł carrier ->
                    branch (BHW.complexLorentzAction ╬ø z) = branch z

            theorem BHW.bhw_jost_initialScalarContinuationChart_at
                [NeZero d] (hd : 2 <= d)
                (n : Nat) (Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
                (╬®0 U : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé))
                (B0 : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé)
                (h╬®0_open : IsOpen ╬®0)
                (hU_open : IsOpen U)
                (h╬®0_sub_ambient :
                  ╬®0 ŌŖå BHW.os45SourcePatchBHWJostAmbient d n Žä)
                (hB0_holo : DifferentiableOn Ōäé B0 ╬®0)
                (hB0_realLorentz :
                  ŌłĆ R : RestrictedLorentzGroup d, ŌłĆ z, z Ōłł ╬®0 ->
                    BHW.complexLorentzAction
                        (ComplexLorentzGroup.ofReal R) z Ōłł ╬®0 ->
                      B0 (BHW.complexLorentzAction
                          (ComplexLorentzGroup.ofReal R) z) = B0 z)
                {p : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé}
                (hp : p Ōłł ╬®0 Ōł® U) :
                Ōłā C : BHW.BHWJostLocalScalarContinuationChart hd n Žä U,
                Ōłā P : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé),
                  p Ōłł P Ōł¦
                  IsOpen P Ōł¦ IsPreconnected P Ōł¦ P.Nonempty Ōł¦
                  P ŌŖå ╬®0 Ōł® C.carrier Ōł¦
                  Set.EqOn C.branch B0 P

            theorem BHW.bhw_jost_localContinuationStep
                [NeZero d] (hd : 2 <= d)
                (n : Nat) (Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
                (U : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé))
                (hU_open : IsOpen U)
                (hU_sub_ambient :
                  U ŌŖå BHW.os45SourcePatchBHWJostAmbient d n Žä)
                (Cprev : BHW.BHWJostLocalScalarContinuationChart hd n Žä U)
                {p : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé}
                (hpC : p Ōłł Cprev.carrier) :
                Ōłā N Ōłł ­ØōØ p, ŌłĆ q, q Ōłł N -> q Ōłł U ->
                  Ōłā Cnext :
                    BHW.BHWJostLocalScalarContinuationChart hd n Žä U,
                  Ōłā P : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé),
                    p Ōłł P Ōł¦ q Ōłł Cnext.carrier Ōł¦
                    IsOpen P Ōł¦ IsPreconnected P Ōł¦ P.Nonempty Ōł¦
                    P ŌŖå Cprev.carrier Ōł® Cnext.carrier Ōł¦
                    Set.EqOn Cprev.branch Cnext.branch P

            theorem BHW.bhw_jost_localDescent_from_chartBranch_star
                [NeZero d] (hd : 2 <= d)
                (n : Nat) (Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
                (U : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé))
                (hU_open : IsOpen U)
                (hU_sub_ambient :
                  U ŌŖå BHW.os45SourcePatchBHWJostAmbient d n Žä)
                (Cprev :
                  BHW.BHWJostLocalScalarContinuationChart hd n Žä U)
                {p : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé}
                (hpC : p Ōłł Cprev.carrier)
                (hpU : p Ōłł U) :
                Ōłā N Ōłł ­ØōØ p, IsOpen N Ōł¦ p Ōłł N Ōł¦
                  ŌłĆ q, q Ōłł N -> q Ōłł U ->
                    Ōłā Cnext :
                      BHW.BHWJostLocalScalarContinuationChart hd n Žä U,
                    Ōłā P : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé),
                      p Ōłł P Ōł¦ q Ōłł Cnext.carrier Ōł¦
                      IsOpen P Ōł¦ IsPreconnected P Ōł¦ P.Nonempty Ōł¦
                      P ŌŖå Cprev.carrier Ōł® Cnext.carrier Ōł¦
                      Set.EqOn Cprev.branch Cnext.branch P

            structure BHW.BHWJostScalarTransitionData
                [NeZero d] (hd : 2 <= d)
                (n : Nat) (Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
                (U : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé))
                (Cleft Cright :
                  BHW.BHWJostLocalScalarContinuationChart hd n Žä U)
                (p q : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) where
              sourcePatch : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé)
              sourcePatch_open : IsOpen sourcePatch
              sourcePatch_preconnected : IsPreconnected sourcePatch
              sourcePatch_nonempty : sourcePatch.Nonempty
              source_mem : p Ōłł sourcePatch
              target_mem : q Ōłł Cright.carrier
              sourcePatch_sub :
                sourcePatch ŌŖå Cleft.carrier Ōł® Cright.carrier
              source_branch_agree :
                Set.EqOn Cleft.branch Cright.branch sourcePatch
              gramPatch : Set (Fin n -> Fin n -> Ōäé)
              gramPatch_relOpen :
                IsRelOpenInSourceComplexGramVariety d n gramPatch
              gramPatch_preconnected : IsPreconnected gramPatch
              gramPatch_nonempty : gramPatch.Nonempty
              gramPatch_sub :
                gramPatch ŌŖå Cleft.gramDomain Ōł® Cright.gramDomain
              sourcePatch_gram_mem :
                ŌłĆ y, y Ōłł sourcePatch ->
                  BHW.sourceMinkowskiGram d n y Ōłł gramPatch
              gram_phi_agree :
                Set.EqOn Cleft.Phi Cright.Phi gramPatch

            structure BHW.BHWJostSourceNormalFormGeometryPatch
                [NeZero d] (hd : 2 <= d)
                (n : Nat) (Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
                (U : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé))
                (center : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) where
              carrier : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé)
              carrier_open : IsOpen carrier
              carrier_preconnected : IsPreconnected carrier
              center_mem : center Ōłł carrier
              carrier_sub_U : carrier ŌŖå U
              gramDomain : Set (Fin n -> Fin n -> Ōäé)
              gram_relOpen :
                IsRelOpenInSourceComplexGramVariety d n gramDomain
              gram_preconnected : IsPreconnected gramDomain
              gram_sub_variety :
                gramDomain ŌŖå sourceComplexGramVariety d n
              gram_mem :
                ŌłĆ z, z Ōłł carrier ->
                  BHW.sourceMinkowskiGram d n z Ōłł gramDomain

            theorem BHW.bhw_jost_sourceNormalFormGeometryPatch_at
                [NeZero d] (hd : 2 <= d)
                (n : Nat) (Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
                (U : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé))
                (hU_open : IsOpen U)
                (hU_sub_ambient :
                  U ŌŖå BHW.os45SourcePatchBHWJostAmbient d n Žä)
                {center : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé}
                (hcenter : center Ōłł U) :
                BHW.BHWJostSourceNormalFormGeometryPatch hd n Žä U center

            theorem BHW.bhw_jost_uniformDescent_on_sourceNormalFormPatch
                [NeZero d] (hd : 2 <= d)
                (n : Nat) (Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
                (U : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé))
                {center : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé}
                (G : BHW.BHWJostSourceNormalFormGeometryPatch hd n Žä U center)
                (Cprev :
                  BHW.BHWJostLocalScalarContinuationChart hd n Žä U)
                {p q : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé}
                (hpG : p Ōłł G.carrier)
                (hqG : q Ōłł G.carrier)
                (hpC : p Ōłł Cprev.carrier) :
                Ōłā Cnext :
                  BHW.BHWJostLocalScalarContinuationChart hd n Žä U,
                  BHW.BHWJostScalarTransitionData hd n Žä U
                    Cprev Cnext p q

            structure BHW.BHWJostBranchFreeTransferNeighborhood
                [NeZero d] (hd : 2 <= d)
                (n : Nat) (Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
                (U : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé))
                (center : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) where
              N : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé)
              N_mem_nhds : N Ōłł ­ØōØ center
              N_open : IsOpen N
              center_mem : center Ōłł N
              transfer :
                ŌłĆ p q, p Ōłł N -> p Ōłł U -> q Ōłł N -> q Ōłł U ->
                ŌłĆ Cprev :
                    BHW.BHWJostLocalScalarContinuationChart hd n Žä U,
                  p Ōłł Cprev.carrier ->
                    Ōłā Cnext :
                      BHW.BHWJostLocalScalarContinuationChart hd n Žä U,
                      BHW.BHWJostScalarTransitionData hd n Žä U
                        Cprev Cnext p q

            theorem BHW.bhw_jost_branchFreeTransferNeighborhood_at
                [NeZero d] (hd : 2 <= d)
                (n : Nat) (Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
                (U : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé))
                (hU_open : IsOpen U)
                (hU_sub_ambient :
                  U ŌŖå BHW.os45SourcePatchBHWJostAmbient d n Žä)
                {p : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé}
                (hpU : p Ōłł U) :
                BHW.BHWJostBranchFreeTransferNeighborhood hd n Žä U p

            structure BHW.UnitIntervalOrderedSubdivision
                {╬╣ : Type} (c : ╬╣ -> Set unitInterval) where
              m : Nat
              t : Fin (m + 1) -> unitInterval
              t_zero : t 0 = 0
              t_last : t (Fin.last m) = 1
              t_mono : Monotone t
              interval_sub :
                ŌłĆ j : Fin m, Ōłā a : ╬╣,
                  Set.Icc (t (Fin.castSucc j)) (t j.succ) ŌŖå c a

            theorem BHW.exists_unitInterval_orderedSubdivision_of_openCover
                {╬╣ : Type} (c : ╬╣ -> Set unitInterval)
                (hc_open : ŌłĆ a, IsOpen (c a))
                (hc_cover : Set.univ ŌŖå Ōŗā a, c a) :
                Nonempty (BHW.UnitIntervalOrderedSubdivision c)

            noncomputable def BHW.unitInterval_orderedSubdivision_of_openCover
                {╬╣ : Type} (c : ╬╣ -> Set unitInterval)
                (hc_open : ŌłĆ a, IsOpen (c a))
                (hc_cover : Set.univ ŌŖå Ōŗā a, c a) :
                BHW.UnitIntervalOrderedSubdivision c

            theorem BHW.exists_open_preconnected_neighborhood_subset
                {E : Type} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace ŌäØ E]
                {s : Set E} {p : E}
                (hs : IsOpen s) (hp : p Ōłł s) :
                Ōłā P : Set E,
                  p Ōłł P Ōł¦ IsOpen P Ōł¦ IsPreconnected P Ōł¦
                  P.Nonempty Ōł¦ P ŌŖå s

            theorem BHW.bhw_jost_continuationChain_of_compactPath
                [NeZero d] (hd : 2 <= d)
                (n : Nat) (Žä : Equiv.Perm (Fin n))
                (╬®0 U : Set (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé))
                (B0 : (Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé) -> Ōäé)
                (h╬®0_open : IsOpen ╬®0)
                (hU_open : IsOpen U)
                (h╬®0_sub_ambient :
                  ╬®0 ŌŖå BHW.os45SourcePatchBHWJostAmbient d n Žä)
                (hU_sub_ambient :
                  U ŌŖå BHW.os45SourcePatchBHWJostAmbient d n Žä)
                (hB0_holo : DifferentiableOn Ōäé B0 ╬®0)
                (hB0_realLorentz :
                  ŌłĆ R : RestrictedLorentzGroup d, ŌłĆ z, z Ōłł ╬®0 ->
                    BHW.complexLorentzAction
                        (ComplexLorentzGroup.ofReal R) z Ōłł ╬®0 ->
                      B0 (BHW.complexLorentzAction
                          (ComplexLorentzGroup.ofReal R) z) = B0 z)
                {p z : Fin n -> Fin (d + 1) -> Ōäé}
                (hp0 : p Ōłł ╬®0 Ōł® U)
                (╬│ : Path p z)
                (h╬│U : ŌłĆ t, ╬│ t Ōłł U) :
                BHW.BHWSourcePatchContinuationChain hd n Žä ╬®0 U B0 p z
            ```

            The strict-route proof of
            `bhw_jost_initialOrientedContinuationChart_at` is the local
            Hall-Wightman/Jost descent theorem on the starting sector `╬®0`.
            The near-identity proper-complex Lorentz theorem gives local
            constancy of `B0` along determinant-one complex Lorentz fibres.
            The oriented normal-form source theorem then identifies those
            fibres, in max rank, with fibres of
            `sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant`; in lower rank it uses the
            documented Hall-Wightman singular contraction and continuity
            package.  Holomorphic descent gives a germ-holomorphic `Psi` on a
            preconnected oriented patch.  Define
            `C.branch := Psi Ōłś sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant`; then
            `branch_eq_orientedPullback` is definitional on the shrunk
            carrier, `branch_same_sourceOrientedInvariant` follows from the
            pullback formula, and `branch_complexLorentzInvariant` is
            `sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant_complexLorentzAction` followed
            by the pullback rewrite.  The returned source patch `P` is a
            preconnected shrink of `╬®0 Ōł® C.carrier` around `p`, so
            `Set.EqOn C.branch B0 P` is the local descent normalization, not
            a global source-representative import.

            The strict-route one-step theorem propagates from an already
            constructed oriented chart by calling
            `bhw_jost_localOrientedDescent_from_chartBranch_star`.  That
            theorem produces an open star neighborhood `N Ōłł ­ØōØ p`, chosen
            before the endpoint `q` is fixed and small enough that the
            Hall-Wightman oriented source-normal-form chart at `p` and the
            chart at every `q Ōłł N Ōł® U` have a nonempty preconnected oriented
            overlap.  On that overlap the seed is exactly `Cprev.branch`, not
            `B0`.  Rewrite `Cprev.branch` as
            `Cprev.Psi Ōłś sourceOrientedMinkowskiInvariant` by
            `Cprev.branch_eq_orientedPullback`; use
            `Cprev.branch_same_sourceOrientedInvariant` for representative
